exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your thighs with both hands, palms facing towards you.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell towards the ground.
Step:3 Explosively extend your hips and knees, using the momentum to pull the kettlebell up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebell in the rack position, with your elbows tucked in and the kettlebell resting on the back of your forearm.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a preacher curl bench with your feet flat on the floor; Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your upper arm against the preacher pad; Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder; Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench with your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your upper arm against the preacher pad.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Chest Tap Push-Up (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập chest tap push-up (male). Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line; Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides; As you lower yourself, tap your chest with your right hand; Push yourself back up to the starting position; Repeat the movement, this time tapping your chest with your left hand
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 As you lower yourself, tap your chest with your right hand.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, this time tapping your chest with your left hand.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Seated Triceps Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball seated triceps stretch. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in one hand and extend your arm straight up above your head; Bend your elbow and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arm close to your ear; Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return to the starting position; Repeat with the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and extend your arm straight up above your head.
Step:3 Bend your elbow and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arm close to your ear.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm.

exercises.name: Lever Front Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập lever front pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Sit upright with your chest lifted and your shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back; Engage your lats and pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together; Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit upright with your chest lifted and your shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Engage your lats and pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated One Arm Rotate
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated one arm rotate. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh; Raise the dumbbell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body; Rotate your forearm outward, away from your body, while keeping your upper arm stationary; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly rotate your forearm back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:3 Rotate your forearm outward, away from your body, while keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly rotate your forearm back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Hammer Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying hammer press. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up; Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle; Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up.
Step:2 Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Assisted Standing Triceps Extension (With Towel)
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted standing triceps extension (with towel). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a towel with both hands behind your head; Keep your elbows close to your ears and your upper arms stationary; Slowly extend your forearms upward, squeezing your triceps at the top; Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the towel back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a towel with both hands behind your head.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your ears and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Slowly extend your forearms upward, squeezing your triceps at the top.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the towel back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Clean
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell clean. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip; Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up; Explosively extend your hips and knees, driving through your heels to jump off the ground; As you jump, shrug your shoulders and pull the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping them close to your body; Catch the dumbbells at shoulder height, with your elbows pointing forward and your palms facing up
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Explosively extend your hips and knees, driving through your heels to jump off the ground.
Step:4 As you jump, shrug your shoulders and pull the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping them close to your body.
Step:5 Catch the dumbbells at shoulder height, with your elbows pointing forward and your palms facing up.
Step:6 Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position by reversing the movement.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cocoons With Mega
exercises.description: Bài tập cocoons with mega. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards; Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Emphasize mega control
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Emphasize mega control.

exercises.name: Lever Seated Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footrests to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet on the footrests.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing Concentration Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing concentration curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, with your arm fully extended and palm facing inwards; Place your opposite hand on your thigh for support; Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, with your arm fully extended and palm facing inwards.
Step:2 Place your opposite hand on your thigh for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Close Grip Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell close grip press. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs; Using your thighs to help raise the dumbbells, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width; Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. This will be your starting position; As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells to your side until they are about level with your chest; As you exhale, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells back to the starting position. Make sure to use only your triceps and do not use your forearms or biceps to help lift the dumbbells
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Using your thighs to help raise the dumbbells, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width.
Step:3 Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. This will be your starting position.
Step:4 As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells to your side until they are about level with your chest.
Step:5 As you exhale, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells back to the starting position. Make sure to use only your triceps and do not use your forearms or biceps to help lift the dumbbells.
Step:6 After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Rollerout
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell rollerout. Cách thực hiện: Kneel on the floor and hold a barbell with both hands, shoulder-width apart; Roll the barbell forward, extending your arms and keeping your core engaged; Continue rolling forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead; Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your knees, maintaining control; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Kneel on the floor and hold a barbell with both hands, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Roll the barbell forward, extending your arms and keeping your core engaged.
Step:3 Continue rolling forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your knees, maintaining control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Assisted Standing Chin-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted standing chin-up. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the machine to your desired assistance level; Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Keep your chest up and shoulders back, engage your core, and slightly bend your knees; Pull your body up by flexing your elbows and driving your elbows down towards your sides; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to your desired assistance level.
Step:2 Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your chest up and shoulders back, engage your core, and slightly bend your knees.
Step:4 Pull your body up by flexing your elbows and driving your elbows down towards your sides.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Assisted Standing Triceps Extension (With Towel) With Horizontal
exercises.name_vi: Assisted Standing Triceps Extension (With Towel) With Horizontal
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted standing triceps extension (with towel) with horizontal. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a towel with both hands behind your head; Keep your elbows close to your ears and your upper arms stationary; (horizontal variation) Slowly extend your forearms upward, squeezing your triceps at the top; Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the towel back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a towel with both hands behind your head.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your ears and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 (horizontal variation) Slowly extend your forearms upward, squeezing your triceps at the top.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the towel back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Pronation On Floor
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying pronation on floor. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on the floor with your face down and your arms extended straight out in front of you, holding a dumbbell in each hand; Rotate your palms so they are facing down towards the floor; Keeping your arms straight, lift the dumbbells off the floor by contracting your forearms; Continue lifting until your forearms are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on the floor with your face down and your arms extended straight out in front of you, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Rotate your palms so they are facing down towards the floor.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, lift the dumbbells off the floor by contracting your forearms.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your forearms are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Decline Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập cable decline fly. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable machine to a decline position; Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Hold the handles with your palms facing forward and your arms extended straight out in front of you; Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion; Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the handles with your palms facing forward and your arms extended straight out in front of you.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Kneeling Step With Swing
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted kneeling step with swing. Cách thực hiện: Start in a kneeling position with your knees hip-width apart and your back straight; Hold a weight in each hand, with your arms extended straight down in front of you; Engage your core and swing the weights up and overhead, keeping your arms straight; Lower the weights back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a kneeling position with your knees hip-width apart and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a weight in each hand, with your arms extended straight down in front of you.
Step:3 Engage your core and swing the weights up and overhead, keeping your arms straight.
Step:4 Lower the weights back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đơn, ghế nghiêng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Grab a dumbbell in each hand and sit on the bench with your chest against the incline.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully, allowing the dumbbells to hang straight down from your shoulders.
Step:4 Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Alternating Press On Floor
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell alternating press on floor. Cách thực hiện: Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Hold a kettlebell in each hand, with your palms facing towards your feet and your arms extended straight up towards the ceiling; Lower one kettlebell down towards your shoulder while keeping the other kettlebell extended straight up; Press the lowered kettlebell back up to the starting position while simultaneously lowering the other kettlebell down towards your shoulder; Continue alternating the press motion with each kettlebell for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in each hand, with your palms facing towards your feet and your arms extended straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:3 Lower one kettlebell down towards your shoulder while keeping the other kettlebell extended straight up.
Step:4 Press the lowered kettlebell back up to the starting position while simultaneously lowering the other kettlebell down towards your shoulder.
Step:5 Continue alternating the press motion with each kettlebell for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Side Hip Abduction
exercises.description: Bài tập side hip abduction. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands on your hips; Shift your weight to one leg and lift the opposite leg out to the side, keeping it straight; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position; Repeat on the other side; Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands on your hips.
Step:2 Shift your weight to one leg and lift the opposite leg out to the side, keeping it straight.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat on the other side.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Incline Tricep Extension - Straight Variation
exercises.name_vi: Smith Machine Incline Tricep Extension - Straight Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập smith machine incline tricep extension - straight variation. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder height; Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground; Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Extend your arms fully, lifting the bar off the rack and holding it directly above your chest. Focus on straight movement; Lower the bar slowly towards your forehead, keeping your elbows close to your head
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder height.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, lifting the bar off the rack and holding it directly above your chest. Focus on straight movement.
Step:5 Lower the bar slowly towards your forehead, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Scapula Dips
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows and retracting your shoulder blades, as if you are trying to squeeze a pencil between them.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to extend your elbows and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to chest height and attach the handles.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and step forward to create tension in the cables.
Step:4 Position your feet firmly on the ground and engage your core.
Step:5 Bend your elbows and bring your hands to shoulder level, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:6 Push the handles forward, extending your arms fully in front of you.
Step:7 Pause for a moment, then slowly reverse the movement, bringing your hands back to shoulder level.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Reverse Grip Preacher Curl With Precision
exercises.name_vi: Lever Reverse Grip Preacher Curl With Precision
exercises.description: Bài tập lever reverse grip preacher curl with precision. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine; Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up; Rest your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your elbows are fully extended. Maintain precision form throughout; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Rest your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your elbows are fully extended. Maintain precision form throughout.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Leg Press
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and footplate of the smith machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Push the footplate away from you by extending your legs, keeping your back against the backrest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position.
Step:6 Slowly bend your knees and lower the footplate back towards you, returning to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your forearms resting on your thighs, holding a barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Allow the barbell to roll down to your fingertips, keeping your wrists straight.
Step:3 Slowly curl the barbell up towards your forearms by flexing your wrists.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Upright Row V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Shoulder Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm shoulder press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder level, palm facing forward; Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended overhead; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder level, palm facing forward.
Step:2 Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended overhead.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated One Arm Bicep Curl On Exercise Ball With Leg Raised
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm fully extended.
Step:3 Place your other hand on your hip for stability.
Step:4 Slowly curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your bicep.
Step:6 Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:8 Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Seated Press With High
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell seated press with high. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height, palms facing forward; Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms. Focus on high movement; Lower the kettlebells back to shoulder height; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms. Focus on high movement.
Step:4 Lower the kettlebells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Sumo High Pull
exercises.description: Bài tập vai với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended downwards.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Drive through your heels and explosively extend your hips and knees, pulling the kettlebell up towards your chin.
Step:5 As you pull the kettlebell up, keep your elbows high and wide, and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Roller Seated Shoulder Flexor Depresor Retractor
exercises.name_vi: Roller Seated Shoulder Flexor Depresor Retractor
exercises.description: Bài tập roller seated shoulder flexor depresor retractor. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a flat surface with your legs extended in front of you; Hold the roller with both hands, palms facing down, and place it on your thighs; Lean forward slightly and roll the roller away from your body, extending your arms straight in front of you; Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the roller back towards your body, bending your arms and bringing the roller back to your thighs; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat surface with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Hold the roller with both hands, palms facing down, and place it on your thighs.
Step:3 Lean forward slightly and roll the roller away from your body, extending your arms straight in front of you.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the roller back towards your body, bending your arms and bringing the roller back to your thighs.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Reverse Grip Incline Bench Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench facing the backrest with your chest against it.
Step:3 Grab the barbell with a reverse grip (palms facing down) and hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the barbell towards your upper abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Rear Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell rear fly. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight; Extend your arms straight down towards the ground, palms facing each other; Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lift your arms out to the sides and squeeze your shoulder blades together; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight down towards the ground, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lift your arms out to the sides and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Palms In Incline Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the backrest and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing inwards.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells slowly towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then press the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing One Arm Concentration Curl
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Standing One Arm Concentration Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing one arm concentration curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up; Place your free hand on your thigh for support; Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Step:2 Place your free hand on your thigh for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Single Style Cable Standing Crunch (With Rope Attachment)
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Focus on single movement.
Step:3 Hold the rope with both hands and bring it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent.
Step:4 Engage your abs and slowly crunch your torso forward, bringing your elbows towards your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the crunch, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Rough Band Hip Lift
exercises.description: Bài tập rough band hip lift. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place a resistance band just above your knees; Engage your glutes and core muscles; Press your heels into the ground and lift your hips off the floor, squeezing your glutes at the top; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place a resistance band just above your knees.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Step:4 Press your heels into the ground and lift your hips off the floor, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Focus on rough movement.

exercises.name: Assisted Hanging Knee Raise With Throw Down
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, keeping your legs together.
Step:3 Once your knees are at chest level, explosively throw your legs down towards the ground, extending them fully.
Step:4 Allow your legs to swing back up and repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Medicine Ball Close Grip Push Up
exercises.name_vi: Medicine Ball Close Grip Push Up
exercises.description: Bài tập medicine ball close grip push up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands on the medicine ball, shoulder-width apart; Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides; Push back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands on the medicine ball, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 Push back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Seated Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable seated curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps; Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Standing Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell standing calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a barbell across your upper back; Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using only your toes; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using only your toes.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Hyperextension (On Stability Ball)
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted hyperextension (on stability ball). Cách thực hiện: Position yourself face down on a stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability; Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest; Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Position yourself face down on a stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Seated Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands and position it behind your head.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly curl your upper body forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Concentration Curl Tempo
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip and rest your elbow against the inside of your thigh. Focus on tempo movement.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the cable handle towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Smith Shoulder Press
exercises.description: Bài tập smith shoulder press. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Lift the bar off the rack and position it at shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward; Press the bar upward until your arms are fully extended overhead; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to shoulder level
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the bar off the rack and position it at shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the bar upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to shoulder level.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Wide Reverse Grip Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a wide reverse grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in and your wrists straight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest, then push it back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Hamstring Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Step forward with your right foot and shift your weight onto your right leg.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, slowly bend forward at the hips, reaching towards your right foot with both hands.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Decline Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your upper body towards your knees, curling your torso.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Bridge - Mountain Climber (Cross Body)
exercises.description: Bài tập bridge - mountain climber (cross body). Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line; Engage your core and lift your right foot off the ground, bringing your right knee towards your left elbow; Return your right foot to the starting position and repeat the movement with your left foot towards your right elbow; Continue alternating sides, moving at a controlled pace; Keep your hips level and avoid lifting your hips too high or sagging them too low
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your right foot off the ground, bringing your right knee towards your left elbow.
Step:3 Return your right foot to the starting position and repeat the movement with your left foot towards your right elbow.
Step:4 Continue alternating sides, moving at a controlled pace.
Step:5 Keep your hips level and avoid lifting your hips too high or sagging them too low.
Step:6 Maintain a steady breathing pattern throughout the exercise.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Split Squats
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tạ đòn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step forward with one foot and place it about two feet in front of the other foot.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your front thigh is parallel to the ground, and your back knee is hovering just above the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

exercises.name: Pointed Cable Palm Rotational Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a handle to a cable machine at waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:4 Step back to create tension on the cable, keeping your back straight and knees slightly bent. Emphasize pointed control.
Step:5 Pull the handle towards your body, rotating your palms to face upwards as you do so.
Step:6 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Seated Hip Internal Rotation
exercises.description: Bài tập band seated hip internal rotation. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Place a resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees; Keep your knees bent at a 90-degree angle and your feet shoulder-width apart; Engage your glutes and slowly rotate your knees outward, pushing against the resistance of the band; Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place a resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees.
Step:3 Keep your knees bent at a 90-degree angle and your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and slowly rotate your knees outward, pushing against the resistance of the band.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith One Leg Floor Calf Raise
exercises.name_vi: Smith One Leg Floor Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập smith one leg floor calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Position yourself on the floor under the smith machine bar, facing away from the machine; Place the balls of your feet on a raised surface, such as a weight plate or block; Position the smith machine bar across your lower legs, just above your ankles; Hold onto the bar with your hands for stability; Raise your heels off the ground by extending your ankles, lifting your body up
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Position yourself on the floor under the smith machine bar, facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Place the balls of your feet on a raised surface, such as a weight plate or block.
Step:3 Position the smith machine bar across your lower legs, just above your ankles.
Step:4 Hold onto the bar with your hands for stability.
Step:5 Raise your heels off the ground by extending your ankles, lifting your body up.
Step:6 Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lying Leg-Hip Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập lying leg-hip raise. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides; Place your hands under your glutes for support; Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, raising them towards the ceiling; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, raising them towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Single Leg Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập band single leg calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place the band around the ball of your left foot; Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed; Slowly raise your left heel off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the ball of your foot; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your left heel back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the right leg
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place the band around the ball of your left foot.
Step:2 Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed.
Step:3 Slowly raise your left heel off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the ball of your foot.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your left heel back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the right leg.

exercises.name: Lever Horizontal One Leg Press
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the machine so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle when your feet are on the footplate.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Place your hands on the handles or sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Push the footplate away from your body by extending your leg, keeping your back against the backrest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly bend your leg to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.name: Sled Lying Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập sled lying squat. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight; Lie on your back on the sled machine with your feet on the footplate; Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly angled outwards; Grip the handles of the sled machine for stability; Engage your glutes and core muscles
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight.
Step:2 Lie on your back on the sled machine with your feet on the footplate.
Step:3 Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly angled outwards.
Step:4 Grip the handles of the sled machine for stability.
Step:5 Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Step:6 Push through your heels and extend your legs to lift the sled.
Step:7 Lower the sled back down by bending your knees and hips.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Horizontal Pallof Press
exercises.description: Bài tập band horizontal pallof press. Cách thực hiện: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height; Stand perpendicular to the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the band handle with both hands and step away from the anchor point to create tension in the band; Bring your hands to your chest, keeping your elbows bent and close to your body; Engage your core and maintain a stable stance
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height.
Step:2 Stand perpendicular to the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the band handle with both hands and step away from the anchor point to create tension in the band.
Step:4 Bring your hands to your chest, keeping your elbows bent and close to your body.
Step:5 Engage your core and maintain a stable stance.
Step:6 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, pushing the band away from your body.
Step:7 Hold the extended position for a few seconds, focusing on maintaining tension in your core.
Step:8 Slowly bring your hands back to your chest, resisting the pull of the band.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Reverse Grip Incline Bench Two Arm Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your chest against the backrest and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an underhand grip.
Step:4 Lean forward and let your arms hang straight down, fully extended.
Step:5 Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Bench Dip On Floor
exercises.description: Bài tập bench dip on floor. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward; Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands; Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor; Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Decline Pullover
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell decline pullover. Cách thực hiện: Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured; Hold the barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Extend your arms above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows; Lower the barbell in an arc motion behind your head, feeling a stretch in your chest and shoulders; Pause for a moment, then return the barbell to the starting position by reversing the motion
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Extend your arms above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the barbell in an arc motion behind your head, feeling a stretch in your chest and shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return the barbell to the starting position by reversing the motion.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Windmill
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell windmill. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand overhead; Rotate your left foot outwards about 45 degrees and keep your right foot pointing forward; Bend your torso to the left side, keeping your right arm extended overhead and your eyes on the kettlebell; Lower your torso as far as you can while keeping your right arm straight and your left arm extended to the side; Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position by pushing through your right foot and engaging your obliques
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand overhead.
Step:2 Rotate your left foot outwards about 45 degrees and keep your right foot pointing forward.
Step:3 Bend your torso to the left side, keeping your right arm extended overhead and your eyes on the kettlebell.
Step:4 Lower your torso as far as you can while keeping your right arm straight and your left arm extended to the side.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position by pushing through your right foot and engaging your obliques.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Flexible Cable Triceps Pushdown (V-Bar)
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a v-bar attachment to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Engage your triceps and exhale as you push the v-bar down until your arms are fully extended. Perform with flexible intensity.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your triceps.
Step:7 Inhale as you slowly return the v-bar to the starting position, maintaining control.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Lunge With Swing Twisted
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted lunge with swing twisted. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a weight in each hand; Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position; As you lunge forward, swing the weights forward and upward, keeping your arms straight; Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position, swinging the weights back down; (twisted variation) Repeat with your left foot and continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a weight in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 As you lunge forward, swing the weights forward and upward, keeping your arms straight.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position, swinging the weights back down.
Step:5 (twisted variation) Repeat with your left foot and continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Chest Dip
exercises.description: Bài tập chest dip. Cách thực hiện: Position yourself on parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight; Lower your body by bending your elbows until your shoulders are below your elbows; Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Position yourself on parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your shoulders are below your elbows.
Step:3 Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Pullover
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head until you feel a stretch in your chest and shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Incline Bench Press Seated
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 (seated variation) Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows at a 45-degree angle.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Triceps Dip (Between Benches) - Extreme Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập triceps dip (between benches) - extreme variation. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge of the bench, fingers pointing forward; (extreme variation) Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands; Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge of the bench, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 (extreme variation) Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Incline Twisting Sit-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập incline twisting sit-up. Cách thực hiện: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle; Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads; Place your hands behind your head or across your chest; Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward; As you curl up, twist your torso to one side, bringing your elbow towards the opposite knee
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Step:4 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward.
Step:5 As you curl up, twist your torso to one side, bringing your elbow towards the opposite knee.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the movement, this time twisting your torso to the other side.
Step:8 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: One Leg Donkey Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập one leg donkey calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward; Place your hands on a stable surface for support, such as a wall or a bar; Lift one leg off the ground, keeping your knee slightly bent; Raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Place your hands on a stable surface for support, such as a wall or a bar.
Step:3 Lift one leg off the ground, keeping your knee slightly bent.
Step:4 Raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.name: Cable Seated Row With Reverse
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, keeping your back straight and your shoulders relaxed.
Step:3 Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Focus on reverse movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Double Alternating Hang Clean
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell double alternating hang clean. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand with an overhand grip; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up; Allow the kettlebells to hang straight down in front of your body; In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips and knees while shrugging your shoulders; As the kettlebells rise, pull them up towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows high and out to the sides
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Allow the kettlebells to hang straight down in front of your body.
Step:4 In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips and knees while shrugging your shoulders.
Step:5 As the kettlebells rise, pull them up towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows high and out to the sides.
Step:6 Catch the kettlebells at shoulder height, with your palms facing inward and your elbows pointing forward.
Step:7 Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing Overhead Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Stationary Bike Walk
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position on the stationary bike to ensure proper alignment.
Step:2 Place your feet on the pedals and secure them with the straps if available.
Step:3 Start pedaling at a comfortable pace, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:4 Maintain a steady rhythm and increase the resistance level if desired.
Step:5 Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Step:6 Cool down by gradually reducing your pace and resistance level.
Step:7 Stretch your leg muscles after the workout to prevent tightness and promote recovery.

exercises.name: Archer Push Up
exercises.description: Bài tập archer push up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Extend one arm straight out to the side, parallel to the ground; Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged; Push back up to the starting position; Repeat on the other side, extending the opposite arm out to the side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one arm straight out to the side, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:4 Push back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, extending the opposite arm out to the side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Reverse Grip Bent Over Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Pull the bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever T Bar Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footplate position to ensure proper alignment.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Medicine Ball Chest Pass
exercises.description: Bài tập medicine ball chest pass. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball at chest level; Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest with force; As you release the ball, follow through with your arms and torso, transferring your weight from your back foot to your front foot; Catch the ball as it rebounds off the wall or partner, and immediately repeat the movement; Continue for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball at chest level.
Step:2 Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest with force.
Step:3 As you release the ball, follow through with your arms and torso, transferring your weight from your back foot to your front foot.
Step:4 Catch the ball as it rebounds off the wall or partner, and immediately repeat the movement.
Step:5 Continue for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Standing Reverse Grip Curl Resistance
exercises.name_vi: Barbell Standing Reverse Grip Curl Resistance
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell standing reverse grip curl resistance. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up; Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary; Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the barbell as close to your shoulders as possible; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps; Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the barbell as close to your shoulders as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Focus on resistance movement.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tạ đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on the incline bench and let your elbows hang down, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Biceps Curl (With Arm Blaster)
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell biceps curl (with arm blaster). Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up; Place your upper arms against the arm blaster, keeping your elbows close to your torso; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Place your upper arms against the arm blaster, keeping your elbows close to your torso.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Muscle-Up (On Vertical Bar)
exercises.description: Bài tập muscle-up (on vertical bar). Cách thực hiện: Start by hanging from a vertical bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended; Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest; As you pull yourself up, lean back slightly and bring your elbows towards your sides; Continue pulling until your chest reaches the bar and your elbows are fully bent; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a vertical bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended.
