Step:2 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:3 As you pull yourself up, lean back slightly and bring your elbows towards your sides.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chest reaches the bar and your elbows are fully bent.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Upright Smith Incline Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 30-45 degree incline.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back flat against the pad and feet firmly on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Perform with upright intensity.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your upper chest, keeping your elbows slightly tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Y-Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập band y-raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing inwards; Keep your arms straight and lift them up and out to the sides, forming a 'Y' shape with your body; Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement; Slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and lift them up and out to the sides, forming a 'Y' shape with your body.
Step:3 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Upright Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Let the dumbbells hang in front of your thighs, with your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbells straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Isolation Assisted Seated Pectoralis Major Stretch With Stability Ball
exercises.name_vi: Isolation Assisted Seated Pectoralis Major Stretch With Stability Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập isolation assisted seated pectoralis major stretch with stability ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a stability ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you; Slowly lower the stability ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your pectoral muscles; Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position. Emphasize isolation control; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a stability ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Slowly lower the stability ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your pectoral muscles.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position. Emphasize isolation control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Medicine Ball Supine Chest Throw
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back on a bench with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the medicine ball with both hands, extending your arms straight up above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the medicine ball towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Explosively push the medicine ball upwards, extending your arms fully and throwing the ball as high as possible.
Step:5 Catch the medicine ball and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Fly On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Fly On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm fly on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground; Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your upper back is resting on the exercise ball; Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inwards; Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow; Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your upper back is resting on the exercise ball.
Step:3 Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inwards.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Lower Back Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập lower back curl. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your stomach with your legs extended and your arms by your sides; Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling your back upwards; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your stomach with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling your back upwards.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Full Can Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell full can lateral raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body; Keep your back straight and engage your core; Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lying Elbow To Knee
exercises.description: Bài tập lying elbow to knee. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards; Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee; At the same time, extend your right leg straight out and lift it off the ground; Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee.
Step:4 At the same time, extend your right leg straight out and lift it off the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement, this time bringing your left elbow towards your right knee and extending your left leg.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Cross-Over Revers Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a D-handle to each low pulley cable and stand in the middle of the cable crossover machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with a pronated grip (palms facing down) and take a step forward, positioning your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and lean forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your abs engaged.
Step:4 With your arms extended out to the sides and slightly bent at the elbows, exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the cables back and upward in a reverse fly motion.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Flexion Leg Sit Up (Bent Knee)
exercises.description: Bài tập flexion leg sit up (bent knee). Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards; Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle; At the same time, lift your legs off the ground, bending your knees and bringing them towards your chest; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 At the same time, lift your legs off the ground, bending your knees and bringing them towards your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band One Arm Single Leg Split Squat
exercises.name_vi: Band One Arm Single Leg Split Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập band one arm single leg split squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place a resistance band around your ankles; Extend one leg forward and rest the top of your foot on a bench or step behind you; Hold onto a support with one hand for balance; Bend your standing leg and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your knee in line with your toes; Push through your heel to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place a resistance band around your ankles.
Step:2 Extend one leg forward and rest the top of your foot on a bench or step behind you.
Step:3 Hold onto a support with one hand for balance.
Step:4 Bend your standing leg and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your knee in line with your toes.
Step:5 Push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.name: Modified Push Up To Lower Arms
exercises.name_vi: Modified Push Up To Lower Arms
exercises.description: Bài tập modified push up to lower arms. Cách thực hiện: Start in a push-up position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line; Lower your body down towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides; Once your elbows are at a 90-degree angle, lower your forearms to the ground, keeping your elbows directly under your shoulders; Pause for a moment, then push through your palms to lift your forearms back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body down towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 Once your elbows are at a 90-degree angle, lower your forearms to the ground, keeping your elbows directly under your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push through your palms to lift your forearms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Lateral Raise
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline one arm lateral raise. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh; Lean forward and position your upper arm against the inside of your thigh; Raise the dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm slightly bent and your palm facing down; Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the floor; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Step:2 Lean forward and position your upper arm against the inside of your thigh.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm slightly bent and your palm facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Assisted Sit-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted sit-up. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the edge of a bench or have someone hold your feet down; Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards; Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench or have someone hold your feet down.
Step:2 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:4 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Twist
exercises.description: Bài tập cable twist. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine; Hold the cable handle with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your arms slightly bent; Engage your core and twist your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body; Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, feeling the contraction in your abs and obliques; Slowly return to the starting position, resisting the cable's pull
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your arms slightly bent.
Step:3 Engage your core and twist your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, feeling the contraction in your abs and obliques.
Step:5 Slowly return to the starting position, resisting the cable's pull.
Step:6 Repeat the movement to the left side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Squared Reverse Grip Machine Lat Pulldown
exercises.name_vi: Squared Reverse Grip Machine Lat Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập squared reverse grip machine lat pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground; Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back; Pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Maintain squared form throughout; Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Maintain squared form throughout.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Glute Bridge Two Legs On Bench (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench with your back against it and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands on the bench beside your hips for support.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then lift your hips off the bench until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Finger Curls
exercises.description: Bài tập finger curls. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up; Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge; Slowly curl your fingers towards your palms, squeezing the barbell tightly; Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly release your fingers back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your fingers towards your palms, squeezing the barbell tightly.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly release your fingers back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Twist Hip Lift
exercises.description: Bài tập twist hip lift. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place your hands by your sides for support; Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders; While keeping your hips lifted, twist your lower body to the right side, bringing your knees towards the ground; Return to the starting position and repeat the twist to the left side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands by your sides for support.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 While keeping your hips lifted, twist your lower body to the right side, bringing your knees towards the ground.
Step:5 Return to the starting position and repeat the twist to the left side.
Step:6 Continue alternating twists for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell One Arm Snatch
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell one arm snatch. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand between your legs; Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell towards the ground; Explosively extend your hips and knees, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up towards your shoulder; As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your hand and punch it straight up overhead, fully extending your arm; Lower the kettlebell back down between your legs and repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand between your legs.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell towards the ground.
Step:3 Explosively extend your hips and knees, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your hand and punch it straight up overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell back down between your legs and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Hack One Leg Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập hack one leg calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the sled machine to an appropriate weight; Stand on the sled machine with one foot, keeping the other foot off the ground; Hold onto the handles for stability; Raise your heel as high as possible, lifting your body up on the ball of your foot; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to an appropriate weight.
Step:2 Stand on the sled machine with one foot, keeping the other foot off the ground.
Step:3 Hold onto the handles for stability.
Step:4 Raise your heel as high as possible, lifting your body up on the ball of your foot.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:7 Switch legs and repeat the exercise.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Step-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell step-up. Cách thực hiện: Stand in front of a bench or step with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body; Place your right foot on the bench or step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface; Push through your right heel and lift your body up onto the bench or step, straightening your right leg; Bring your left foot up onto the bench or step, standing fully upright; Step back down with your left foot, followed by your right foot, returning to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a bench or step with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Place your right foot on the bench or step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface.
Step:3 Push through your right heel and lift your body up onto the bench or step, straightening your right leg.
Step:4 Bring your left foot up onto the bench or step, standing fully upright.
Step:5 Step back down with your left foot, followed by your right foot, returning to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.name: Smith Incline Shoulder Raises
exercises.description: Bài tập smith incline shoulder raises. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the smith machine to an incline position; Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Keep your back straight and core engaged; Raise the barbell up towards the ceiling, leading with your elbows
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine to an incline position.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:5 Raise the barbell up towards the ceiling, leading with your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Incline Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập incline push-up. Cách thực hiện: Place your hands on an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels; Lower your chest towards the elevated surface by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place your hands on an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the elevated surface by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Front Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell front raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip; Keep your arms straight and lift the barbell forward and upward until it reaches shoulder level; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and lift the barbell forward and upward until it reaches shoulder level.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Breeding
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline breeding. Cách thực hiện: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle; Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing forward; Start with your arms fully extended, perpendicular to the ground; Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing forward.
Step:4 Start with your arms fully extended, perpendicular to the ground.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Seated Bicep Curl (On Stability Ball)
exercises.name_vi: Weighted Seated Bicep Curl (On Stability Ball)
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted seated bicep curl (on stability ball). Cách thực hiện: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a medicine ball with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and let your arms hang down by your sides; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the medicine ball up towards your shoulders; Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps; Inhale and slowly lower the medicine ball back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a medicine ball with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and let your arms hang down by your sides.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the medicine ball up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the medicine ball back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Alternating Arm Ups With Fast
exercises.name_vi: Exercise Ball Alternating Arm Ups With Fast
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball alternating arm ups with fast. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms extended down by your sides; Engage your core and slowly lift one arm up towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow slightly bent. Perform with fast intensity; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position; Repeat the movement with the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms extended down by your sides.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift one arm up towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow slightly bent. Perform with fast intensity.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Hands Clasped Circular Toe Touch (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập hands clasped circular toe touch (male). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands clasped together in front of your chest; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight; Lower your hands towards your toes in a circular motion, reaching as far as you can without straining; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands clasped together in front of your chest.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Lower your hands towards your toes in a circular motion, reaching as far as you can without straining.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Potty Squat With Support
exercises.description: Bài tập potty squat with support. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward; Hold onto a stable support, such as a chair or wall, for balance; Lower your body down into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back; Keep your chest up and your back straight throughout the movement; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold onto a stable support, such as a chair or wall, for balance.
Step:3 Lower your body down into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:4 Keep your chest up and your back straight throughout the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Seated Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập smith seated wrist curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench in front of a Smith machine with your feet flat on the ground; Grasp the barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart; Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off; Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your forearms; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench in front of a Smith machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your forearms.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập lever preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine; Place your upper arms on the pad and grip the handles with an underhand grip; Keep your back straight and your elbows positioned on the pad; Exhale and curl your forearms towards your upper arms, contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Place your upper arms on the pad and grip the handles with an underhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your elbows positioned on the pad.
Step:4 Exhale and curl your forearms towards your upper arms, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Alternating Renegade Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands gripping the kettlebells and your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Step:3 Pull one kettlebell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Hanging Oblique Knee Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập hanging oblique knee raise. Cách thực hiện: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you; Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, twisting your torso to the side as you do so; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat on the other side, twisting your torso in the opposite direction; Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, twisting your torso to the side as you do so.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat on the other side, twisting your torso in the opposite direction.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Basic Toe Touch (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập basic toe touch (male). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides; Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent; Reach down towards your toes with your hands, keeping your legs as straight as possible; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Reach down towards your toes with your hands, keeping your legs as straight as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing Alternate Overhead Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Press one dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Lying Straight Leg Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your feet together.
Step:2 Place the band around the arches of your feet and hold the ends of the band with your hands.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift both legs off the ground until they are perpendicular to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Close Grip Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable close grip curl. Cách thực hiện: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine; Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart; Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise; Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Sitted Alternate Leg Raise (Female)
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a barbell across your thighs.
Step:2 Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support.
Step:3 Keeping your legs straight, lift one leg up as high as possible while keeping it parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Lower the leg back down and repeat with the other leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing One Arm Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing one arm extension. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand; Raise the dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm; Keep your upper arm close to your head and perpendicular to the ground; Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, bending your elbow; Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Keep your upper arm close to your head and perpendicular to the ground.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, bending your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Wrist Rollerer
exercises.description: Bài tập wrist rollerer. Cách thực hiện: Attach a weight to one end of a rope or bar; Hold the other end of the rope or bar with both hands, palms facing down; Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms fully extended in front of you; Slowly roll the weight up towards your hands by flexing your wrists; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the weight back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a weight to one end of a rope or bar.
Step:2 Hold the other end of the rope or bar with both hands, palms facing down.
Step:3 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms fully extended in front of you.
Step:4 Slowly roll the weight up towards your hands by flexing your wrists.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the weight back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Frankenstein Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập frankenstein squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell in front of your body with straight arms; Keeping your back straight, lower your body by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair; Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go; Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell in front of your body with straight arms.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight, lower your body by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Side-To-Side Chin With Reverse
exercises.description: Bài tập side-to-side chin with reverse. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed; Pull yourself up by bending your elbows and bringing your chin towards the bar, while keeping your body straight. Perform with reverse intensity; Once your chin is above the bar, lower yourself back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed.
Step:4 Pull yourself up by bending your elbows and bringing your chin towards the bar, while keeping your body straight. Perform with reverse intensity.
Step:5 Once your chin is above the bar, lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Incline Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline press on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward; Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling your body down the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball; Hold the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and pointing out to the sides; Press the dumbbells upward, extending your arms fully; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling your body down the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and pointing out to the sides.
Step:4 Press the dumbbells upward, extending your arms fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline one arm press on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand, feet flat on the ground; Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball; Hold the dumbbell at shoulder height with your palm facing forward; Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand, feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell at shoulder height with your palm facing forward.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Lever Reverse T-Bar Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footplate position on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing One Arm Curl (Over Incline Bench)
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Standing One Arm Curl (Over Incline Bench)
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing one arm curl (over incline bench). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing forward; Place your other hand on an incline bench for support; Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing forward.
Step:2 Place your other hand on an incline bench for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bent Over Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Let your arms hang straight down towards the floor, with your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Standing Hand Squeeze
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted standing hand squeeze. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a weight in each hand; Extend your arms straight in front of you, palms facing each other; Squeeze your hands together as hard as you can, engaging your forearms; Hold the squeeze for a few seconds, then release; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a weight in each hand.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight in front of you, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Squeeze your hands together as hard as you can, engaging your forearms.
Step:4 Hold the squeeze for a few seconds, then release.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Standing Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập bodyweight standing calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward; Place your hands on a wall or stable surface for balance; Slowly raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Place your hands on a wall or stable surface for balance.
Step:3 Slowly raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Over Bench Neutral Wrist Curl
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Over Bench Neutral Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell over bench neutral wrist curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up; Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders; Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: One Arm Towel Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a towel with one hand.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Extend your arm fully, allowing the towel to hang in front of you.
Step:4 Pull the towel towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the towel back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Seated Press
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell seated press. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height, palms facing forward; Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms; Lower the kettlebells back to shoulder height; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Lower the kettlebells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Straddle Planche
exercises.description: Bài tập straddle planche. Cách thực hiện: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your feet spread wide apart; Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, bringing your shoulders over your hands; Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to straighten your arms and lift your body back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your feet spread wide apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, bringing your shoulders over your hands.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to straighten your arms and lift your body back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Two Arm Military Press
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell two arm military press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward; Engage your core and press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Engage your core and press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Reverse Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell reverse wrist curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing down; Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge; Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the dumbbells towards your body; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the dumbbells towards your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: London Bridge
exercises.description: Bài tập london bridge. Cách thực hiện: Attach the rope to a high anchor point; Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing down; Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged; Pull the rope towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the rope to a high anchor point.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:4 Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the rope towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying External Shoulder Rotation
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying external shoulder rotation. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your side on a flat bench with your upper arm against your side and your elbow bent 90 degrees; Hold a dumbbell in your hand with your palm facing down; Keeping your upper arm against your side, slowly rotate your forearm upward as far as possible; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your side on a flat bench with your upper arm against your side and your elbow bent 90 degrees.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in your hand with your palm facing down.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm against your side, slowly rotate your forearm upward as far as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Tuck Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your shoulder blades off the ground and bring your knees towards your chest, simultaneously curling your upper body towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your shoulder blades and extend your legs back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Sumo Pull Through
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell sumo pull through. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointed outwards; Hold a dumbbell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended; Bend your knees and lower your hips down into a squat position, keeping your back straight; Lower the dumbbell down between your legs, keeping your arms straight; Drive through your heels and extend your hips forward, pulling the dumbbell up and in front of your body
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointed outwards.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lower your hips down into a squat position, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell down between your legs, keeping your arms straight.
Step:5 Drive through your heels and extend your hips forward, pulling the dumbbell up and in front of your body.
Step:6 Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement, then lower the dumbbell back down between your legs.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Gorilla Chin
exercises.description: Bài tập gorilla chin. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you; Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, bringing your chin above the bar; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:4 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, bringing your chin above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Sit-Up V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập sit-up v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards; Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Pin Presses
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell pin presses. Cách thực hiện: Set up a barbell on a power rack at chest height; Stand facing the barbell and position yourself underneath it, with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grip the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest, with your arms fully extended; Lower the barbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up a barbell on a power rack at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing the barbell and position yourself underneath it, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grip the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest, with your arms fully extended.
Step:5 Lower the barbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body.
Step:6 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:7 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Seated Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập lever seated calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height so that your knees are slightly bent and your feet are flat on the footplate; Place your toes on the footplate with your heels hanging off the edge; Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability; Push through the balls of your feet to raise your heels as high as possible; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your knees are slightly bent and your feet are flat on the footplate.
Step:2 Place your toes on the footplate with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Push through the balls of your feet to raise your heels as high as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Pronate-Grip Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell pronate-grip triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench or chair with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell with both hands, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight up overhead; Keeping your upper arms close to your head and elbows pointing forward, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbows; Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight up overhead.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms close to your head and elbows pointing forward, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Chest Fly On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Chest Fly On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm chest fly on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground; Walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your upper back is supported on the ball and your head, neck, and shoulders are off the ball; Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inward; Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow; Pause for a moment when your arm is parallel to the ground
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your upper back is supported on the ball and your head, neck, and shoulders are off the ball.
Step:3 Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inward.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Engage your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Cuban Press V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell cuban press v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing down; Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, press the dumbbells straight up overhead until your arms are fully extended; Rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward; Lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder height, rotating your wrists back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing down.
Step:2 Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, press the dumbbells straight up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder height, rotating your wrists back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Pullover On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Pullover On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm pullover on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle; Hold a dumbbell with one hand and extend your arm straight up above your chest; Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arm straight; Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with one hand and extend your arm straight up above your chest.
Step:3 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arm straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Kickback
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm kickback. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in your right hand; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight; Bring your right elbow up to your side, keeping it bent at a 90-degree angle; Extend your right arm straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement; Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in your right hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Bring your right elbow up to your side, keeping it bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Extend your right arm straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squatting Row (With Towel)
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a towel in front of you with your palms facing down.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
Step:3 As you lower into the squat, simultaneously pull the towel towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then slowly return to the starting position while extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Seated Dip
exercises.description: Bài tập lever seated dip. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height so that your feet are flat on the ground and your knees are at a 90-degree angle; Grasp the handles of the leverage machine with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended; Slowly lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your feet are flat on the ground and your knees are at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Grasp the handles of the leverage machine with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Slowly lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Decline Shrug V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell decline shrug v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle; Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting on it; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms fully extended; Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders as high as possible while squeezing your shoulder blades together; Hold the contraction for a brief pause, then lower the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting on it.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders as high as possible while squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Hold the contraction for a brief pause, then lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Low Bar Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell low bar squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper back; Keeping your chest up and core engaged, slowly lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back; Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below; Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper back.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, slowly lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Alternate Biceps Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell alternate biceps curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps; Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.

exercises.name: Butterfly Yoga Pose
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your knees and bring the soles of your feet together, allowing your knees to fall out to the sides.
Step:3 Hold onto your ankles or feet with your hands.
Step:4 Sit up tall and lengthen your spine.
Step:5 Gently press your knees down towards the floor, feeling a stretch in your inner thighs.
Step:6 Hold this position for a few breaths.
Step:7 To release, slowly bring your knees back up and extend your legs.

exercises.name: Lying (Side) Quads Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập lying (side) quads stretch. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your side with your legs straight; Bend your top leg and grab your ankle or foot with your hand; Gently pull your ankle or foot towards your glutes until you feel a stretch in your quads; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds; Release the stretch and repeat on the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs straight.
Step:2 Bend your top leg and grab your ankle or foot with your hand.
Step:3 Gently pull your ankle or foot towards your glutes until you feel a stretch in your quads.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Release the stretch and repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Reverse Wrist Curl
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Reverse Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm reverse wrist curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip, palm facing down; Rest your forearm on your thigh, with your wrist hanging off the edge; Slowly lower the dumbbell towards the ground by flexing your wrist; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly curl your wrist back up towards your body
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip, palm facing down.
Step:3 Rest your forearm on your thigh, with your wrist hanging off the edge.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell towards the ground by flexing your wrist.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly curl your wrist back up towards your body.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Reverse Preacher Curl
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Reverse Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm reverse preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arm extended over the edge of the bench, holding a dumbbell with an underhand grip; Lower the dumbbell slowly until your arm is fully extended; Curl the dumbbell back up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary; Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arm extended over the edge of the bench, holding a dumbbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Lower the dumbbell slowly until your arm is fully extended.
Step:3 Curl the dumbbell back up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Hammer Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline hammer curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms fully extended; Keep your back against the bench and your feet flat on the floor; While keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keep your back against the bench and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 While keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Inverted Row
