exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up a bar at waist height or use a suspension trainer.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar or suspension trainer, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grab the bar or handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean back, keeping your body straight and your heels on the ground.
Step:5 Pull your chest towards the bar or handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Tricep Dips
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge next to your hips.
Step:2 Slide your butt off the front of the bench with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:3 Keep your back close to the bench and your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Twisted Leg Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift both legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
Step:4 As you lift your legs, twist your hips to one side, bringing your legs towards your opposite shoulder.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement, this time twisting your hips to the other side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Bent-Over Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing your body.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Let the dumbbell hang straight down towards the floor, with your arm fully extended.
Step:4 Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Band One Arm Twisting Chest Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at chest height.
Step:2 Stand with your side facing the anchor point and grab the band with one hand.
Step:3 Step away from the anchor point to create tension in the band.
Step:4 Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees.
Step:5 Bring your hand holding the band across your body, towards the opposite shoulder.
Step:6 While maintaining tension in the band, push your hand forward and away from your body, extending your arm.
Step:7 Slowly return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:8 Switch sides and repeat the exercise with the other hand.

exercises.name: One Leg Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập one leg squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Extend one leg forward, keeping it off the ground; Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair; Keep your chest up and your back straight; Push through your heel to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one leg forward, keeping it off the ground.
Step:3 Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:4 Keep your chest up and your back straight.
Step:5 Push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat with the other leg.

exercises.name: Roller Side Lat Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập roller side lat stretch. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the roller with both hands in front of your body; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight; Extend your arms forward and roll the roller down towards your feet, feeling a stretch in your lats; Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly roll the roller back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the roller with both hands in front of your body.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arms forward and roll the roller down towards your feet, feeling a stretch in your lats.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly roll the roller back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Rear Drive
exercises.description: Bài tập cable rear drive. Cách thực hiện: Attach a handle to a low pulley cable machine and stand facing away from the machine; Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight out in front of you; Keeping your elbows stationary, pull the handle back towards your body, squeezing your triceps at the end of the movement; Slowly return the handle to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a handle to a low pulley cable machine and stand facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your elbows stationary, pull the handle back towards your body, squeezing your triceps at the end of the movement.
Step:4 Slowly return the handle to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Standing Single Leg Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and your hands on your hips.
Step:2 Shift your weight onto your left leg and lift your right foot off the ground, bending your knee.
Step:3 Slowly curl your right heel towards your glutes, squeezing your hamstring.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your right foot back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.name: Targeted Style Smith Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Focus on targeted movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Side Lying Hip Adduction (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập side lying hip adduction (male). Cách thực hiện: Lie on your side with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other; Place your bottom arm under your head for support; Engage your adductors and lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips or leaning backward; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Place your bottom arm under your head for support.
Step:3 Engage your adductors and lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips or leaning backward.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Cable Rope Elevated Seated Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the elevated seat facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Grab the cable rope handles with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly back, maintaining a slight bend in your knees.
Step:4 Pull the cable towards your body by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully contracted position.
Step:6 Slowly release the tension and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Donkey Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập lever donkey calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the leverage machine to the appropriate height for your body; Position yourself facing the machine, with your toes on the foot platform and your heels hanging off the edge; Place your hands on the handles or the support bars for stability; Engage your calves and lift your heels as high as possible, using the balls of your feet; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the leverage machine to the appropriate height for your body.
Step:2 Position yourself facing the machine, with your toes on the foot platform and your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Place your hands on the handles or the support bars for stability.
Step:4 Engage your calves and lift your heels as high as possible, using the balls of your feet.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body; Keep your back straight and engage your core; Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Alternating Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a kettlebell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Pull one kettlebell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Bent Arm Pullover
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell bent arm pullover. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor; Hold a barbell with a shoulder-width grip and extend your arms straight above your chest; Lower the barbell behind your head while keeping your arms slightly bent; Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with a shoulder-width grip and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the barbell behind your head while keeping your arms slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Iron Cross
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell iron cross. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides; Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, forming a T shape with your body; Pause for a moment, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Step:2 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, forming a T shape with your body.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Upright Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold the cable attachment with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Pull the cable attachment straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Slowly lower the cable attachment back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Kickbacks On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell kickbacks on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle; Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement; Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Incline Push Up Depth Jump
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Find an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, and place your hands shoulder-width apart on the edge.
Step:2 Step your feet back, keeping your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the edge of the surface, bending your elbows and keeping your body aligned.
Step:4 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Jump off the edge of the surface, landing softly with your knees slightly bent.
Step:6 Repeat the push-up and depth jump for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Rear Pull-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập rear pull-up. Cách thực hiện: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight; Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Gripless Shrug V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập lever gripless shrug v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad; Grasp the handles or bars with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight; Keeping your back straight, lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible; Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles or bars with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Short Stride Run
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Find an open space or a treadmill to perform the exercise.
Step:2 Stand tall with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:3 Start jogging in place, lifting your knees high and pumping your arms.
Step:4 After a few seconds, start taking short strides forward, maintaining a quick pace.
Step:5 Continue running with short strides for the desired duration or distance.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Alternate Biceps Curl (With Arm Blaster)
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Alternate Biceps Curl (With Arm Blaster)
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell alternate biceps curl (with arm blaster). Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward; Place the arm blaster on your upper arms, ensuring a secure fit; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Place the arm blaster on your upper arms, ensuring a secure fit.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the movement with the opposite arm.
Step:8 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez Bar French Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Ez Bar French Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập ez bar french press on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball and hold an EZ barbell with an overhand grip; Extend your arms straight up, keeping your elbows close to your head; Slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows; Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball and hold an EZ barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:3 Slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Military Press
exercises.description: Bài tập lever military press. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Back Pec Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập back pec stretch. Cách thực hiện: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart; Extend your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground; Cross your arms in front of your body, with your right arm over your left arm; Interlock your fingers and rotate your palms away from your body; Slowly raise your arms up and away from your body, feeling a stretch in your back and chest
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Cross your arms in front of your body, with your right arm over your left arm.
Step:4 Interlock your fingers and rotate your palms away from your body.
Step:5 Slowly raise your arms up and away from your body, feeling a stretch in your back and chest.
Step:6 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release.
Step:7 Repeat on the opposite side.

exercises.name: Lever Seated Hip Abduction
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footrests.
Step:3 Place your hands on the side handles for stability.
Step:4 Engage your abductors and slowly push your legs apart, away from the midline of your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring your legs back together to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Bottoms-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập bottoms-up. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides; Bend your knees and bring them towards your chest, keeping your feet off the ground; Engaging your abs, lift your hips off the ground, bringing your knees towards your head; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Bend your knees and bring them towards your chest, keeping your feet off the ground.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your hips off the ground, bringing your knees towards your head.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Roller Seated Single Leg Shoulder Flexor Depresor Retractor
exercises.name_vi: Roller Seated Single Leg Shoulder Flexor Depresor Retractor
exercises.description: Bài tập roller seated single leg shoulder flexor depresor retractor. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a flat surface with your legs extended in front of you; Hold the roller with both hands, palms facing down, and place it on your thighs; Lean back slightly and engage your core muscles; Raise the roller up to shoulder level, keeping your arms straight; Slowly lower the roller back down to your thighs
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat surface with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Hold the roller with both hands, palms facing down, and place it on your thighs.
Step:3 Lean back slightly and engage your core muscles.
Step:4 Raise the roller up to shoulder level, keeping your arms straight.
Step:5 Slowly lower the roller back down to your thighs.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Oblique Crunch V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your shoulder blades off the ground, rotating your torso to one side.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then lower your shoulder blades back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing Bent Over One Arm Triceps Extension
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Standing Bent Over One Arm Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing bent over one arm triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand; Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground; Extend your arm straight back, keeping your elbow close to your body; Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight back, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Clock Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập clock push-up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line; Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides; As you lower, rotate your body to the left, extending your left arm straight out to the side; Push back up to the starting position, while rotating your body to the center; Repeat the push-up, this time rotating your body to the right and extending your right arm out to the side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 As you lower, rotate your body to the left, extending your left arm straight out to the side.
Step:4 Push back up to the starting position, while rotating your body to the center.
Step:5 Repeat the push-up, this time rotating your body to the right and extending your right arm out to the side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides with each repetition.

exercises.name: Cable Wide Grip Rear Pulldown Behind Neck
exercises.name_vi: Cable Wide Grip Rear Pulldown Behind Neck
exercises.description: Bài tập cable wide grip rear pulldown behind neck. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable machine so that the pulldown bar is at a height above your head; Sit down on the seat and grab the pulldown bar with a wide overhand grip; Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lean back slightly; Pull the bar down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together; Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the pulldown bar is at a height above your head.
Step:2 Sit down on the seat and grab the pulldown bar with a wide overhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lean back slightly.
Step:4 Pull the bar down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Front Plank With Twist
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:2 Engage your core and glutes to maintain a stable position.
Step:3 Rotate your torso to the right, lifting your right arm and extending it towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Keep your hips and legs stable as you twist.
Step:5 Hold for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the twist on the left side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Rocky Pull-Up Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập rocky pull-up pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Stand in front of a pull-up bar with your feet shoulder-width apart; Reach up and grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight; Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a pull-up bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Reach up and grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:4 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez Barbell Decline Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập ez barbell decline triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and your feet secured; Hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart; Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your head; Lower the barbell slowly towards your forehead, bending your elbows; Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and your feet secured.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:4 Lower the barbell slowly towards your forehead, bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Hip Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập smith hip raise. Cách thực hiện: Position yourself on the smith machine with your back against the pad and your feet shoulder-width apart; Place your hands on the barbell, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Engage your core and glutes, then push through your heels to raise your hips off the ground; Continue lifting until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders; Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Position yourself on the smith machine with your back against the pad and your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands on the barbell, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Engage your core and glutes, then push through your heels to raise your hips off the ground.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:5 Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Pulldown (With Rope Attachment)
exercises.description: Bài tập cable lateral pulldown (with rope attachment). Cách thực hiện: Attach a rope attachment to the cable machine at a high position; Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing each other; Keep your back straight and lean slightly back; Pull the rope down towards your sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope attachment to the cable machine at a high position.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and lean slightly back.
Step:5 Pull the rope down towards your sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the tension and allow the rope to return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: One Leg Squat - Expanded Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập one leg squat - expanded variation. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Extend one leg forward, keeping it off the ground; Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair; Keep your chest up and your back straight; Push through your heel to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one leg forward, keeping it off the ground.
Step:3 Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:4 Keep your chest up and your back straight.
Step:5 Push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat with the other leg. Maintain expanded form throughout.

exercises.name: Standing Pelvic Tilt
exercises.description: Bài tập standing pelvic tilt. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Place your hands on your hips or let them hang by your sides; Engage your core muscles and tilt your pelvis forward, pushing your lower back towards the wall behind you; Hold the position for a few seconds, then release and return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Place your hands on your hips or let them hang by your sides.
Step:3 Engage your core muscles and tilt your pelvis forward, pushing your lower back towards the wall behind you.
Step:4 Hold the position for a few seconds, then release and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Kneeling Crunch - Gentle Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a high pulley and kneel down facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Hold the rope handle with both hands and place it behind your head, keeping your elbows out to the sides.
Step:3 Keeping your hips stationary, flex your waist and crunch your torso down towards your thighs.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position. Maintain gentle form throughout.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Standing Pulldown (With Rope)
exercises.description: Bài tập cable standing pulldown (with rope). Cách thực hiện: Attach a rope to the cable machine at the highest setting; Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing down; Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise; Pull the rope down towards your thighs, squeezing your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Pull the rope down towards your thighs, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the rope back up.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Prone Incline Hammer Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell prone incline hammer curl. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline; Lie face down on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other; Allow your arms to hang straight down towards the floor, keeping your elbows slightly bent; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Allow your arms to hang straight down towards the floor, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Decline Shrug
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell decline shrug. Cách thực hiện: Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle; Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your arms fully extended towards the floor; Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders towards your ears as high as possible; Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your arms fully extended towards the floor.
Step:4 Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders towards your ears as high as possible.
Step:5 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: L-Pull-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập l-pull-up. Cách thực hiện: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang with your arms fully extended and your body straight; Engage your lats and biceps to pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your lats and biceps to pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Over Bench Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell over bench wrist curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your forearms resting on the bench and your palms facing up, holding a dumbbell in each hand; Allow your wrists to hang over the edge of the bench; Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms at the top of the movement; Pause for a moment, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your forearms resting on the bench and your palms facing up, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Allow your wrists to hang over the edge of the bench.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Step-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập band step-up. Cách thực hiện: Place a band around your thighs, just above your knees; Stand facing a step or platform with your feet hip-width apart; Step up onto the platform with your right foot, pushing through your heel; Extend your left leg behind you, keeping it straight; Lower your left foot back down to the ground
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place a band around your thighs, just above your knees.
Step:2 Stand facing a step or platform with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:3 Step up onto the platform with your right foot, pushing through your heel.
Step:4 Extend your left leg behind you, keeping it straight.
Step:5 Lower your left foot back down to the ground.
Step:6 Repeat with your left foot stepping up onto the platform.
Step:7 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Overhand Triceps Dip
exercises.description: Bài tập lever overhand triceps dip. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the machine to the appropriate height and secure your body in position; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your body so that your arms are fully extended; Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms close to your sides; Continue lowering until your upper arms are parallel to the floor; Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your elbows
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to the appropriate height and secure your body in position.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your body so that your arms are fully extended.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms close to your sides.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your elbows.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Hug
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball hug. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold the stability ball with both hands, hugging it close to your chest; Engage your core muscles and slowly lean back, keeping your back straight and your feet planted on the ground; Continue leaning back until you feel a stretch in your back muscles; Hold the position for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold the stability ball with both hands, hugging it close to your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core muscles and slowly lean back, keeping your back straight and your feet planted on the ground.
Step:4 Continue leaning back until you feel a stretch in your back muscles.
Step:5 Hold the position for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Seated Good Morning
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell seated good morning. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a barbell resting on your upper back; Keep your back straight and your chest up; Slowly hinge forward at the hips, lowering your torso towards the ground; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a barbell resting on your upper back.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your chest up.
Step:3 Slowly hinge forward at the hips, lowering your torso towards the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Pelvic Tilt Into Bridge
exercises.description: Bài tập pelvic tilt into bridge. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place your arms by your sides with your palms facing down; Engage your glutes and core muscles; Tilt your pelvis upward, lifting your hips off the ground; Hold the bridge position for a few seconds
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your arms by your sides with your palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Step:4 Tilt your pelvis upward, lifting your hips off the ground.
Step:5 Hold the bridge position for a few seconds.
Step:6 Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Russian Twists (On Stability Ball)
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tạ đơn, thảm tập, bóng Thụy Sĩ. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Lean back slightly while keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Twist your torso to the right, bringing the cable handle towards your right hip.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the cable handle towards your left hip.
Step:6 Continue alternating twists for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez-Bar Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the ez barbell with a close grip, hands shoulder-width apart, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Slowly lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Single Leg Deadlift With Stepbox Support
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Single Leg Deadlift With Stepbox Support
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell single leg deadlift with stepbox support. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a dumbbell in your right hand; Place your left foot on a stepbox or elevated surface behind you; Keeping your back straight and core engaged, hinge forward at the hips, lowering the dumbbell towards the ground; As you lower the dumbbell, simultaneously lift your left leg behind you, maintaining a straight line from head to heel; Lower the dumbbell until you feel a stretch in your right hamstring, then return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a dumbbell in your right hand.
Step:2 Place your left foot on a stepbox or elevated surface behind you.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and core engaged, hinge forward at the hips, lowering the dumbbell towards the ground.
Step:4 As you lower the dumbbell, simultaneously lift your left leg behind you, maintaining a straight line from head to heel.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell until you feel a stretch in your right hamstring, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Cable Incline Bench Row - Elite Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle and attach a cable handle to the low pulley.
Step:2 Sit on the bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip and extend your arms fully in front of you. Perform with elite intensity.
Step:4 Lean forward from your hips while keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the cable handle towards your chest by retracting your shoulder blades and bending your elbows.
Step:6 Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement, then slowly extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Lateral Bent-Over
exercises.description: Bài tập cable one arm lateral bent-over. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing a cable machine; Grasp the handle with one hand and step back to create tension on the cable; Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged; Extend your arm out to the side, parallel to the ground, with a slight bend in your elbow; Slowly bring your arm back to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing a cable machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with one hand and step back to create tension on the cable.
Step:3 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Extend your arm out to the side, parallel to the ground, with a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:5 Slowly bring your arm back to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Front Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell front squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out; Hold the kettlebell with both hands in front of your chest, close to your body; Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips down and back, as if sitting into a chair; Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go; Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the kettlebell with both hands in front of your chest, close to your body.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips down and back, as if sitting into a chair.
Step:4 Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Concentration Extension (On Knee)
exercises.description: Bài tập cable concentration extension (on knee). Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench or chair with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Hold the cable handle with your right hand and place your elbow on the inside of your right knee; Extend your arm fully, keeping your elbow stationary and close to your knee; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your right hand and place your elbow on the inside of your right knee.
Step:3 Extend your arm fully, keeping your elbow stationary and close to your knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Medicine Ball Chest Push From 3 Point Stance
exercises.name_vi: Medicine Ball Chest Push From 3 Point Stance
exercises.description: Bài tập medicine ball chest push from 3 point stance. Cách thực hiện: Start in a 3 point stance with one hand on the medicine ball and the other hand on the ground; Extend your legs and position your body in a straight line; Lower your chest towards the ground while keeping your back straight; Push the medicine ball away from your body, extending your arm fully; Return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a 3 point stance with one hand on the medicine ball and the other hand on the ground.
Step:2 Extend your legs and position your body in a straight line.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the ground while keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Push the medicine ball away from your body, extending your arm fully.
Step:5 Return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Standing Bradford Press
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell standing bradford press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell in front of your shoulders with an overhand grip; Press the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms; Lower the barbell back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell in front of your shoulders with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Press the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Seated Glute Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập seated glute stretch. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you; Bend your right knee and cross your right ankle over your left thigh; Place your right hand on the ground behind you for support; With your left hand, gently press down on your right knee to deepen the stretch; Hold the stretch for 30 seconds to 1 minute
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your right knee and cross your right ankle over your left thigh.
Step:3 Place your right hand on the ground behind you for support.
Step:4 With your left hand, gently press down on your right knee to deepen the stretch.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 30 seconds to 1 minute.
Step:6 Switch sides and repeat.

exercises.name: Posterior Tibialis Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập posterior tibialis stretch. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you; Loop the rope around the ball of your foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands; Gently pull the rope towards you, flexing your foot and stretching your calf muscles; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds; Release the tension on the rope and relax your foot
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Loop the rope around the ball of your foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands.
Step:3 Gently pull the rope towards you, flexing your foot and stretching your calf muscles.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Release the tension on the rope and relax your foot.
Step:6 Repeat the stretch on the other leg.

exercises.name: World Greatest Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập world greatest stretch. Cách thực hiện: Start in a lunge position with your right foot forward and your left foot back; Place your hands on the ground on either side of your right foot; Lower your left knee to the ground and extend your right leg, keeping your right foot flat on the ground; Rotate your torso to the right, reaching your right arm up towards the ceiling; Hold this position for a few seconds, then return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a lunge position with your right foot forward and your left foot back.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground on either side of your right foot.
Step:3 Lower your left knee to the ground and extend your right leg, keeping your right foot flat on the ground.
Step:4 Rotate your torso to the right, reaching your right arm up towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Hold this position for a few seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Switch sides and repeat the stretch with your left foot forward.

exercises.name: Barbell Seated Twist
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell seated twist. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent; Hold a barbell with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent; Engage your core and slowly twist your torso to one side, keeping your back straight; Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly rotate back to the starting position; Repeat the twist to the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly twist your torso to one side, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly rotate back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the twist to the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Snatch Pull
exercises.description: Bài tập snatch pull. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the ground in front of you; Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower into a squat position, gripping the barbell with an overhand grip; Keep your back straight and chest up as you drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees; As the barbell reaches hip level, explosively pull it upwards, shrugging your shoulders and pulling your elbows high and to the sides; As the barbell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it, pulling yourself into a deep squat position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the ground in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower into a squat position, gripping the barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and chest up as you drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees.
Step:4 As the barbell reaches hip level, explosively pull it upwards, shrugging your shoulders and pulling your elbows high and to the sides.
Step:5 As the barbell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it, pulling yourself into a deep squat position.
Step:6 Catch the barbell overhead with your arms fully extended and your knees bent.
Step:7 Stand up by extending your hips and knees, keeping the barbell overhead.
Step:8 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position by reversing the movement.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Shrug
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell shrug. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of you with an overhand grip; Keep your arms straight and your back straight throughout the exercise; Lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible, squeezing your traps at the top; Hold for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of you with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible, squeezing your traps at the top.
Step:4 Hold for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez Barbell Decline Close Grip Face Press
exercises.name_vi: Ez Barbell Decline Close Grip Face Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ez barbell decline close grip face press. Cách thực hiện: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet; Grasp the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing each other; Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body; Lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows; Pause for a moment, then press the barbell back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet.
Step:2 Grasp the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then press the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Full Squat (Back Pov)
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tạ đòn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to lower your body down.
Step:4 Bend at the knees and hips, pushing your hips back and down as if sitting into a chair.
Step:5 Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:6 Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels.
Step:7 Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Targeted Style Single Leg Calf Raise (On A Dumbbell)
exercises.name_vi: Targeted Style Single Leg Calf Raise (On A Dumbbell)
exercises.description: Bài tập targeted style single leg calf raise (on a dumbbell). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand; Lift one foot off the ground and balance on the other foot; Slowly raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles. Emphasize targeted control; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Lift one foot off the ground and balance on the other foot.
Step:3 Slowly raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles. Emphasize targeted control.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.

exercises.name: Sphinx
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the ground with your forearms flat on the floor, elbows directly under your shoulders.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your chest off the ground, keeping your forearms and toes on the floor.
Step:3 Hold this position for a few seconds, making sure to keep your neck in a neutral position.
Step:4 Slowly lower your chest back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Burpee
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and placing your hands on the floor in front of you.
Step:3 Kick your feet back into a push-up position.
Step:4 Perform a push-up, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:5 Jump your feet back into the squat position.
Step:6 Jump up explosively, reaching your arms overhead.
Step:7 Land softly and immediately lower back into a squat position to begin the next repetition.

exercises.name: Band One Arm Twisting Seated Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold the band with one hand and extend your arm fully in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, pull the band towards your body by bending your elbow and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 At the same time, twist your torso towards the side of the pulling arm.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension in the band and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Barbell Incline Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the barbell towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Shoulder Press V. 3
exercises.description: Bài tập lever shoulder press v. 3. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position; Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor; Grasp the handles of the machine with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Push the handles upward and forward until your arms are fully extended, but not locked; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles of the machine with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles upward and forward until your arms are fully extended, but not locked.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Sissy Squat Isolation
exercises.description: Bài tập sissy squat isolation. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing slightly outward; Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed; Slowly lower your body by bending your knees and leaning back, keeping your torso upright; Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or as far as you can comfortably go; Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed.
Step:3 Slowly lower your body by bending your knees and leaning back, keeping your torso upright.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or as far as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Emphasize isolation control.

exercises.name: Lever Chest Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement.
Step:4 Pause briefly at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Reverse Grip Decline Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand; Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Close-Grip Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập band close-grip pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Attach the band to a high anchor point, such as a pull-up bar or sturdy beam; Stand facing the anchor point and grab the band with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart; Step back to create tension in the band, keeping your feet hip-width apart; Engage your core and keep your back straight as you pull the band down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together; Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the band back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a high anchor point, such as a pull-up bar or sturdy beam.
Step:2 Stand facing the anchor point and grab the band with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Step back to create tension in the band, keeping your feet hip-width apart.
Step:4 Engage your core and keep your back straight as you pull the band down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the band back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Seated Overhead Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable seated overhead curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground; Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart; Keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows close to your sides; Exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows close to your sides.
Step:4 Exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Three Bench Dip
exercises.description: Bài tập three bench dip. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward; Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands; Bend your elbows and lower your body until your upper arms are parallel to the ground; Push yourself back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Balance Cable Incline Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập balance cable incline fly. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable machine to a low position and attach the handles; Sit on an incline bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the floor. Perform with balance intensity; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight out in front of you; Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion; Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a low position and attach the handles.
Step:2 Sit on an incline bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the floor. Perform with balance intensity.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập lever lateral raise. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms straight; Exhale and raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor; Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your arms back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms straight.
Step:3 Exhale and raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez Bar Seated Close Grip Concentration Curl
exercises.name_vi: Ez Bar Seated Close Grip Concentration Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập ez bar seated close grip concentration curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold an EZ barbell with an underhand grip; Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee; Curl the barbell up towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary; Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold an EZ barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 Curl the barbell up towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lateral raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body; Keep your back straight and engage your core; Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Straight Arm Pulldown (With Rope)
exercises.description: Bài tập cable straight arm pulldown (with rope). Cách thực hiện: Attach a rope to the cable machine at the highest setting; Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing down; Extend your arms fully in front of you, keeping your elbows slightly bent; Engage your lats and slowly pull the rope down towards your thighs, keeping your arms straight
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
