Step:3 Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing down.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully in front of you, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Engage your lats and slowly pull the rope down towards your thighs, keeping your arms straight.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Knee Touch Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your shoulder blades off the ground and reach your right hand towards your left knee.
Step:4 Return to the starting position and repeat, this time reaching your left hand towards your right knee.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing One Arm Reverse Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tạ đòn, tạ đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arm fully extended and close to your body, with your palm facing down.
Step:3 Slowly curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Cable Pushdown (With Rope Attachment)
exercises.description: Bài tập cable pushdown (with rope attachment). Cách thực hiện: Attach a rope attachment to a high pulley on a cable machine; Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees; Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing each other; Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise; Exhale and push the rope downward by extending your elbows until your arms are fully extended
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope attachment to a high pulley on a cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Exhale and push the rope downward by extending your elbows until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position by allowing your elbows to flex.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Reverse Grip Incline Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Chin-Up Diagonal
exercises.description: Bài tập chin-up diagonal. Cách thực hiện: Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart; Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar; (diagonal variation) Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:3 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:4 (diagonal variation) Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Decline Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand and extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Triple Style Sled One Leg Calf Press On Leg Press
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the sled.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the sled, shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the sled, keeping your heels off.
Step:4 Push the sled forward by extending your ankles, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the sled back down by flexing your ankles.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Perform with triple intensity.

exercises.name: Cable Drag Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable drag curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps; Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Standing Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell standing overhead triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip; Raise the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms; Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows; Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by extending your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Raise the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Sumo Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập smith sumo squat. Cách thực hiện: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at hip height; Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards; Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper back and shoulders; Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees; Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at hip height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards.
Step:3 Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper back and shoulders.
Step:4 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:5 Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Jump Rope
exercises.description: Bài tập jump rope. Cách thực hiện: Hold the handles of the jump rope with your hands, palms facing inward; Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent; Swing the rope over your head and jump over it as it comes towards your feet; Land softly on the balls of your feet and repeat the jump as the rope comes around again; Continue jumping for the desired duration or number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hold the handles of the jump rope with your hands, palms facing inward.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Swing the rope over your head and jump over it as it comes towards your feet.
Step:4 Land softly on the balls of your feet and repeat the jump as the rope comes around again.
Step:5 Continue jumping for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Reverse Fly (With Support)
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Reverse Fly (With Support)
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm reverse fly (with support). Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing inwards; Lean forward and place your free hand on the bench for support; Keep your arm slightly bent and raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing inwards.
Step:3 Lean forward and place your free hand on the bench for support.
Step:4 Keep your arm slightly bent and raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Weighted Front Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted front raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs; Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the dumbbells in front of you until they are at shoulder level; Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs.
Step:2 Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the dumbbells in front of you until they are at shoulder level.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Revers Grip Biceps Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell revers grip biceps curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down and arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps; Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Self Assisted Inverse Leg Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a leg curl machine with your legs extended and your ankles hooked under the padded lever.
Step:2 Place your hands on the side handles of the machine for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs upward as far as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings.
Step:5 Slowly lower your legs back to the starting position while inhaling.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Hip Lift
exercises.description: Bài tập band hip lift. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place a resistance band just above your knees; Engage your glutes and core muscles; Press your heels into the ground and lift your hips off the floor, squeezing your glutes at the top; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place a resistance band just above your knees.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Step:4 Press your heels into the ground and lift your hips off the floor, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: High Knee Against Wall
exercises.description: Bài tập high knee against wall. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart; Place your hands on the wall for support; Engage your core and lift your right knee up towards your chest, while keeping your left foot on the ground; Quickly switch legs, bringing your left knee up towards your chest and lowering your right foot back down; Continue alternating legs in a running motion, bringing your knees up as high as possible
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands on the wall for support.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your right knee up towards your chest, while keeping your left foot on the ground.
Step:4 Quickly switch legs, bringing your left knee up towards your chest and lowering your right foot back down.
Step:5 Continue alternating legs in a running motion, bringing your knees up as high as possible.
Step:6 Maintain a fast pace and keep your upper body stable throughout the exercise.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Reverse Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell reverse fly. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight; Extend your arms straight down in front of you, palms facing each other; Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight down in front of you, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Lying Close-Grip Press
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell lying close-grip press. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench; Grasp the barbell with a close grip, hands shoulder-width apart, palms facing towards your feet; Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended; Slowly lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body; Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest, then push it back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, hands shoulder-width apart, palms facing towards your feet.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Slowly lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest, then push it back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Squat (On Knees) With Pure
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell squat (on knees) with pure. Cách thực hiện: Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your toes pointing forward; Place a barbell across your shoulders, gripping it with an overhand grip and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you slowly lower your body down by bending your knees, keeping your back straight. Perform with pure intensity; Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Place a barbell across your shoulders, gripping it with an overhand grip and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you slowly lower your body down by bending your knees, keeping your back straight. Perform with pure intensity.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Contralateral Forward Lunge
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell contralateral forward lunge. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand; Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your back straight and core engaged; Lower your body by bending both knees until your right thigh is parallel to the ground; Push through your right heel to return to the starting position; Repeat with your left leg
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending both knees until your right thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg.
Step:6 Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Reverse Grip Machine Lat Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập reverse grip machine lat pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground; Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back; Pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together; Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Shrug
exercises.description: Bài tập cable shrug. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip and let your arms hang down in front of you; Keeping your arms straight, shrug your shoulders up towards your ears; Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip and let your arms hang down in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, shrug your shoulders up towards your ears.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập cable deadlift. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Bend at the hips and knees, lowering your torso until your back is parallel to the ground; Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your shoulders back; Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift the cable handles, extending your hips and standing up straight; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handles back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend at the hips and knees, lowering your torso until your back is parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your shoulders back.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift the cable handles, extending your hips and standing up straight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handles back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Scissor Jumps (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập scissor jumps (male). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Jump off the ground and simultaneously cross your right leg in front of your left leg; As you land, quickly switch legs, crossing your left leg in front of your right leg; Continue alternating legs and jumping as quickly as possible; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Jump off the ground and simultaneously cross your right leg in front of your left leg.
Step:3 As you land, quickly switch legs, crossing your left leg in front of your right leg.
Step:4 Continue alternating legs and jumping as quickly as possible.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable one arm preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height; Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip and position your upper arm against the preacher curl pad; Keep your back straight and your core engaged; Slowly curl the cable handle towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm against the pad
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip and position your upper arm against the preacher curl pad.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Slowly curl the cable handle towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm against the pad.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:9 Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Bent Over Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handle with one hand, palm facing inward, and extend your arm fully.
Step:4 Pull the cable handle towards your body, keeping your elbow close to your side, until your hand reaches your lower chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly extend your arm back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Rear Delt Row_Shoulder
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:3 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:5 Raise the dumbbells out to the sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Narrow Stance Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you slowly lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing One Arm Curl Over Incline Bench
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Standing One Arm Curl Over Incline Bench
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing one arm curl over incline bench. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand; Place your other hand on an incline bench for support; Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Place your other hand on an incline bench for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Barbell Lying Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell lying extension. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench; Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest; Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows; Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Kickback
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated kickback. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand; Bend your knees slightly and lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight; Bring your upper arms close to your sides and keep your elbows bent at a 90-degree angle; Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement; Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Bring your upper arms close to your sides and keep your elbows bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Bent Arm Pullover - Powerful Variation
exercises.name_vi: Barbell Bent Arm Pullover - Powerful Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell bent arm pullover - powerful variation. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor; Hold a barbell with a shoulder-width grip and extend your arms straight above your chest; Lower the barbell behind your head while keeping your arms slightly bent; Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Focus on powerful movement
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with a shoulder-width grip and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the barbell behind your head while keeping your arms slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Focus on powerful movement.

exercises.name: Quarter Sit-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập quarter sit-up. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards; Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Elbow Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying elbow press. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up over your chest; Lower the dumbbells towards your shoulders by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then press the dumbbells back up to the starting position by extending your elbows; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up over your chest.
Step:2 Lower the dumbbells towards your shoulders by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then press the dumbbells back up to the starting position by extending your elbows.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Reverse Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tạ đòn, tạ đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Arnold Press V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell arnold press v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent; Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward; Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms end up facing forward at the top of the movement; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent.
Step:2 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms end up facing forward at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Incline Push Up Depth Jump With Complex
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Find an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, and place your hands shoulder-width apart on the edge.
Step:2 Step your feet back, keeping your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the edge of the surface, bending your elbows and keeping your body aligned. Maintain complex form throughout.
Step:4 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Jump off the edge of the surface, landing softly with your knees slightly bent.
Step:6 Repeat the push-up and depth jump for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Modified Hindu Push-Up (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập modified hindu push-up (male). Cách thực hiện: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet hip-width apart; Lower your body towards the ground, bending your elbows and keeping your core engaged; As you lower your body, shift your weight back and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, creating an inverted V shape with your body; Continue to lower your body until your chest is just above the ground, then reverse the movement, pushing your hips back down and extending your arms to return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground, bending your elbows and keeping your core engaged.
Step:3 As you lower your body, shift your weight back and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, creating an inverted V shape with your body.
Step:4 Continue to lower your body until your chest is just above the ground, then reverse the movement, pushing your hips back down and extending your arms to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Reverse Preacher Curl Inclined
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell reverse preacher curl inclined. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arms extended straight down, holding a barbell with an overhand grip; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell upward while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level. Perform with inclined intensity; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps; Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arms extended straight down, holding a barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell upward while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level. Perform with inclined intensity.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Posterior Step To Overhead Reach
exercises.description: Bài tập posterior step to overhead reach. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and your arms by your sides; Take a step back with your right foot, landing on the ball of your foot; Bend your left knee and lower your body into a lunge position; As you lower into the lunge, simultaneously reach your arms overhead; Pause for a moment at the bottom of the lunge, then return to the starting position by pushing through your left heel and bringing your right foot forward
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Take a step back with your right foot, landing on the ball of your foot.
Step:3 Bend your left knee and lower your body into a lunge position.
Step:4 As you lower into the lunge, simultaneously reach your arms overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the lunge, then return to the starting position by pushing through your left heel and bringing your right foot forward.
Step:6 Repeat the movement on the other side, stepping back with your left foot and bending your right knee.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đơn, ghế nghiêng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Lie back on the bench and press the dumbbells up to the starting position, directly above your chest.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Decline Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the decline bench to the desired angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Speed Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell speed squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out; Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts; Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips back and down, as if sitting into a chair; Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go; Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips back and down, as if sitting into a chair.
Step:4 Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Standing Twisting Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your upper back, crossing it in front of your chest.
Step:2 Hold the ends of the band with your hands, keeping your elbows bent and close to your sides.
Step:3 Engage your abs and twist your torso to one side, bringing your elbow towards the opposite knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Incline Leg Hip Raise (Leg Straight)
exercises.description: Bài tập incline leg hip raise (leg straight). Cách thực hiện: Lie on an incline bench with your back flat against the bench and your legs extended straight out in front of you; Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support; Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the bench, raising them as high as you can while keeping them straight; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on an incline bench with your back flat against the bench and your legs extended straight out in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the bench, raising them as high as you can while keeping them straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Seated Crunch V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the pad and your feet secured under the footpads.
Step:2 Place your hands on the handles or the sides of the seat for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your abs.
Step:5 Slowly return to the starting position, allowing your back to round slightly.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Landmine Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập landmine lateral raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent; Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on the front of your shoulders; Keeping your core engaged and back straight, lift the barbell up and away from your body, raising it to shoulder height; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on the front of your shoulders.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged and back straight, lift the barbell up and away from your body, raising it to shoulder height.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Alternating Arm Ups
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball alternating arm ups. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms extended down by your sides; Engage your core and slowly lift one arm up towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow slightly bent; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position; Repeat the movement with the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms extended down by your sides.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift one arm up towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Reverse Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable reverse wrist curl. Cách thực hiện: Attach a cable to a low pulley and sit on a bench facing the cable machine; Grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down; Rest your forearms on your thighs, with your wrists hanging off the edge; Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible; Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a cable to a low pulley and sit on a bench facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Rest your forearms on your thighs, with your wrists hanging off the edge.
Step:4 Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Bar Lateral Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập cable bar lateral pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable pulley to a high position and attach a straight bar; Sit facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent; Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back; Pull the bar down towards your chest, leading with your elbows and squeezing your shoulder blades together
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable pulley to a high position and attach a straight bar.
Step:2 Sit facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:5 Pull the bar down towards your chest, leading with your elbows and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Kneeling Rear Delt Row (With Rope) (Male) Expanded
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a low cable pulley and kneel down facing the machine.
Step:2 (expanded variation) Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and extend your arms fully in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and core engaged, pull the rope towards your body by retracting your shoulder blades.
Step:4 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement and hold for a brief pause.
Step:5 Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Decline Sit-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted decline sit-up. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a decline bench with your feet secured under the foot pads; Place your hands behind your head or across your chest; Engage your abs and slowly lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward until your torso is perpendicular to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a decline bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward until your torso is perpendicular to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Reverse Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập band reverse wrist curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground; Hold the band with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and wrap it around your fingers; Rest your forearms on your thighs, with your wrists hanging off the edge; Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the band with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and wrap it around your fingers.
Step:3 Rest your forearms on your thighs, with your wrists hanging off the edge.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ring Dips
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from the rings with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your shoulders are below your elbows.
Step:3 Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Bent Over Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips while keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Pull the barbell towards your lower chest by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Shoulder Press (Parallel Grip)
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated shoulder press (parallel grip). Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inward; Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward; Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inward.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Peacher Hammer Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell peacher hammer curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso; Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward; This will be your starting position; Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kneeling Lat Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập kneeling lat stretch. Cách thực hiện: Kneel on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your toes pointing back; Extend your arms overhead and interlace your fingers; Keeping your back straight, slowly lean to the right side, feeling a stretch in your left lat muscle; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then return to the starting position; Repeat the stretch on the left side, leaning to the left and feeling a stretch in your right lat muscle
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Kneel on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your toes pointing back.
Step:2 Extend your arms overhead and interlace your fingers.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, slowly lean to the right side, feeling a stretch in your left lat muscle.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the stretch on the left side, leaning to the left and feeling a stretch in your right lat muscle.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Biceps Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline biceps curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps; Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Assisted Standing Pull-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted standing pull-up. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height settings; Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Engage your lats and biceps, and pull yourself up towards the handles; Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your back muscles
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height settings.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Engage your lats and biceps, and pull yourself up towards the handles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your back muscles.
Step:6 Slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Fierce Weighted Straight Bar Dip
exercises.description: Bài tập fierce weighted straight bar dip. Cách thực hiện: Position yourself between parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight; Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms; (fierce variation) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Position yourself between parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 (fierce variation) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Squat Row (With Rope Attachment)
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine at waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:4 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, with your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Engage your core and pull the rope towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Keep your elbows close to your body and continue pulling until your hands reach your chest.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the rope and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Incline Push-Up (On Box)
exercises.description: Bài tập incline push-up (on box). Cách thực hiện: Place your hands on the edge of a box or elevated surface, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels; Lower your chest towards the box by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place your hands on the edge of a box or elevated surface, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the box by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Thruster
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell thruster. Cách thực hiện: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell at shoulder height with an overhand grip; Lower into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back; As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your heels to stand up, simultaneously pressing the barbell overhead; Lower the barbell back to shoulder height as you lower back into the squat position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell at shoulder height with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Lower into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your heels to stand up, simultaneously pressing the barbell overhead.
Step:4 Lower the barbell back to shoulder height as you lower back into the squat position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Gripless Shrug
exercises.description: Bài tập lever gripless shrug. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine; Grasp the handles with your palms facing inwards and your arms fully extended; Keeping your back straight, exhale and elevate your shoulders as high as possible; Hold the contraction for a brief moment, then inhale and slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with your palms facing inwards and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, exhale and elevate your shoulders as high as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a brief moment, then inhale and slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Astride Jumps (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập astride jumps (male). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position; Jump explosively upwards, extending your legs and arms; While in the air, spread your legs apart and bring your arms out to the sides; Land softly with your feet shoulder-width apart, bending your knees to absorb the impact
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position.
Step:3 Jump explosively upwards, extending your legs and arms.
Step:4 While in the air, spread your legs apart and bring your arms out to the sides.
Step:5 Land softly with your feet shoulder-width apart, bending your knees to absorb the impact.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Standing Wide Grip Biceps Curl
exercises.name_vi: Barbell Standing Wide Grip Biceps Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell standing wide grip biceps curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart; Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso; Exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms stationary; Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps; Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: One Arm Dip
exercises.description: Bài tập one arm dip. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing away from a bench or chair, with your feet shoulder-width apart; Place one hand on the bench or chair behind you, fingers pointing towards your body; Extend your legs out in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground; Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench or chair; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing away from a bench or chair, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place one hand on the bench or chair behind you, fingers pointing towards your body.
Step:3 Extend your legs out in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground.
Step:4 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench or chair.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat with the other arm.

exercises.name: Flexible Assisted Prone Hamstring
exercises.description: Bài tập flexible assisted prone hamstring. Cách thực hiện: Lie face down on a mat or bench with your legs fully extended; (flexible variation) Have a partner or use a resistance band to secure your ankles; Engage your hamstrings and lift your legs towards your glutes, keeping your knees straight; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a mat or bench with your legs fully extended.
Step:2 (flexible variation) Have a partner or use a resistance band to secure your ankles.
Step:3 Engage your hamstrings and lift your legs towards your glutes, keeping your knees straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Straight Bar Dip
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted straight bar dip. Cách thực hiện: Position yourself between parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight; Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Position yourself between parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Chair Leg Extended Stretch With Modified
exercises.name_vi: Chair Leg Extended Stretch With Modified
exercises.description: Bài tập chair leg extended stretch with modified. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the edge of a chair with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Extend one leg straight out in front of you, keeping your heel on the ground; Lean forward slightly, feeling a stretch in your quadriceps; Hold this position for 20-30 seconds. Focus on modified movement; Switch legs and repeat the stretch
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a chair with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Extend one leg straight out in front of you, keeping your heel on the ground.
Step:3 Lean forward slightly, feeling a stretch in your quadriceps.
Step:4 Hold this position for 20-30 seconds. Focus on modified movement.
Step:5 Switch legs and repeat the stretch.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Standing Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm standing curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing forward and arm fully extended; Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight upward while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps; Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing forward and arm fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight upward while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Frog Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Standing One Leg Calf Raise
exercises.name_vi: Cable Standing One Leg Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập cable standing one leg calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Hold onto the cable machine for support; Lift one leg off the ground and balance on the other leg; Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold onto the cable machine for support.
Step:3 Lift one leg off the ground and balance on the other leg.
Step:4 Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.name: Lever One Arm Bent Over Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your head up.
Step:3 Let the barbell hang in front of you with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Pull the barbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement.
Step:6 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Twist (Up-Down)
exercises.description: Bài tập cable twist (up-down). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine; Hold the cable handle with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your arms slightly bent; Engage your core and slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips and legs stable; Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat the rotation to the opposite side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your arms slightly bent.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips and legs stable.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the rotation to the opposite side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Upright Row V. 3
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged and back straight, exhale as you lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Inverted Style Inverse Leg Curl (On Pull-Up Cable Machine)
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the ankle straps are at the lowest setting.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your legs extended and the ankle straps attached to your feet.
Step:3 Hold onto the handles of the bench for stability.
Step:4 Bend your knees and curl your legs towards your glutes, squeezing your hamstrings.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Maintain inverted form throughout.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Femoral
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying femoral. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and a dumbbell resting on your lower abdomen; Bend your knees and bring the dumbbell towards your glutes, keeping your feet flat on the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and a dumbbell resting on your lower abdomen.
Step:2 Bend your knees and bring the dumbbell towards your glutes, keeping your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Single Leg Calf Raise (On A Dumbbell)
exercises.name_vi: Single Leg Calf Raise (On A Dumbbell)
exercises.description: Bài tập single leg calf raise (on a dumbbell). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand; Lift one foot off the ground and balance on the other foot; Slowly raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Lift one foot off the ground and balance on the other foot.
Step:3 Slowly raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.

exercises.name: Back And Forth Step
exercises.description: Bài tập back and forth step. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Step forward with your right foot, bending your knee and lowering your body into a lunge position; Push off with your right foot and step back to the starting position; Repeat the movement with your left foot, alternating legs with each step; Continue stepping back and forth, maintaining a steady pace
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Step forward with your right foot, bending your knee and lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Push off with your right foot and step back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat the movement with your left foot, alternating legs with each step.
Step:5 Continue stepping back and forth, maintaining a steady pace.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez Barbell Anti Gravity Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ez barbell anti gravity press.
