Cách thực hiện: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and holding the ez barbell with an overhand grip; Raise the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent and your palms facing forward; Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully; Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and holding the ez barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Raise the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent and your palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbells Seated Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbells seated triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in both hands with an overhand grip, and raise it above your head; Bend your elbows and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears; Extend your arms and raise the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in both hands with an overhand grip, and raise it above your head.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears.
Step:4 Extend your arms and raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Push Press
exercises.description: Bài tập vai với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and dip your body down, then explosively extend your legs and press the dumbbells overhead.
Step:3 Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, then lower the dumbbells back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Pullover On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell pullover on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball and hold a dumbbell with both hands above your chest, arms extended; Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arms straight; Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball and hold a dumbbell with both hands above your chest, arms extended.
Step:2 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arms straight.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Wide-Grip Chest Dip On High Parallel Bars - Low Variation
exercises.name_vi: Wide-Grip Chest Dip On High Parallel Bars - Low Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập wide-grip chest dip on high parallel bars - low variation. Cách thực hiện: Position yourself on the parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body suspended in the air; Lean forward slightly and lower your body by bending your elbows until your chest is just above the bars; (low variation) Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Position yourself on the parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body suspended in the air.
Step:2 Lean forward slightly and lower your body by bending your elbows until your chest is just above the bars.
Step:3 (low variation) Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Triceps Press
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với ghế tập, tạ đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your upper arms close to your sides.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Side Lying One Hand Raise
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Side Lying One Hand Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell side lying one hand raise. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by your arm; Hold a dumbbell in your top hand with your palm facing down; Keeping your arm straight, raise the dumbbell up to shoulder height; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by your arm.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in your top hand with your palm facing down.
Step:3 Keeping your arm straight, raise the dumbbell up to shoulder height.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Cable Seated Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, keeping your back straight and your shoulders relaxed.
Step:3 Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever T-Bar Reverse Grip Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:4 Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Low Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập cable low fly. Cách thực hiện: Attach the handles to the low pulleys of a cable machine and select an appropriate weight; Stand in the middle of the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows; Maintaining control, slowly bring your arms forward in a sweeping motion, crossing them in front of your body; Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, feeling the stretch in your chest muscles
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the handles to the low pulleys of a cable machine and select an appropriate weight.
Step:2 Stand in the middle of the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Maintaining control, slowly bring your arms forward in a sweeping motion, crossing them in front of your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, feeling the stretch in your chest muscles.
Step:6 Reverse the motion and slowly return your arms to the starting position, keeping tension on your chest muscles throughout.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Standing Shoulder External Rotation
exercises.description: Bài tập cable standing shoulder external rotation. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Hold the cable handle with your arm extended in front of you, parallel to the ground; Keep your elbow slightly bent and your shoulder blades pulled back; Slowly rotate your arm outward, away from your body, while keeping your elbow in the same position; Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your arm extended in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Keep your elbow slightly bent and your shoulder blades pulled back.
Step:4 Slowly rotate your arm outward, away from your body, while keeping your elbow in the same position.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted One Hand Pull Up
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted one hand pull up. Cách thực hiện: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended and your body straight; Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar; Lower your body back down to the starting position with control
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated One Leg Calf Raise - Hammer Grip
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Seated One Leg Calf Raise - Hammer Grip
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated one leg calf raise - hammer grip. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your thighs; Place one foot on a raised surface, such as a step or block, with your heel hanging off the edge; Hold the dumbbell with a hammer grip, meaning your palms are facing each other and your fingers are wrapped around the handle; Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, slowly raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Place one foot on a raised surface, such as a step or block, with your heel hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell with a hammer grip, meaning your palms are facing each other and your fingers are wrapped around the handle.
Step:4 Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, slowly raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball On The Wall Calf Raise (Tennis Ball Between Ankles)
exercises.name_vi: Exercise Ball On The Wall Calf Raise (Tennis Ball Between Ankles)
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball on the wall calf raise (tennis ball between ankles). Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart; Place an exercise ball between the wall and your lower back; Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides; Place a tennis ball between your ankles; Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place an exercise ball between the wall and your lower back.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides.
Step:4 Place a tennis ball between your ankles.
Step:5 Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Hammer Curl On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Hammer Curl On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell hammer curl on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Alternate Hammer Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell alternate hammer preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms fully extended; Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps; Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Russian Twist
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tạ đơn, thảm tập, bóng Thụy Sĩ. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your knees bent and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a weight or medicine ball with both hands in front of your chest.
Step:3 Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Slowly twist your torso to the right, bringing the weight or medicine ball towards the floor on your right side.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the weight or medicine ball towards the floor on your left side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Macro Style Weighted One Hand Pull Up
exercises.name_vi: Macro Style Weighted One Hand Pull Up
exercises.description: Bài tập macro style weighted one hand pull up. Cách thực hiện: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended and your body straight. Perform with macro intensity; Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar; Lower your body back down to the starting position with control
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended and your body straight. Perform with macro intensity.
Step:3 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Curl-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập curl-up. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards; Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Sled Lying Calf Press
exercises.description: Bài tập sled lying calf press. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight; Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the platform; Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the edge of the platform, with your heels hanging off; Push the platform away from you by extending your ankles, keeping your knees slightly bent; Continue pushing until your calves are fully contracted
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the platform.
Step:3 Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the edge of the platform, with your heels hanging off.
Step:4 Push the platform away from you by extending your ankles, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Step:5 Continue pushing until your calves are fully contracted.
Step:6 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower the platform back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Kneeling Rear Delt Row (With Rope) (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a low cable pulley and kneel down facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and extend your arms fully in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and core engaged, pull the rope towards your body by retracting your shoulder blades.
Step:4 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement and hold for a brief pause.
Step:5 Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Chin-Ups (Narrow Parallel Grip)
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with a narrow parallel grip, palms facing towards you.
Step:2 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Vertical Pallof Press
exercises.description: Bài tập band vertical pallof press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and wrap the band around a sturdy object at chest height; Hold the band with both hands and step away from the anchor point, creating tension in the band; Position yourself perpendicular to the anchor point, with your side facing the band; Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping your hands at chest height; Engage your core and press the band away from your chest, fully extending your arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and wrap the band around a sturdy object at chest height.
Step:2 Hold the band with both hands and step away from the anchor point, creating tension in the band.
Step:3 Position yourself perpendicular to the anchor point, with your side facing the band.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping your hands at chest height.
Step:5 Engage your core and press the band away from your chest, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Hold the position for a few seconds, then slowly bring the band back towards your chest.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Barbell Sitted Alternate Leg Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a barbell across your thighs.
Step:2 Keeping your legs straight, lift one leg up as high as possible while keeping the other leg on the ground.
Step:3 Lower the raised leg back down and repeat with the other leg.
Step:4 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez Bar Reverse Grip Bent Over Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up, until your torso is almost parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pull the ez barbell towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the ez barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell One Arm Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Pull the kettlebell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat with the other arm.

exercises.name: Back Lever
exercises.description: Bài tập back lever. Cách thực hiện: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back; Bend your knees and tuck them towards your chest; Slowly lift your legs up, keeping them straight, until your body is parallel to the ground; Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back.
Step:3 Bend your knees and tuck them towards your chest.
Step:4 Slowly lift your legs up, keeping them straight, until your body is parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Triceps Pushdown (V-Bar)
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a v-bar attachment to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Engage your triceps and exhale as you push the v-bar down until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your triceps.
Step:7 Inhale as you slowly return the v-bar to the starting position, maintaining control.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Alternate Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập cable alternate triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Hold the cable handle with your right hand and bring your arm up so that your upper arm is parallel to the ground and your elbow is bent at a 90-degree angle; Keep your upper arm stationary and extend your forearm backward, fully straightening your arm; Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat with your left arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your right hand and bring your arm up so that your upper arm is parallel to the ground and your elbow is bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Keep your upper arm stationary and extend your forearm backward, fully straightening your arm.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Incline Scapula Push Up
exercises.description: Bài tập incline scapula push up. Cách thực hiện: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle; Place your hands on the bench slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Position your feet on the ground, hip-width apart; Lower your chest towards the bench, keeping your elbows tucked in; As you lower, retract your shoulder blades, squeezing your scapulae together
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your hands on the bench slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Position your feet on the ground, hip-width apart.
Step:4 Lower your chest towards the bench, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 As you lower, retract your shoulder blades, squeezing your scapulae together.
Step:6 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Hanging Pike With Intense
exercises.description: Bài tập hanging pike with intense. Cách thực hiện: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you; Engage your core and lift your legs up towards the bar, keeping them straight; (intense variation) Continue lifting until your body forms a 'V' shape, with your legs parallel to the ground; Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up towards the bar, keeping them straight.
Step:3 (intense variation) Continue lifting until your body forms a 'V' shape, with your legs parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Single Leg Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell single leg deadlift. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip; Shift your weight onto your left foot and lift your right foot slightly off the ground; Hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your right leg extended behind you for balance; Lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body and your left leg slightly bent; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your torso back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Shift your weight onto your left foot and lift your right foot slightly off the ground.
Step:3 Hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your right leg extended behind you for balance.
Step:4 Lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body and your left leg slightly bent.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your torso back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Sled Closer Hack Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập sled closer hack squat. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight and position yourself with your back against the pad; Place your feet shoulder-width apart on the platform, toes slightly pointed outwards; Grip the handles on the sides of the machine for stability; Engage your core and slowly lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight; Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight and position yourself with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Place your feet shoulder-width apart on the platform, toes slightly pointed outwards.
Step:3 Grip the handles on the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Engage your core and slowly lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to extend your legs and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Overhead Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with a wide grip, positioning it overhead with your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your chest up and knees tracking over your toes.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Step-Up Lunge
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell step-up lunge. Cách thực hiện: Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your sides; Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is on the surface; Push through your right heel and lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left foot up as well; Once both feet are on the step, lower your left foot back down to the starting position, keeping your right foot on the step; Repeat the movement, alternating which foot you step up with each time
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your sides.
Step:2 Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is on the surface.
Step:3 Push through your right heel and lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left foot up as well.
Step:4 Once both feet are on the step, lower your left foot back down to the starting position, keeping your right foot on the step.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, alternating which foot you step up with each time.
Step:6 Continue for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Single Leg Split Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell single leg split squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back; Take a large step forward with one leg, keeping your torso upright; Lower your body by bending your front knee and hip, while keeping your back leg straight; Continue lowering until your front thigh is parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Take a large step forward with one leg, keeping your torso upright.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your front knee and hip, while keeping your back leg straight.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your front thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Alternate Front Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated alternate front raise. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and arms extended down by your sides; Keeping your arms straight, raise one dumbbell in front of you until it is parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position; Repeat with the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and arms extended down by your sides.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, raise one dumbbell in front of you until it is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:6 Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing Alternating Tricep Kickback
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing alternating tricep kickback. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight; Extend your arms straight back, keeping your elbows close to your body; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position; Repeat with the other arm, alternating sides with each repetition
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight back, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm, alternating sides with each repetition.

exercises.name: Glute Bridge March
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:3 While keeping your hips lifted, lift one foot off the ground and bring your knee towards your chest.
Step:4 Lower your foot back to the ground and repeat the movement with the other leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating legs in a marching motion while maintaining the bridge position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Close Grip Chin-Up On Dip Cage
exercises.name_vi: Weighted Close Grip Chin-Up On Dip Cage
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted close grip chin-up on dip cage. Cách thực hiện: Stand in front of the dip cage and grab the parallel bars with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart; Hang from the bars with your arms fully extended, feet off the ground, and body straight; Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bars, keeping your elbows close to your sides; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bars, then pause for a moment; Slowly lower your body back down to the starting position, fully extending your arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand in front of the dip cage and grab the parallel bars with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bars with your arms fully extended, feet off the ground, and body straight.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bars, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bars, then pause for a moment.
Step:5 Slowly lower your body back down to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Incline Press
exercises.description: Bài tập cable one arm incline press. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position; Sit on an incline bench facing away from the cable machine; Grasp the handle with one hand and bring it up to shoulder height; Position your feet firmly on the ground and maintain a stable position; Press the handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position.
Step:2 Sit on an incline bench facing away from the cable machine.
Step:3 Grasp the handle with one hand and bring it up to shoulder height.
Step:4 Position your feet firmly on the ground and maintain a stable position.
Step:5 Press the handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handle back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Single Leg Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell single leg deadlift. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a dumbbell in your right hand; Shift your weight onto your left leg and lift your right foot slightly off the ground; Keeping your back straight, hinge forward at the hips and lower the dumbbell towards the ground; At the same time, extend your right leg straight behind you, maintaining a slight bend in your left knee; Lower the dumbbell until your torso and right leg are parallel to the ground
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a dumbbell in your right hand.
Step:2 Shift your weight onto your left leg and lift your right foot slightly off the ground.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, hinge forward at the hips and lower the dumbbell towards the ground.
Step:4 At the same time, extend your right leg straight behind you, maintaining a slight bend in your left knee.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell until your torso and right leg are parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Supine Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball supine triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle; Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling; Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your elbows close to your ears; Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:3 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your elbows close to your ears.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: High Style Scapula Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập high style scapula push-up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line; Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body; As you lower, squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your chest forward. Focus on high movement; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 As you lower, squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your chest forward. Focus on high movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Stability Ball Crunch (Full Range Hands Behind Head)
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly curl your upper body forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell High Bar Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell high bar squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out; Place the barbell on your upper back, resting it on your traps; Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to squat down, pushing your hips back and bending your knees; Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go; Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Place the barbell on your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to squat down, pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:4 Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Hammer Curls (With Arm Blaster)
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tạ đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, while holding your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập vai với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball One Legged Diagonal Kick Hamstring Curl
exercises.name_vi: Exercise Ball One Legged Diagonal Kick Hamstring Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball one legged diagonal kick hamstring curl. Cách thực hiện: Start by lying on your back with your legs extended and your heels resting on top of the stability ball; Place your arms by your sides for stability; Engage your glutes and core muscles to lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your shoulders to your heels; Bend your right knee and bring it towards your chest, keeping your left leg extended and your foot flexed; Kick your right leg diagonally across your body, extending it fully and engaging your hamstrings
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back with your legs extended and your heels resting on top of the stability ball.
Step:2 Place your arms by your sides for stability.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles to lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your shoulders to your heels.
Step:4 Bend your right knee and bring it towards your chest, keeping your left leg extended and your foot flexed.
Step:5 Kick your right leg diagonally across your body, extending it fully and engaging your hamstrings.
Step:6 Slowly return your right leg to the starting position, maintaining control and stability.
Step:7 Repeat the movement with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Behind Neck Press
exercises.description: Bài tập smith behind neck press. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder level; Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Lift the bar off the rack and step back, maintaining a stable stance; Lower the bar down to the back of your neck, keeping your elbows pointing forward
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lift the bar off the rack and step back, maintaining a stable stance.
Step:5 Lower the bar down to the back of your neck, keeping your elbows pointing forward.
Step:6 Press the bar up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Decline Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Side Lying Biceps Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập bodyweight side lying biceps curl. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by your arm; Hold your upper arm against your side and bend your elbow to curl your forearm towards your shoulder; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by your arm.
Step:2 Hold your upper arm against your side and bend your elbow to curl your forearm towards your shoulder.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Upper Back Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập upper back stretch. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart; Extend your arms straight in front of you, parallel to the ground; Interlace your fingers and rotate your palms away from your body; Slowly raise your arms overhead, keeping them straight and parallel to each other; As you raise your arms, squeeze your shoulder blades together
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Interlace your fingers and rotate your palms away from your body.
Step:4 Slowly raise your arms overhead, keeping them straight and parallel to each other.
Step:5 As you raise your arms, squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release and repeat.

exercises.name: Sit-Up With Arms On Chest With Mini
exercises.name_vi: Sit-Up With Arms On Chest With Mini
exercises.description: Bài tập sit-up with arms on chest with mini. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Cross your arms over your chest; Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground towards your knees; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Maintain mini form throughout; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Cross your arms over your chest.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Maintain mini form throughout.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying One Arm Deltoid Rear
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Lying One Arm Deltoid Rear
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying one arm deltoid rear. Cách thực hiện: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing inwards; Extend your arm straight down towards the floor, keeping it close to your body; Raise your arm up and back, squeezing your shoulder blade towards your spine; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing inwards.
Step:2 Extend your arm straight down towards the floor, keeping it close to your body.
Step:3 Raise your arm up and back, squeezing your shoulder blade towards your spine.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Alternating Bear Crawl
exercises.description: Bài tập alternating bear crawl. Cách thực hiện: Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips; Lift your knees slightly off the ground, keeping your back flat and your core engaged; Move your right hand and left foot forward simultaneously, followed by your left hand and right foot; Continue crawling forward, alternating your hand and foot movements; Maintain a steady pace and keep your core tight throughout the exercise
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips.
Step:2 Lift your knees slightly off the ground, keeping your back flat and your core engaged.
Step:3 Move your right hand and left foot forward simultaneously, followed by your left hand and right foot.
Step:4 Continue crawling forward, alternating your hand and foot movements.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core tight throughout the exercise.
Step:6 (alternating variation) Continue for the desired distance or time.

exercises.name: Weighted Three Bench Dips
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward, sliding your butt off the bench and supporting your weight with your arms.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your back close to the bench.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Deep Smith Machine Reverse Decline Close Grip Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Focus on deep movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Chair Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập smith chair squat. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to a comfortable position; Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out; Place the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps; Engage your core and keep your chest up as you slowly lower your body by bending your knees and hips; Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:3 Place the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Step:4 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you slowly lower your body by bending your knees and hips.
Step:5 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Curtsey Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập curtsey squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Take a step diagonally behind and across your body with your right foot, crossing it behind your left leg; Bend both knees as if you were curtsying, lowering your body towards the ground; Keep your torso upright and your weight on your front foot; Push through your front foot to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step diagonally behind and across your body with your right foot, crossing it behind your left leg.
Step:3 Bend both knees as if you were curtsying, lowering your body towards the ground.
Step:4 Keep your torso upright and your weight on your front foot.
Step:5 Push through your front foot to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat on the other side, stepping diagonally behind and across your body with your left foot.

exercises.name: Lever Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập lever deadlift. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and foot platform to your desired position; Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the foot platform; Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability; Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and push through your heels to lift the weight up; Keep your back straight and avoid rounding your shoulders
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and foot platform to your desired position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the foot platform.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and push through your heels to lift the weight up.
Step:5 Keep your back straight and avoid rounding your shoulders.
Step:6 Extend your hips fully at the top of the movement, squeezing your glutes.
Step:7 Lower the weight back down in a controlled manner, keeping tension on your glutes and hamstrings.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Biceps Pull-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập biceps pull-up. Cách thực hiện: Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands shoulder-width apart; Engage your core and pull yourself up by bending your elbows, bringing your chest towards the bar; Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull yourself up by bending your elbows, bringing your chest towards the bar.
Step:3 Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Reverse One Arm Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable reverse one arm curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing down; Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing down.
Step:3 Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Concentration Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tạ đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your legs spread apart and a dumbbell in one hand, resting your elbow on the inside of your thigh.
Step:2 Fully extend your arm and hold the dumbbell with an underhand grip.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline one arm fly. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the incline bench to a 30-45 degree angle; Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh; Lie back on the bench, keeping your feet flat on the ground; Hold the dumbbell with your arm extended straight up over your chest; Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the incline bench to a 30-45 degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Step:3 Lie back on the bench, keeping your feet flat on the ground.
Step:4 Hold the dumbbell with your arm extended straight up over your chest.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:6 Pause when your arm is parallel to the ground, then reverse the motion to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Full Planche Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập full planche push-up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a push-up position with your hands placed slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Engage your core and lower your body down towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides; As you lower yourself, lean your body forward and lift your feet off the ground, balancing on your hands; Continue to lower your body until your chest is just above the ground; Push through your hands and extend your arms to lift your body back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands placed slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body down towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 As you lower yourself, lean your body forward and lift your feet off the ground, balancing on your hands.
Step:4 Continue to lower your body until your chest is just above the ground.
Step:5 Push through your hands and extend your arms to lift your body back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Maintain a straight line from your head to your heels throughout the movement.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Horizontal Dumbbell Standing Alternate Overhead Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 (horizontal variation) Press one dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Cossack Squats (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tạ đòn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart and toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold a weight in front of your chest with both hands.
Step:3 Shift your weight to one side and lower your body by bending the knee of the side you shifted towards, while keeping the other leg straight.
Step:4 Go as low as you can while maintaining balance and keeping your chest up.
Step:5 Push through the heel of the bent leg to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat on the other side, alternating between legs.

exercises.name: Self Assisted Inverse Leg Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back on a mat or bench with your legs extended.
Step:2 Place your hands by your sides or under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lift your feet off the ground, bringing your thighs towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Incline Close Grip Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Assisted Lying Calves Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted lying calves stretch. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your back with your legs extended; Bend one knee and place your foot flat on the ground; Using your hands or a towel, gently pull your toes towards your body, feeling a stretch in your calf; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds; Release the stretch and repeat on the other leg
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your legs extended.
Step:2 Bend one knee and place your foot flat on the ground.
Step:3 Using your hands or a towel, gently pull your toes towards your body, feeling a stretch in your calf.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Release the stretch and repeat on the other leg.

exercises.name: Barbell Rollerout From Bench
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell rollerout from bench. Cách thực hiện: Start by kneeling on the floor with a barbell placed on a bench in front of you; Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, slowly roll the barbell forward, extending your arms in front of you; Continue rolling the barbell forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead; Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your body, returning to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by kneeling on the floor with a barbell placed on a bench in front of you.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, slowly roll the barbell forward, extending your arms in front of you.
Step:4 Continue rolling the barbell forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your body, returning to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Guillotine Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell slowly towards your neck, keeping your elbows pointed outwards.
Step:4 Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your neck.
Step:5 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kneeling Plank Tap Shoulder (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a kneeling position with your hands on the ground, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on your toes, and lift your body into a plank position.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged and your hips stable, lift one hand off the ground and tap the opposite shoulder.
Step:4 Return the hand to the ground and repeat with the other hand.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Stationary Bike Run
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position to ensure proper alignment.
Step:2 Place your feet on the pedals and secure them with the straps if available.
Step:3 Start pedaling at a comfortable pace.
Step:4 Maintain a steady rhythm and increase the resistance as desired.
Step:5 Engage your core muscles to maintain stability and proper posture.
Step:6 Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your workout.
Step:7 Gradually decrease the resistance and slow down before coming to a complete stop.
Step:8 Stretch your legs and cool down after the workout.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Biceps Curl V Sit On Bosu Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Biceps Curl V Sit On Bosu Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell biceps curl v sit on bosu ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bosu ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended down by your sides; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bosu ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended down by your sides.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band V-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập band v-up. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band; Engaging your abs, lift your legs and upper body off the ground simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band.
Step:2 Engaging your abs, lift your legs and upper body off the ground simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Single Leg Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell single leg squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand; Extend one leg forward and keep it off the ground throughout the exercise; Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair; Keep your chest up and your back straight; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heel to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Extend one leg forward and keep it off the ground throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:4 Keep your chest up and your back straight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.name: Barbell Lying Triceps Extension Skull Crusher
exercises.name_vi: Barbell Lying Triceps Extension Skull Crusher
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell lying triceps extension skull crusher. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench; Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest; Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows; Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your forehead, then extend your arms back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your forehead, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Two Arm Curl On Incline Bench
exercises.name_vi: Cable Two Arm Curl On Incline Bench
exercises.description: Bài tập cable two arm curl on incline bench. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an incline bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground; Grasp the cable handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders while contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps; Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Turkish Get Up (Squat Style)
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell turkish get up (squat style). Cách thực hiện: Start by lying on your back with your legs extended and the kettlebell held in your right hand, arm fully extended above your shoulder; Bend your right knee and place your right foot flat on the ground, keeping your left leg extended; Pressing through your right foot, lift your hips off the ground, coming into a bridge position; Slide your left leg underneath your body, bending your left knee and placing your left foot flat on the ground; Rotate your torso to the left, bringing your left hand to the ground for support
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back with your legs extended and the kettlebell held in your right hand, arm fully extended above your shoulder.
Step:2 Bend your right knee and place your right foot flat on the ground, keeping your left leg extended.
Step:3 Pressing through your right foot, lift your hips off the ground, coming into a bridge position.
Step:4 Slide your left leg underneath your body, bending your left knee and placing your left foot flat on the ground.
Step:5 Rotate your torso to the left, bringing your left hand to the ground for support.
Step:6 Pressing through your right foot and left hand, lift your torso off the ground, coming into a kneeling position.
Step:7 From the kneeling position, stand up, keeping the kettlebell extended overhead.
Step:8 Reverse the movement to return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat the exercise on the other side, starting with the kettlebell in your left hand.

exercises.name: Ez Barbell Close Grip Preacher Curl
exercises.name_vi: Ez Barbell Close Grip Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập ez barbell close grip preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the ez barbell with an underhand grip; Rest your triceps on the pad and fully extend your arms, keeping your back straight; Slowly curl the barbell towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps; Lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the ez barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Rest your triceps on the pad and fully extend your arms, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Slowly curl the barbell towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Hip Adduction
exercises.description: Bài tập cable hip adduction. Cách thực hiện: Attach the ankle cuff to your ankle and stand facing the cable machine; Position yourself far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable; Place your hands on the machine for support; Keeping your leg straight, slowly move your leg across your body towards the midline; Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the ankle cuff to your ankle and stand facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Position yourself far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable.
Step:3 Place your hands on the machine for support.
