Step:4 Keeping your leg straight, slowly move your leg across your body towards the midline.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Isometric Chest Squeeze
exercises.description: Bài tập isometric chest squeeze. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Extend your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground, with your palms facing each other; Squeeze your chest muscles together as hard as you can, while keeping your arms straight; Hold this position for a few seconds, focusing on contracting your chest muscles; Release the squeeze and relax your chest muscles
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground, with your palms facing each other.
Step:3 Squeeze your chest muscles together as hard as you can, while keeping your arms straight.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, focusing on contracting your chest muscles.
Step:5 Release the squeeze and relax your chest muscles.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Front Lever Reps
exercises.description: Bài tập front lever reps. Cách thực hiện: Hang from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, palms facing away from you; Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back; Keeping your body straight, lift your legs up until they are parallel to the ground; Hold this position for as long as you can, aiming for 10-20 seconds; Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back.
Step:3 Keeping your body straight, lift your legs up until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Hold this position for as long as you can, aiming for 10-20 seconds.
Step:5 Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Split Squat V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell split squat v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back; Take a large step forward with your right foot, keeping your torso upright; Lower your body by bending your knees and hips until your right thigh is parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position; Repeat with your left leg forward for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Take a large step forward with your right foot, keeping your torso upright.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your knees and hips until your right thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg forward for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Assisted Side Lying Adductor Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted side lying adductor stretch. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your side with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other; Bend your bottom leg slightly for stability; Place your top foot on a stable surface, such as a bench or step; Keeping your top leg straight, slowly lower it towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your inner thigh; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Bend your bottom leg slightly for stability.
Step:3 Place your top foot on a stable surface, such as a bench or step.
Step:4 Keeping your top leg straight, slowly lower it towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your inner thigh.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Power Point Plank
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:2 Engage your core and squeeze your glutes to maintain a stable position.
Step:3 Lower your body down onto your forearms, one arm at a time, maintaining a straight line from head to toe.
Step:4 Hold this position for the desired amount of time, keeping your core and glutes engaged.
Step:5 To return to the starting position, push through your forearms and lift your body back up into a high plank position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Cross Body Hammer Curl V. 2
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Cross Body Hammer Curl V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell cross body hammer curl v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body; Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary; Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the dumbbells as close to your opposite shoulder as possible; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps; Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the dumbbells as close to your opposite shoulder as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Kickback
exercises.description: Bài tập cable kickback. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Hold the cable handle with your right hand and step back to create tension in the cable; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight; Keep your upper arm close to your body and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle; Extend your forearm backward, straightening your arm fully
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your right hand and step back to create tension in the cable.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Keep your upper arm close to your body and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:5 Extend your forearm backward, straightening your arm fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Smith Standing Back Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập smith standing back wrist curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart; Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your body; Slowly curl your wrists upwards, bringing the barbell towards your body; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upwards, bringing the barbell towards your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Straddle Maltese
exercises.description: Bài tập straddle maltese. Cách thực hiện: Start by hanging from a pair of rings with your arms fully extended and your body in a straight line; Spread your legs wide apart, forming a straddle position; Engage your core and slowly lower your body until your arms are parallel to the ground; Hold this position for a few seconds, then push yourself back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a pair of rings with your arms fully extended and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Spread your legs wide apart, forming a straddle position.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lower your body until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support.
Step:3 Keeping your legs straight, slowly raise them up in front of you until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Fly On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Cable One Arm Fly On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập cable one arm fly on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a cable handle in one hand and extend your arm out to the side, parallel to the ground; Keep your elbow slightly bent and your palm facing forward; Slowly bring your arm across your body, squeezing your chest muscles; Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle in one hand and extend your arm out to the side, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Keep your elbow slightly bent and your palm facing forward.
Step:4 Slowly bring your arm across your body, squeezing your chest muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Seated Wide Angle Pose Sequence
exercises.description: Bài tập seated wide angle pose sequence. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in a wide angle; Flex your feet and engage your quadriceps; Place your hands on the ground behind you for support; Keeping your back straight, lean forward from your hips; Continue leaning forward until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in a wide angle.
Step:2 Flex your feet and engage your quadriceps.
Step:3 Place your hands on the ground behind you for support.
Step:4 Keeping your back straight, lean forward from your hips.
Step:5 Continue leaning forward until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.
Step:6 Hold this position for a few breaths.
Step:7 Slowly release the stretch and return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Decline Wide-Grip Pullover
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell decline wide-grip pullover. Cách thực hiện: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured; Hold a barbell with a wide grip and extend your arms straight above your chest; Lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner, keeping your arms straight; Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with a wide grip and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner, keeping your arms straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Lying Close-Grip Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell lying close-grip triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench; Grasp the barbell with a close grip, hands shoulder-width apart, palms facing up; Extend your arms fully, lifting the barbell above your chest; Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, hands shoulder-width apart, palms facing up.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully, lifting the barbell above your chest.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: One Arm Chin-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập one arm chin-up. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a pull-up bar with your feet shoulder-width apart; Reach up and grab the bar with an underhand grip, with one hand gripping the bar and the other hand holding your wrist for support; Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended, keeping your body straight and your core engaged; Pull yourself up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a pull-up bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Reach up and grab the bar with an underhand grip, with one hand gripping the bar and the other hand holding your wrist for support.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended, keeping your body straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull yourself up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Hip Flexor Stretch Pointed
exercises.name_vi: Exercise Ball Hip Flexor Stretch Pointed
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball hip flexor stretch pointed. Cách thực hiện: Place the stability ball on the ground and kneel in front of it; Place your right foot on top of the stability ball, with your knee bent at a 90-degree angle; Extend your left leg behind you, keeping it straight; Lean forward, pushing your hips towards the stability ball, until you feel a stretch in your right hip flexor; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat. Emphasize pointed control
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and kneel in front of it.
Step:2 Place your right foot on top of the stability ball, with your knee bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Extend your left leg behind you, keeping it straight.
Step:4 Lean forward, pushing your hips towards the stability ball, until you feel a stretch in your right hip flexor.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat. Emphasize pointed control.

exercises.name: Barbell Decline Wide-Grip Press
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell decline wide-grip press. Cách thực hiện: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips; Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows out to the sides; Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows out to the sides.
Step:4 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Decline Bent Arm Pullover
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell decline bent arm pullover. Cách thực hiện: Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured; Hold a barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and extend your arms straight above your chest; Lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner, keeping your arms slightly bent; Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by contracting your lats; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner, keeping your arms slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by contracting your lats.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted pull-up. Cách thực hiện: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight; Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez Barbell Jm Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the ez barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body.
Step:4 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Left Hook. Boxing
exercises.description: Bài tập left hook. boxing. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Keep your left hand up to protect your face and your right hand by your chin; Rotate your hips and pivot on your left foot as you extend your left arm forward in a punching motion; Twist your torso and engage your core muscles to generate power in the punch; Snap your arm back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Keep your left hand up to protect your face and your right hand by your chin.
Step:3 Rotate your hips and pivot on your left foot as you extend your left arm forward in a punching motion.
Step:4 Twist your torso and engage your core muscles to generate power in the punch.
Step:5 Snap your arm back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Hammer Curl (With Rope)
exercises.description: Bài tập cable hammer curl (with rope). Cách thực hiện: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees; Hold the cable rope attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing each other, and your arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the cable rope attachment until your biceps are fully contracted and the rope is at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:2 Hold the cable rope attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing each other, and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the cable rope attachment until your biceps are fully contracted and the rope is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the cable rope attachment back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward; Rest the back of your upper arms against the preacher bench or an incline bench, with your elbows slightly bent; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Rest the back of your upper arms against the preacher bench or an incline bench, with your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Lateral Raise V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated lateral raise v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs; Keep your back straight and core engaged; Raise the dumbbells to your sides with a slight bend in your elbows, until your arms are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbells to your sides with a slight bend in your elbows, until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Straight Leg Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell straight leg deadlift. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward; Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Bend at your hips and lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent; Lower the barbell until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings; Engage your hamstrings and glutes to lift the barbell back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend at your hips and lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Lower the barbell until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.
Step:5 Engage your hamstrings and glutes to lift the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Sprint Lunge
exercises.description: Bài tập smith sprint lunge. Cách thực hiện: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at hip height; Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Step back with your right foot and place it on the barbell, resting the top of your foot on the bar; Bend your left knee and lower your body into a lunge position, keeping your back straight; Push through your left heel to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at hip height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Step back with your right foot and place it on the barbell, resting the top of your foot on the bar.
Step:4 Bend your left knee and lower your body into a lunge position, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat on the other side, stepping back with your left foot.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides; Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair; Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Standing Behind Head Military Press
exercises.name_vi: Smith Standing Behind Head Military Press
exercises.description: Bài tập smith standing behind head military press. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder level; Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Lift the bar off the rack and step back, maintaining a stable stance; Position the bar behind your head, resting on your upper traps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lift the bar off the rack and step back, maintaining a stable stance.
Step:5 Position the bar behind your head, resting on your upper traps.
Step:6 Keep your core engaged and your chest lifted throughout the exercise.
Step:7 Press the bar overhead by extending your arms, fully straightening them.
Step:8 Pause briefly at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Star Jump (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập star jump (male). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides; Bend your knees slightly and jump up explosively; As you jump, spread your legs and extend your arms out to the sides, forming a star shape with your body; Land softly on the balls of your feet with your knees slightly bent; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and jump up explosively.
Step:3 As you jump, spread your legs and extend your arms out to the sides, forming a star shape with your body.
Step:4 Land softly on the balls of your feet with your knees slightly bent.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Seated Shoulder Press With Declined
exercises.name_vi: Resistance Band Seated Shoulder Press With Declined
exercises.description: Bài tập resistance band seated shoulder press with declined. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold the resistance band with both hands, palms facing forward, and bring it up to shoulder level; Press the band overhead, extending your arms fully; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back down to shoulder level. Emphasize declined control; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the resistance band with both hands, palms facing forward, and bring it up to shoulder level.
Step:3 Press the band overhead, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back down to shoulder level. Emphasize declined control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Side Split Squat V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell side split squat v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards; Hold a barbell across your upper back, resting it on your shoulders; Take a big step to the side with your right foot, keeping your left foot planted; Bend your right knee and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your chest up and your back straight; Push through your right heel to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards.
Step:2 Hold a barbell across your upper back, resting it on your shoulders.
Step:3 Take a big step to the side with your right foot, keeping your left foot planted.
Step:4 Bend your right knee and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
Step:5 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat on the other side, stepping out with your left foot.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Forward Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập cable forward raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Hold the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your arms fully extended in front of you; Keeping your arms straight, raise the cable handle up to shoulder level; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your arms fully extended in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, raise the cable handle up to shoulder level.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Low Seated Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward, maintaining a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Athletic Style Battling Ropes
exercises.description: Bài tập athletic style battling ropes. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent; Hold one end of the rope in each hand, with your palms facing each other; Raise your arms to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent; (athletic variation) Begin making alternating waves with the ropes by rapidly raising and lowering each arm; Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold one end of the rope in each hand, with your palms facing each other.
Step:3 Raise your arms to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 (athletic variation) Begin making alternating waves with the ropes by rapidly raising and lowering each arm.
Step:5 Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Preacher Curl Over Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Preacher Curl Over Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell preacher curl over exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your elbow on the exercise ball; Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder; Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your elbow on the exercise ball.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Cable Incline Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập cable incline triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position; Attach a straight bar to the cable; Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the bar with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight overhead; Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position.
Step:2 Attach a straight bar to the cable.
Step:3 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight overhead.
Step:5 Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:6 Bend your elbows and lower the bar behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears.
Step:7 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated lateral raise. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs; Keep your back straight and core engaged; Raise the dumbbells to your sides with a slight bend in your elbows, until your arms are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbells to your sides with a slight bend in your elbows, until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: 45° Side Bend
exercises.description: Bài tập 45° side bend. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended straight down by your sides; Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, slowly bend your torso to one side, lowering your hand towards your knee; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat on the other side; Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended straight down by your sides.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, slowly bend your torso to one side, lowering your hand towards your knee.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat on the other side.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Fly On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Incline Fly On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline fly on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle; Sit on an exercise ball and roll forward until your upper back is resting on the incline bench; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest; Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest; Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on an exercise ball and roll forward until your upper back is resting on the incline bench.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Suspended Abdominal Fallout - Inclined Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập suspended abdominal fallout - inclined variation. Cách thực hiện: Attach a suspension trainer to a high anchor point and adjust the straps to waist height; Stand facing away from the anchor point and hold the handles with your arms extended in front of you. Maintain inclined form throughout; Lean forward at the waist, keeping your body straight and your core engaged; Lower your body as far as you can while maintaining control and tension in your abs; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise your body back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a suspension trainer to a high anchor point and adjust the straps to waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the anchor point and hold the handles with your arms extended in front of you. Maintain inclined form throughout.
Step:3 Lean forward at the waist, keeping your body straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Lower your body as far as you can while maintaining control and tension in your abs.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise your body back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Standing Reverse Grip One Arm Overhead Tricep Extension
exercises.name_vi: Cable Standing Reverse Grip One Arm Overhead Tricep Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập cable standing reverse grip one arm overhead tricep extension. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing away from the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip and extend your arm overhead, keeping your elbow close to your head; Keep your upper arm stationary and slowly lower the cable handle behind your head by bending your elbow; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing away from the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip and extend your arm overhead, keeping your elbow close to your head.
Step:3 Keep your upper arm stationary and slowly lower the cable handle behind your head by bending your elbow.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Weighted Svend Press
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted svend press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a weight plate in front of your chest with both hands; Keep your elbows slightly bent and your palms facing each other; Press the weight plate straight out in front of you, fully extending your arms; Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring the weight plate back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a weight plate in front of your chest with both hands.
Step:2 Keep your elbows slightly bent and your palms facing each other.
Step:3 Press the weight plate straight out in front of you, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring the weight plate back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:3 Pause for a moment when your chest is just above the ground, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Side Bent V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell side bent v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with both hands, palms facing down; Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise; Slowly bend your torso to the right side, lowering the barbell towards your right knee; Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position; Repeat the movement on the left side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with both hands, palms facing down.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Slowly bend your torso to the right side, lowering the barbell towards your right knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement on the left side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Double Push Press
exercises.description: Bài tập vai với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Initiate the movement by explosively extending your hips, knees, and ankles, driving the kettlebells overhead.
Step:4 As the kettlebells reach the top, press them fully overhead, locking out your arms.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebells back to the starting position by bending your elbows and bringing them back down to shoulder height.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Alternating Hang Clean
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell alternating hang clean. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand with an overhand grip; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up; Allow the kettlebells to hang in front of your body with your arms fully extended; In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips, shrug your shoulders, and pull the kettlebells up towards your shoulders; As the kettlebells reach shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebells in the rack position, with your palms facing inward and the kettlebells resting on the outside of your forearms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Allow the kettlebells to hang in front of your body with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips, shrug your shoulders, and pull the kettlebells up towards your shoulders.

Step:5 As the kettlebells reach shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebells in the rack position, with your palms facing inward and the kettlebells resting on the outside of your forearms.
Step:6 Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat the movement with the opposite arm.
Step:7 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Decline Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place your hands on the ground slightly wider than shoulder-width apart, with your feet elevated on a stable surface.
Step:2 Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe, engaging your core muscles.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
Step:4 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Complete Style Ez Bar Lying Close Grip Triceps Extension Behind Head
exercises.name_vi: Complete Style Ez Bar Lying Close Grip Triceps Extension Behind Head
exercises.description: Bài tập complete style ez bar lying close grip triceps extension behind head. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench; Hold the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing up, and extend your arms straight up over your chest; Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows; Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Maintain complete form throughout; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing up, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Maintain complete form throughout.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Pullover
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell pullover. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor; Hold a barbell with a shoulder-width grip and extend your arms straight above your chest; Keeping your arms straight, lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner until you feel a stretch in your lats; Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with a shoulder-width grip and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner until you feel a stretch in your lats.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Straight Arm Pullover
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell straight arm pullover. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet planted firmly on the ground; Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest; Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc-like motion; Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet planted firmly on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc-like motion.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Half Knee Bends (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập half knee bends (male). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Bend your knees and lower your body down as if you were sitting back into a chair; Keep your chest up and your weight in your heels; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body down as if you were sitting back into a chair.
Step:3 Keep your chest up and your weight in your heels.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated One Leg Calf Raise
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Seated One Leg Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated one leg calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your right thigh; Extend your left leg straight out in front of you, keeping your foot flexed; Place the ball of your right foot on an elevated surface, such as a step or weight plate; Using your calf muscles, raise your right heel as high as possible; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your right thigh.
Step:2 Extend your left leg straight out in front of you, keeping your foot flexed.
Step:3 Place the ball of your right foot on an elevated surface, such as a step or weight plate.
Step:4 Using your calf muscles, raise your right heel as high as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.name: Ez Barbell Seated Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập ez barbell seated triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart; Raise the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms; Keeping your upper arms stationary, lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows; Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by extending your arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Raise the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Suspended Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập suspended push-up. Cách thực hiện: Find a suspension trainer and adjust it to an appropriate height; Stand facing away from the anchor point and hold the handles with an overhand grip; Walk your feet forward, leaning your body forward until your weight is supported by the suspension trainer; Keep your body straight from head to heels, engage your core, and lower your chest towards the handles; Push through your chest and arms to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Find a suspension trainer and adjust it to an appropriate height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the anchor point and hold the handles with an overhand grip.
Step:3 Walk your feet forward, leaning your body forward until your weight is supported by the suspension trainer.
Step:4 Keep your body straight from head to heels, engage your core, and lower your chest towards the handles.
Step:5 Push through your chest and arms to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Quick Feet V. 2 With Bent
exercises.description: Bài tập quick feet v. 2 with bent. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides; Begin by rapidly moving your feet up and down, as if you were running in place; Keep your movements quick and light, focusing on staying on the balls of your feet; Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions. Emphasize bent control
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Begin by rapidly moving your feet up and down, as if you were running in place.
Step:3 Keep your movements quick and light, focusing on staying on the balls of your feet.
Step:4 Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions. Emphasize bent control.

exercises.name: Lever Narrow Grip Seated Row - Strength Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footrests to ensure proper form.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with a narrow grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement. Maintain strength form throughout.
Step:7 Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Chest And Front Of Shoulder Stretch Micro
exercises.name_vi: Chest And Front Of Shoulder Stretch Micro
exercises.description: Bài tập chest and front of shoulder stretch micro. Cách thực hiện: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart; Extend your arms straight out in front of you at shoulder height; Cross your arms in front of your body, with your right arm on top of your left arm; Interlace your fingers and press your palms together; Gently squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your hands forward, feeling a stretch in your chest and front of your shoulders
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out in front of you at shoulder height.
Step:3 Cross your arms in front of your body, with your right arm on top of your left arm.
Step:4 Interlace your fingers and press your palms together.
Step:5 Gently squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your hands forward, feeling a stretch in your chest and front of your shoulders.
Step:6 (micro variation) Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Seated Calf Press
exercises.description: Bài tập lever seated calf press. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat of the machine so that your shoulders are aligned with the lever pad; Place your toes on the lower portion of the platform and position your knees under the lever pad; Grasp the handles on the sides of the seat for stability; Press the lever pad down by extending your ankles, lifting your heels as high as possible; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the machine so that your shoulders are aligned with the lever pad.
Step:2 Place your toes on the lower portion of the platform and position your knees under the lever pad.
Step:3 Grasp the handles on the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Press the lever pad down by extending your ankles, lifting your heels as high as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Seated Squat Calf Raise On Leg Press Machine
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the footplate.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the footplate, shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the footplate, keeping your heels off the edge.
Step:4 Release the safety handles and push the footplate away from you by extending your knees.
Step:5 Once your knees are fully extended, slowly lower your heels by flexing your calves.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the footplate back up by extending your calves.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Drag Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell drag curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up; Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs; Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the barbell up towards your chest by contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the barbell up towards your chest by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Front Chest Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell front chest squat. Cách thực hiện: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out; Hold the barbell in front of your chest with your hands shoulder-width apart, elbows pointing forward; Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees; Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell in front of your chest with your hands shoulder-width apart, elbows pointing forward.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:4 Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Prone Medicine Ball Close Grip Push Up
exercises.name_vi: Prone Medicine Ball Close Grip Push Up
exercises.description: Bài tập prone medicine ball close grip push up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands on the medicine ball, shoulder-width apart; Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides; Push back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Maintain prone form throughout
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands on the medicine ball, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 Push back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Maintain prone form throughout.

exercises.name: Lever Narrow Grip Seated Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footrests to ensure proper form.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with a narrow grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Hammer Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated hammer curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms extended straight down; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps; Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms extended straight down.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Decline Shrug - Rigid Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell decline shrug - rigid variation. Cách thực hiện: Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle; Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it; (rigid variation) Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your arms fully extended towards the floor; Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders towards your ears as high as possible; Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Step:3 (rigid variation) Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your arms fully extended towards the floor.
Step:4 Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders towards your ears as high as possible.
Step:5 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Pullover On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Lying Pullover On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying pullover on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball and roll forward until your upper back is resting on the ball; Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up over your chest; Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arms straight; Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball and roll forward until your upper back is resting on the ball.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arms straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Gironda Sternum Chin
exercises.description: Bài tập gironda sternum chin. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a high bar with your feet shoulder-width apart; Reach up and grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight; Engage your lats and biceps to pull your chest up towards the bar, leading with your sternum; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a high bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Reach up and grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:4 Engage your lats and biceps to pull your chest up towards the bar, leading with your sternum.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell deadlift. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the ground in front of you; Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower your torso and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Keep your back straight and chest lifted as you drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees; As you stand up straight, squeeze your glutes and keep your core engaged; Lower the barbell back down to the ground by bending at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the ground in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower your torso and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and chest lifted as you drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees.
Step:4 As you stand up straight, squeeze your glutes and keep your core engaged.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back down to the ground by bending at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Squat Jerk
exercises.description: Bài tập squat jerk. Cách thực hiện: Start with the barbell resting on your shoulders, with your feet shoulder-width apart; Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your chest up and your knees tracking over your toes; As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your legs and push the barbell overhead; As the barbell reaches its peak, quickly drop into a split position, with one foot forward and one foot back; Catch the barbell overhead with your arms fully extended and your back knee slightly touching the ground
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start with the barbell resting on your shoulders, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your chest up and your knees tracking over your toes.
Step:3 As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your legs and push the barbell overhead.
Step:4 As the barbell reaches its peak, quickly drop into a split position, with one foot forward and one foot back.
Step:5 Catch the barbell overhead with your arms fully extended and your back knee slightly touching the ground.
Step:6 Stand up from the split position, bringing your feet back together.
Step:7 Lower the barbell back to your shoulders and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.description: Bài tập dead bug. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your arms extended towards the ceiling; Bend your knees and lift your legs off the ground, creating a 90-degree angle at your hips and knees; Engage your core and lower back to press your lower back into the ground; Slowly lower your right arm and left leg towards the ground, keeping them straight and hovering just above the floor; Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your arms extended towards the ceiling.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lift your legs off the ground, creating a 90-degree angle at your hips and knees.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower back to press your lower back into the ground.
Step:4 Slowly lower your right arm and left leg towards the ground, keeping them straight and hovering just above the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement with your left arm and right leg.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying On Floor Rear Delt Raise
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Lying On Floor Rear Delt Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying on floor rear delt raise. Cách thực hiện: Lie face down on the floor with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other; Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping a slight bend in your elbows; Engaging your shoulder muscles, lift your arms up and out to the sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the floor with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Engaging your shoulder muscles, lift your arms up and out to the sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Overhead Curl On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Cable Overhead Curl On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập cable overhead curl on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball and hold the cable handle with an underhand grip; Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your ears; Slowly curl the cable down towards your forehead, keeping your upper arms stationary; Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball and hold the cable handle with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your ears.
Step:3 Slowly curl the cable down towards your forehead, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Box Jump Down With One Leg Stabilization
exercises.name_vi: Box Jump Down With One Leg Stabilization
exercises.description: Bài tập box jump down with one leg stabilization. Cách thực hiện: Stand in front of a box or platform with your feet shoulder-width apart; Bend your knees and jump onto the box, landing softly with one foot on the box and the other foot hanging off the edge; Stabilize yourself on the box with the foot that is on it, while keeping the other foot off the ground; Hold this position for a few seconds, engaging your calf muscles to maintain balance; Slowly step down with the foot that is on the box, returning to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a box or platform with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and jump onto the box, landing softly with one foot on the box and the other foot hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Stabilize yourself on the box with the foot that is on it, while keeping the other foot off the ground.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, engaging your calf muscles to maintain balance.
Step:5 Slowly step down with the foot that is on the box, returning to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the exercise with the other leg.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Side Bend
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell side bend. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, letting it hang down by your side; Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, slowly bend sideways at the waist towards the opposite side of the dumbbell, lowering the weight as far as you comfortably can; Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, letting it hang down by your side.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, slowly bend sideways at the waist towards the opposite side of the dumbbell, lowering the weight as far as you comfortably can.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Upright Row (Back Pov)
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Let the dumbbells hang in front of your thighs, with your arms fully extended and your palms facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbells straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Continue lifting until the dumbbells are at shoulder height, with your elbows pointing out to the sides.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Seated Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell seated calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and a barbell resting on your thighs; Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform, such as a block or step; Lower your heels as far as possible, feeling a stretch in your calves; Raise your heels as high as possible, contracting your calves; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and a barbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform, such as a block or step.
Step:3 Lower your heels as far as possible, feeling a stretch in your calves.
Step:4 Raise your heels as high as possible, contracting your calves.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Half Sit-Up (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập half sit-up (male). Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards; Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Fierce Style Forward Lunge (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập fierce style forward lunge (male). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips; Take a big step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position; Bend your right knee to about 90 degrees, keeping your knee aligned with your ankle; Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position; (fierce variation) Repeat with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions
