exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips.
Step:2 Take a big step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Bend your right knee to about 90 degrees, keeping your knee aligned with your ankle.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position.
Step:5 (fierce variation) Repeat with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Side-To-Side Chin
exercises.description: Bài tập side-to-side chin. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed; Pull yourself up by bending your elbows and bringing your chin towards the bar, while keeping your body straight; Once your chin is above the bar, lower yourself back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed.
Step:4 Pull yourself up by bending your elbows and bringing your chin towards the bar, while keeping your body straight.
Step:5 Once your chin is above the bar, lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Roller Back Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập roller back stretch. Cách thực hiện: Start by sitting on the ground with your legs extended in front of you; Place the roller perpendicular to your body, just below your glutes; Slowly roll your body backwards, allowing the roller to move up your back; Continue rolling until the roller reaches your upper back; Pause for a moment, then slowly roll back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by sitting on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Place the roller perpendicular to your body, just below your glutes.
Step:3 Slowly roll your body backwards, allowing the roller to move up your back.
Step:4 Continue rolling until the roller reaches your upper back.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly roll back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Pure Chin-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập pure chin-up. Cách thực hiện: Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart; Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. Emphasize pure control; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. Emphasize pure control.
Step:3 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Over Bench One Arm Neutral Wrist Curl
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Over Bench One Arm Neutral Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell over bench one arm neutral wrist curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your arm extended over the bench, palm facing up; Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, keeping your wrist in a neutral position; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your arm extended over the bench, palm facing up.
Step:2 Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, keeping your wrist in a neutral position.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Cable Reverse Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable reverse preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height; Sit on the preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, with your palms facing down and your elbows fully extended; Grab the cable handles with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height.
Step:2 Sit on the preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, with your palms facing down and your elbows fully extended.
Step:3 Grab the cable handles with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Judo Flip With Static
exercises.description: Bài tập cable judo flip with static. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Hold the cable handle with both hands at chest level, palms facing down; Engage your core and rotate your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body; As you rotate, pivot your back foot and allow your hips to rotate naturally. Emphasize static control; Extend your arms fully and finish the movement by flipping the cable handle over your shoulder
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands at chest level, palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your core and rotate your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body.
Step:4 As you rotate, pivot your back foot and allow your hips to rotate naturally. Emphasize static control.
Step:5 Extend your arms fully and finish the movement by flipping the cable handle over your shoulder.
Step:6 Return to the starting position by reversing the movement, rotating your torso back to the center.
Step:7 Repeat the movement on the opposite side.
Step:8 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Full Squat (Side Pov)
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tạ đòn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to lower your body down.
Step:4 Bend at the knees and hips, pushing your hips back and down as if sitting into a chair.
Step:5 Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:6 Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels.
Step:7 Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Alternate Side Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell alternate side press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height; Press one dumbbell overhead while keeping the other dumbbell at shoulder height; Lower the pressed dumbbell back to shoulder height while pressing the other dumbbell overhead; Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Press one dumbbell overhead while keeping the other dumbbell at shoulder height.
Step:3 Lower the pressed dumbbell back to shoulder height while pressing the other dumbbell overhead.
Step:4 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Lying Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell lying triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench; Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest; Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.description: Bài tập walking lunge. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Take a step forward with your right leg, lowering your body into a lunge position; Keep your torso upright and your front knee aligned with your ankle; Push off with your right foot and bring your left foot forward, stepping into a lunge position with your left leg; Continue alternating legs and walking forward, maintaining a controlled and steady pace
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right leg, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Keep your torso upright and your front knee aligned with your ankle.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and bring your left foot forward, stepping into a lunge position with your left leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating legs and walking forward, maintaining a controlled and steady pace.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted One Hand Pull Up Fast
exercises.name_vi: Weighted One Hand Pull Up Fast
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted one hand pull up fast. Cách thực hiện: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended and your body straight; Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar; (fast variation) Lower your body back down to the starting position with control
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 (fast variation) Lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Assisted Triceps Dip (Kneeling)
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted triceps dip (kneeling). Cách thực hiện: Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height; Kneel down on the pad facing the machine, with your hands gripping the handles; Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and close to the machine; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height.
Step:2 Kneel down on the pad facing the machine, with your hands gripping the handles.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and close to the machine.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:5 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Contracted Kettlebell Extended Range One Arm Press On Floor
exercises.name_vi: Contracted Kettlebell Extended Range One Arm Press On Floor
exercises.description: Bài tập contracted kettlebell extended range one arm press on floor. Cách thực hiện: Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Hold a kettlebell in one hand, with your palm facing towards your feet; Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow locked and your wrist straight; Slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm. Emphasize contracted control
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in one hand, with your palm facing towards your feet.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow locked and your wrist straight.
Step:4 Slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm. Emphasize contracted control.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball On The Wall Calf Raise (Tennis Ball Between Knees)
exercises.name_vi: Exercise Ball On The Wall Calf Raise (Tennis Ball Between Knees)
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball on the wall calf raise (tennis ball between knees). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your back against a wall and place an exercise ball between your lower back and the wall; Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly in front of you; Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides; Place a tennis ball between your knees; Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your back against a wall and place an exercise ball between your lower back and the wall.
Step:2 Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly in front of you.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides.
Step:4 Place a tennis ball between your knees.
Step:5 Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Alternating Seated Bicep Curl On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Alternating Seated Bicep Curl On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell alternating seated bicep curl on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell while rotating your forearm until your palm is facing your shoulder; Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat the curl with the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell while rotating your forearm until your palm is facing your shoulder.
Step:4 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the curl with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating curls for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Upper Chest Crossovers
exercises.description: Bài tập cable upper chest crossovers. Cách thực hiện: Attach the handles to the cables at chest height; Stand in the center of the cable machine with one foot slightly in front of the other; Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms extended out to the sides; Keep a slight bend in your elbows and engage your core; Pull the cables together in front of your chest, crossing them over each other
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the handles to the cables at chest height.
Step:2 Stand in the center of the cable machine with one foot slightly in front of the other.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms extended out to the sides.
Step:4 Keep a slight bend in your elbows and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the cables together in front of your chest, crossing them over each other.
Step:6 Squeeze your chest muscles at the peak of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the cables back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Walking On Stepmill
exercises.description: Bài tập walking on stepmill. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the stepmill machine to a comfortable level; Step onto the machine and place your hands on the handrails for support; Start walking by placing one foot on a step and then the other, alternating between legs; Maintain an upright posture and engage your core muscles; Continue walking for the desired duration or distance
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the stepmill machine to a comfortable level.
Step:2 Step onto the machine and place your hands on the handrails for support.
Step:3 Start walking by placing one foot on a step and then the other, alternating between legs.
Step:4 Maintain an upright posture and engage your core muscles.
Step:5 Continue walking for the desired duration or distance.
Step:6 Gradually increase the intensity or speed as you become more comfortable with the exercise.
Step:7 Remember to cool down and stretch after completing the exercise.

exercises.name: Walking High Knees Lunge
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Lift your right knee up towards your chest as high as you can while balancing on your left leg.
Step:3 Step forward with your right foot and lower your body into a lunge position, bending both knees to a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and bring your left knee up towards your chest.
Step:5 Step forward with your left foot and lower your body into a lunge position.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs and lunging forward, keeping your core engaged and maintaining a steady pace.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Spine Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập spine stretch. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you; Place your hands on the ground behind you, fingers pointing towards your body; Engage your core and slowly lean back, keeping your back straight; Continue leaning back until you feel a stretch in your spine; Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground behind you, fingers pointing towards your body.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lean back, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Continue leaning back until you feel a stretch in your spine.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Rough Cable Decline Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập rough cable decline fly. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable machine to a decline position; Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Hold the handles with your palms facing forward and your arms extended straight out in front of you; Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion. Perform with rough intensity; Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the handles with your palms facing forward and your arms extended straight out in front of you.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion. Perform with rough intensity.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: One Arm Slam (With Medicine Ball)
exercises.description: Bài tập one arm slam (with medicine ball). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball with one hand in front of your waist; Bend your knees slightly and engage your core; Raise the medicine ball above your head, fully extending your arm; Forcefully slam the medicine ball down to the ground, using your core and shoulders to generate power; Catch the medicine ball on the bounce and repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball with one hand in front of your waist.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise the medicine ball above your head, fully extending your arm.
Step:4 Forcefully slam the medicine ball down to the ground, using your core and shoulders to generate power.
Step:5 Catch the medicine ball on the bounce and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Inverted Row With Straps
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up a suspension trainer or straps at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing the anchor point and grab the handles with an overhand grip.
Step:3 Walk your feet forward, leaning back until your body is at an angle.
Step:4 Keep your body straight and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull your chest towards the handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Hammer Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Hammer Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline one arm hammer press on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand; Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball; Hold the dumbbell with your palm facing inward and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle; Press the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, straightening your arm; Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell with your palm facing inward and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, straightening your arm.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Side Lying Floor Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập side lying floor stretch. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your side with your legs straight and your bottom arm extended straight overhead; Bend your top knee and place your foot on the ground in front of your bottom leg; Reach your top arm over your head and grab onto something stable, like a wall or a piece of furniture; Slowly lift your bottom leg off the ground, keeping it straight, until you feel a stretch in your side; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then slowly lower your leg back down
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs straight and your bottom arm extended straight overhead.
Step:2 Bend your top knee and place your foot on the ground in front of your bottom leg.
Step:3 Reach your top arm over your head and grab onto something stable, like a wall or a piece of furniture.
Step:4 Slowly lift your bottom leg off the ground, keeping it straight, until you feel a stretch in your side.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then slowly lower your leg back down.
Step:6 Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Medicine Ball Chest Push Single Response
exercises.name_vi: Medicine Ball Chest Push Single Response
exercises.description: Bài tập medicine ball chest push single response. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball at chest level; Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest; Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the medicine ball back to your chest; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball at chest level.
Step:2 Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the medicine ball back to your chest.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Standing Archer
exercises.description: Bài tập standing archer. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Extend your arms straight out in front of you at shoulder height, parallel to the ground; Rotate your torso to the right, keeping your arms extended and your back straight; As you rotate, extend your right arm forward and your left arm back, mimicking the motion of drawing a bowstring; Hold the position for a moment, then return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out in front of you at shoulder height, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Rotate your torso to the right, keeping your arms extended and your back straight.
Step:4 As you rotate, extend your right arm forward and your left arm back, mimicking the motion of drawing a bowstring.
Step:5 Hold the position for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the motion, this time rotating your torso to the left and extending your left arm forward and your right arm back.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập smith squat. Cách thực hiện: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at an appropriate height for your squat; Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out; Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper traps and shoulders; Grip the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Engage your core and unrack the barbell, stepping back to clear the rack
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at an appropriate height for your squat.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:3 Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper traps and shoulders.
Step:4 Grip the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Engage your core and unrack the barbell, stepping back to clear the rack.
Step:6 Keeping your chest up and back straight, initiate the squat by bending at the hips and knees.
Step:7 Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:8 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then drive through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline T-Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline t-raise. Cách thực hiện: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards; Lean forward and let your arms hang straight down, perpendicular to the floor; Keeping your arms straight, raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, forming a 'T' shape with your body; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Lean forward and let your arms hang straight down, perpendicular to the floor.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, forming a 'T' shape with your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Narrow Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up as you pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Incline Chest Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly bend your elbows and lower the handles back towards your chest.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Bench Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated bench extension. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your head; Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your elbows close to your ears; Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your head.
Step:3 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your elbows close to your ears.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a preacher curl bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against it; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against it.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Standing Military Press
exercises.description: Bài tập smith standing military press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it down to shoulder level, with your palms facing forward; Press the barbell upward until your arms are fully extended overhead; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to shoulder level
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it down to shoulder level, with your palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the barbell upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to shoulder level.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Seated Hammer Curl
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Seated Hammer Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm seated hammer curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in one hand with a neutral grip (palms facing each other); Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee; Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder; Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with a neutral grip (palms facing each other).
Step:3 Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Band Two Legs Calf Raise - (Band Under Both Legs) V. 2
exercises.name_vi: Band Two Legs Calf Raise - (Band Under Both Legs) V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập band two legs calf raise - (band under both legs) v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a resistance band under both feet; Hold the ends of the band with your hands for stability; Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a resistance band under both feet.
Step:2 Hold the ends of the band with your hands for stability.
Step:3 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Wide Hand Push Up
exercises.description: Bài tập wide hand push up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands wider than shoulder-width apart; Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe; Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides; Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:4 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Outside Leg Kick Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập outside leg kick push-up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together; Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged; As you push back up, kick one leg out to the side, extending it fully and engaging your glutes; Return your leg to the starting position and repeat the push-up, alternating legs with each repetition; Continue alternating leg kicks and push-ups for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 As you push back up, kick one leg out to the side, extending it fully and engaging your glutes.
Step:4 Return your leg to the starting position and repeat the push-up, alternating legs with each repetition.
Step:5 Continue alternating leg kicks and push-ups for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Standing Twist Row (V-Bar)
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a v-bar attachment to a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:4 Take a step back to create tension in the cable.
Step:5 Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Pull the v-bar towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and bending your elbows.
Step:7 As you pull, twist your torso to one side, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:8 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, feeling the contraction in your upper back.
Step:9 Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position, untwisting your torso.
Step:10 Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, alternating the twisting direction with each rep.

exercises.name: Cable Standing Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to a high pulley and stand facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Hold the handle with both hands and place it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent.
Step:3 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Keeping your abs engaged, exhale and crunch your torso down towards your knees, bringing your elbows towards your thighs.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Trap Bar Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập trap bar deadlift. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the trap bar on the ground in front of you; Bend at the hips and knees to lower yourself down and grip the handles of the trap bar with an overhand grip; Keep your back straight and chest up as you begin to lift the trap bar off the ground by extending your hips and knees; As you lift, focus on driving through your heels and squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement; Lower the trap bar back down to the ground by bending at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight throughout the movement
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the trap bar on the ground in front of you.
Step:2 Bend at the hips and knees to lower yourself down and grip the handles of the trap bar with an overhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and chest up as you begin to lift the trap bar off the ground by extending your hips and knees.
Step:4 As you lift, focus on driving through your heels and squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Lower the trap bar back down to the ground by bending at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight throughout the movement.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Stiff Leg Good Morning
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell stiff leg good morning. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps; Keeping your back straight, hinge forward at the hips, pushing your glutes back; Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings; Engage your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, hinge forward at the hips, pushing your glutes back.
Step:4 Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings.
Step:5 Engage your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell One Arm Bent Over Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a barbell with one hand using an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your head in a neutral position.
Step:3 Pull the barbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Barbell Wide Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows slightly flared out.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest, then push it back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Muscle Up
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:3 As you reach the top of the movement, transition your grip so that your palms are facing towards you.
Step:4 Continue pulling yourself up until your chest reaches the bar, then pause for a moment.
Step:5 Slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez Barbell Seated Curls
exercises.description: Bài tập ez barbell seated curls. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart; Rest your upper arms on your thighs, allowing the ez barbell to hang down in front of you; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the ez barbell upwards towards your shoulders; Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Rest your upper arms on your thighs, allowing the ez barbell to hang down in front of you.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the ez barbell upwards towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the ez barbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Side Hip (On Parallel Bars)
exercises.description: Bài tập side hip (on parallel bars). Cách thực hiện: Stand between two parallel bars with your feet shoulder-width apart; Place your hands on the bars and lift your body off the ground, supporting your weight on your arms; Engage your abs and slowly lift your legs to the side, keeping them straight; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand between two parallel bars with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands on the bars and lift your body off the ground, supporting your weight on your arms.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly lift your legs to the side, keeping them straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Scapula Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập scapula push-up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line; Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body; As you lower, squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your chest forward; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 As you lower, squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your chest forward.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Endurance Style One Arm Dip
exercises.description: Bài tập endurance style one arm dip. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing away from a bench or chair, with your feet shoulder-width apart; Place one hand on the bench or chair behind you, fingers pointing towards your body. Maintain endurance form throughout; Extend your legs out in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground; Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench or chair; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing away from a bench or chair, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place one hand on the bench or chair behind you, fingers pointing towards your body. Maintain endurance form throughout.
Step:3 Extend your legs out in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground.
Step:4 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench or chair.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat with the other arm.

exercises.name: Elbow-To-Knee
exercises.description: Bài tập elbow-to-knee. Cách thực hiện: Start by lying flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards; Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee; At the same time, bring your left knee towards your right elbow, creating a twisting motion; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and extend your legs back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by lying flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee.
Step:4 At the same time, bring your left knee towards your right elbow, creating a twisting motion.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and extend your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement, this time bringing your left elbow towards your right knee and your right knee towards your left elbow.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Prone Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm prone curl. Cách thực hiện: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down; Extend your arm fully, letting it hang straight down towards the floor; Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down.
Step:2 Extend your arm fully, letting it hang straight down towards the floor.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Stability Style Band Kneeling One Arm Pulldown
exercises.name_vi: Stability Style Band Kneeling One Arm Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập stability style band kneeling one arm pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point above your head; Kneel down and hold the band with one hand, palm facing down; Extend your arm fully overhead, keeping your elbow slightly bent; Engage your lat muscles and pull the band down towards your side, bringing your elbow towards your ribcage; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point above your head.
Step:2 Kneel down and hold the band with one hand, palm facing down.
Step:3 Extend your arm fully overhead, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Step:4 Engage your lat muscles and pull the band down towards your side, bringing your elbow towards your ribcage.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides. Perform with stability intensity.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Shrug
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline shrug. Cách thực hiện: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand; Place your feet flat on the ground and let your arms hang straight down with your palms facing your body; Keeping your arms straight, shrug your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible; Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Place your feet flat on the ground and let your arms hang straight down with your palms facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, shrug your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Bent Arm Lateral Raise
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Seated Bent Arm Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated bent arm lateral raise. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle; Keeping your elbows bent, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Keeping your elbows bent, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward; Hold a weight in front of your chest or on your shoulders; Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips down and back, as if sitting into a chair; Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go; Push through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold a weight in front of your chest or on your shoulders.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips down and back, as if sitting into a chair.
Step:4 Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Push through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Triceps Dip On High Parallel Bars
exercises.name_vi: Weighted Triceps Dip On High Parallel Bars
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted triceps dip on high parallel bars. Cách thực hiện: Position yourself between two parallel bars with your hands gripping the bars and your arms fully extended; Bend your elbows and lower your body until your upper arms are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Position yourself between two parallel bars with your hands gripping the bars and your arms fully extended.
Step:2 Bend your elbows and lower your body until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying One Arm Press V. 2
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Lying One Arm Press V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying one arm press v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your back supported and feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing towards your feet; Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow slightly bent; Slowly lower the dumbbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbell back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your back supported and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing towards your feet.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Concentration Curl (On Stability Ball)
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Concentration Curl (On Stability Ball)
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm concentration curl (on stability ball). Cách thực hiện: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle; Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm extended down towards the floor; Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee; Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm extended down towards the floor.
Step:3 Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.

exercises.name: Reclining Big Toe Pose With Rope
exercises.name_vi: Reclining Big Toe Pose With Rope
exercises.description: Bài tập reclining big toe pose with rope. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides; Loop the rope around the ball of your right foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands; Slowly raise your right leg towards your chest, keeping your knee straight and your foot flexed; Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position; Repeat with your left leg
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Loop the rope around the ball of your right foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands.
Step:3 Slowly raise your right leg towards your chest, keeping your knee straight and your foot flexed.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Underhand Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập band underhand pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Attach the band to a high anchor point, such as a pull-up bar or sturdy beam; Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the band with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows slightly bent; Engage your lats and pull the band down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a high anchor point, such as a pull-up bar or sturdy beam.
Step:2 Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the band with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Engage your lats and pull the band down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lunge With Twist
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 As you lunge, twist your torso to the right, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, stepping forward with your left foot and twisting your torso to the left.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Advanced Windmill
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell advanced windmill. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward; Hold a kettlebell in your right hand, with your arm extended overhead and your palm facing forward; Rotate your left foot slightly to the right, and shift your weight onto your left leg; Bend your left knee and hinge at the hip, lowering your torso towards the left side; Keep your right arm extended overhead and your eyes on the kettlebell
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in your right hand, with your arm extended overhead and your palm facing forward.
Step:3 Rotate your left foot slightly to the right, and shift your weight onto your left leg.
Step:4 Bend your left knee and hinge at the hip, lowering your torso towards the left side.
Step:5 Keep your right arm extended overhead and your eyes on the kettlebell.
Step:6 As you lower your torso, allow your right leg to straighten and your right foot to pivot slightly.
Step:7 Lower your torso until you feel a stretch in your left hamstring and your right arm is pointing towards the ground.
Step:8 Pause for a moment, then engage your core and push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Band Jack Knife Sit-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập band jack knife sit-up. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band; Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body simultaneously, bringing your hands towards your feet; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band.
Step:2 Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body simultaneously, bringing your hands towards your feet.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell High Bar Squat Core
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell high bar squat core. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out; Place the barbell on your upper back, resting it on your traps; Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to squat down, pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Perform with core intensity; Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go; Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Place the barbell on your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to squat down, pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Perform with core intensity.
Step:4 Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Decline Seated Wide-Grip Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the decline bench facing the cable machine with your feet securely placed on the footrests.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with a wide overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the cable towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction, then slowly release the cable back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Sumo Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards.
Step:2 Place a barbell on the ground in front of you, centered between your feet.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lower your hips, keeping your back straight and chest up, to grip the barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:4 Engage your core and drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees simultaneously.
Step:5 As you lift, keep your chest up and back straight, and push your hips forward to fully engage your glutes.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Decline One Arm Press
exercises.description: Bài tập cable decline one arm press. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable machine to a decline position; Stand facing away from the machine and grab the handle with one hand; Position yourself with your back against the decline bench and your arm extended straight in front of you; Bend your elbow and lower the handle towards your chest while keeping your upper arm stationary; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handle back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine and grab the handle with one hand.
Step:3 Position yourself with your back against the decline bench and your arm extended straight in front of you.
Step:4 Bend your elbow and lower the handle towards your chest while keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handle back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Push-Up To Side Plank
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your core engaged.
Step:3 Push back up to the starting position.
Step:4 Shift your weight onto your left hand and rotate your body to the right, lifting your right arm towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Hold the side plank position for a few seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the push-up and side plank on the opposite side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the band handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully, pushing the bands away from your chest.
Step:4 Slowly lower the bands back down to your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Alternate Shoulder Press
exercises.description: Bài tập cable alternate shoulder press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the handles of the cable machine with an overhand grip; Position your hands at shoulder height, with your palms facing forward; Keep your core engaged and your back straight; Press one handle up and forward until your arm is fully extended; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handle back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the handles of the cable machine with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Position your hands at shoulder height, with your palms facing forward.
Step:3 Keep your core engaged and your back straight.
Step:4 Press one handle up and forward until your arm is fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:7 Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Over Bench One Arm Wrist Curl
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Over Bench One Arm Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell over bench one arm wrist curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down; Rest your forearm on the bench with your wrist hanging off the edge; Slowly curl your wrist upwards, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down.
Step:2 Rest your forearm on the bench with your wrist hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrist upwards, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Assisted Pull-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted pull-up. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height settings; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground; Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the handles, keeping your elbows close to your body; Continue pulling until your chin is above the handles
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height settings.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground.
Step:4 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the handles, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the handles.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Reverse Grip Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập lever reverse grip preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine; Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up; Rest your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your elbows are fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Rest your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your elbows are fully extended.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Bent Press
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell bent press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand; Bend your knees slightly and press the kettlebell overhead with your right arm, keeping your elbow locked; Rotate your torso to the left, shifting your weight onto your left foot; Bend your left knee and lower your torso towards the ground, keeping your right arm extended overhead; As you lower, keep your eyes on the kettlebell and your chest lifted
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and press the kettlebell overhead with your right arm, keeping your elbow locked.
Step:3 Rotate your torso to the left, shifting your weight onto your left foot.
Step:4 Bend your left knee and lower your torso towards the ground, keeping your right arm extended overhead.
Step:5 As you lower, keep your eyes on the kettlebell and your chest lifted.
Step:6 Once your left hand touches the ground, push through your left foot and straighten your left leg, driving your hips forward.
Step:7 As you drive your hips forward, use your core and right arm to press the kettlebell back up to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Crunch (Hands Overhead)
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight above your head.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Push-Up To Side Plank - Athletic Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your core engaged.
Step:3 Push back up to the starting position. Emphasize athletic control.
Step:4 Shift your weight onto your left hand and rotate your body to the right, lifting your right arm towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Hold the side plank position for a few seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the push-up and side plank on the opposite side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball One Leg Prone Lower Body Rotation Fierce
exercises.name_vi: Exercise Ball One Leg Prone Lower Body Rotation Fierce
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball one leg prone lower body rotation fierce. Cách thực hiện: Lie face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you; Place your hands on the ground in front of you for support; Engage your glutes and core muscles to stabilize your body; Slowly lift one leg off the ground, keeping it straight and parallel to the floor; Rotate your leg outward, away from your body, while keeping your hips and upper body stable
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground in front of you for support.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles to stabilize your body.
Step:4 Slowly lift one leg off the ground, keeping it straight and parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Rotate your leg outward, away from your body, while keeping your hips and upper body stable.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return your leg to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the rotation with the other leg. Focus on fierce movement.
Step:8 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Vertical Pallof Press - Seated Variation
exercises.name_vi: Band Vertical Pallof Press - Seated Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập band vertical pallof press - seated variation. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and wrap the band around a sturdy object at chest height; Hold the band with both hands and step away from the anchor point, creating tension in the band; Position yourself perpendicular to the anchor point, with your side facing the band; Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping your hands at chest height; Engage your core and press the band away from your chest, fully extending your arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and wrap the band around a sturdy object at chest height.
Step:2 Hold the band with both hands and step away from the anchor point, creating tension in the band.
Step:3 Position yourself perpendicular to the anchor point, with your side facing the band.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping your hands at chest height.
Step:5 Engage your core and press the band away from your chest, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Hold the position for a few seconds, then slowly bring the band back towards your chest.
