Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides. Perform with seated intensity.

exercises.name: Band One Arm Standing Low Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a stable anchor point at waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the band with one hand, palm facing inward, and step back to create tension in the band.
Step:4 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Pull the band towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the band back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Wheel Run
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a plank position with your hands on the wheel and your body straight.
Step:2 Engage your core and start rolling the wheel forward by extending your arms.
Step:3 Continue rolling until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead.
Step:4 Reverse the movement by pulling the wheel back towards your body, using your core and arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Concentration Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập band concentration curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench or chair with your legs spread apart and your feet flat on the ground; Hold one end of the band in your hand and step on the other end with your foot on the same side; Lean forward slightly and rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee; With your palm facing up, slowly curl your hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hand back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your legs spread apart and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold one end of the band in your hand and step on the other end with your foot on the same side.
Step:3 Lean forward slightly and rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:4 With your palm facing up, slowly curl your hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hand back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Forward Lunge (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập forward lunge (male). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips; Take a big step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position; Bend your right knee to about 90 degrees, keeping your knee aligned with your ankle; Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position; Repeat with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips.
Step:2 Take a big step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Bend your right knee to about 90 degrees, keeping your knee aligned with your ankle.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up overhead; Bend your elbows and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears; Pause for a moment, then straighten your arms and return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up overhead.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Waiter Biceps Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell waiter biceps curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward; Keep your upper arms close to your body and your elbows tucked in; Slowly curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your wrists straight; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your upper arms close to your body and your elbows tucked in.
Step:3 Slowly curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your wrists straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Standing Hip Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập cable standing hip extension. Cách thực hiện: Attach a cable to a low pulley and stand facing away from the machine; Place the cable around your ankle and stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the exercise; Slowly extend your leg straight back, squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement; Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a cable to a low pulley and stand facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Place the cable around your ankle and stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:4 Slowly extend your leg straight back, squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:7 Switch sides and repeat with the other leg.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Dip
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball dip. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle; Place your hands on the ball beside your hips, fingers pointing forward; Engage your triceps and push through your hands to lift your body off the ball, straightening your arms; Lower your body back down by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ball beside your hips, fingers pointing forward.
Step:3 Engage your triceps and push through your hands to lift your body off the ball, straightening your arms.
Step:4 Lower your body back down by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Reverse Grip Row (Female) Hold
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing your body. Perform with hold intensity.
Step:3 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Let your arms hang straight down, fully extended, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:5 Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Reverse Hyperextension
exercises.description: Bài tập lever reverse hyperextension. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the leverage machine to fit your body and secure your feet in the foot pads; Lie face down on the machine with your upper body hanging off the edge and your hips resting on the pad; Cross your arms over your chest or place them behind your head; Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your legs upward until they are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the leverage machine to fit your body and secure your feet in the foot pads.
Step:2 Lie face down on the machine with your upper body hanging off the edge and your hips resting on the pad.
Step:3 Cross your arms over your chest or place them behind your head.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your legs upward until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Seated Overhead Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it to shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the barbell overhead by extending your arms fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to shoulder level.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Plyo Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell plyo push-up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands on the kettlebells, shoulder-width apart; Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body; Push through your hands explosively, lifting your hands off the kettlebells and extending your arms fully; Land softly back on the kettlebells and immediately lower your chest back down for the next repetition; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands on the kettlebells, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 Push through your hands explosively, lifting your hands off the kettlebells and extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Land softly back on the kettlebells and immediately lower your chest back down for the next repetition.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Standing Wheel Rollerout
exercises.description: Bài tập standing wheel rollerout. Cách thực hiện: Start by standing tall with your feet shoulder-width apart and the wheel roller in front of you; Bend at your waist and slowly roll the wheel forward, keeping your back straight and your core engaged; Continue rolling forward until you feel a stretch in your abs and your body is extended as far as possible; Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your body, returning to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing tall with your feet shoulder-width apart and the wheel roller in front of you.
Step:2 Bend at your waist and slowly roll the wheel forward, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Continue rolling forward until you feel a stretch in your abs and your body is extended as far as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your body, returning to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Seated Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell seated calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and a barbell resting on your thighs; Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform, such as a block or step; Position the barbell across your thighs and hold it securely with your hands; Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, lift your heels off the ground by extending your ankles; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and a barbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform, such as a block or step.
Step:3 Position the barbell across your thighs and hold it securely with your hands.
Step:4 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, lift your heels off the ground by extending your ankles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Straight Leg Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập band straight leg deadlift. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your feet; Hold the band with both hands, palms facing your body, and keep your arms straight; Engage your core and maintain a slight bend in your knees; Slowly hinge forward at your hips, keeping your back straight and chest lifted; Lower the band towards the ground while keeping your legs straight
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your feet.
Step:2 Hold the band with both hands, palms facing your body, and keep your arms straight.
Step:3 Engage your core and maintain a slight bend in your knees.
Step:4 Slowly hinge forward at your hips, keeping your back straight and chest lifted.
Step:5 Lower the band towards the ground while keeping your legs straight.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Supine Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying supine curl. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps; Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Stiff Leg Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập band stiff leg deadlift. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your ankles; Hold the band with both hands in front of your thighs, palms facing your body; Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground; As you lower, push your hips back and allow your knees to bend slightly; Lower the band towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your ankles.
Step:2 Hold the band with both hands in front of your thighs, palms facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground.
Step:4 As you lower, push your hips back and allow your knees to bend slightly.
Step:5 Lower the band towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your upper body back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Pirate Supper Legs
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell pirate supper legs. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight; Raise the kettlebell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body; Extend your arm fully overhead, straightening your elbow; Lower the kettlebell back down to shoulder height, then return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Raise the kettlebell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Extend your arm fully overhead, straightening your elbow.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell back down to shoulder height, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Cable Kneeling Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập cable kneeling triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Attach a rope handle to a high pulley and kneel down facing the cable machine; Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and bring your hands to the sides of your head; Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise; Extend your forearms by contracting your triceps until your arms are fully extended; Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position by bending your elbows
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a high pulley and kneel down facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and bring your hands to the sides of your head.
Step:3 Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:4 Extend your forearms by contracting your triceps until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position by bending your elbows.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying One Arm Rear Lateral Raise
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Lying One Arm Rear Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying one arm rear lateral raise. Cách thực hiện: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, hanging towards the floor; Keep your arm straight and lift the dumbbell out to the side, away from your body; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, hanging towards the floor.
Step:2 Keep your arm straight and lift the dumbbell out to the side, away from your body.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Precision Style Lever Bent-Over Row With V-Bar
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Pull the v-bar towards your abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the weight back to the starting position. Emphasize precision control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Zottman Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell zottman curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body; Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate your palms to face forward; Curl the dumbbells up to your shoulders while keeping your upper arms stationary; At the top of the movement, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing away from your body; Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your palms back to facing your body
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate your palms to face forward.
Step:3 Curl the dumbbells up to your shoulders while keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing away from your body.
Step:5 Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your palms back to facing your body.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Step-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell step-up. Cách thực hiện: Stand in front of a bench or step with a barbell resting on your upper back; Place one foot on the bench or step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface; Push through your heel and step up onto the bench or step, fully extending your hip and knee; Pause briefly at the top, then lower yourself back down to the starting position; Repeat with the opposite leg
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a bench or step with a barbell resting on your upper back.
Step:2 Place one foot on the bench or step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface.
Step:3 Push through your heel and step up onto the bench or step, fully extending your hip and knee.
Step:4 Pause briefly at the top, then lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the opposite leg.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Inner Biceps Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated inner biceps curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up; Rest your upper arms on your thighs, allowing the dumbbells to hang down; Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on your thighs, allowing the dumbbells to hang down.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Reverse Grip Lateral Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập lever reverse grip lateral pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back; Pull the handles down towards your chest, leading with your elbows and squeezing your shoulder blades together; Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Pull the handles down towards your chest, leading with your elbows and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Standing Wide Military Press
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell standing wide military press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width; Lift the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly in front of the bar; Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully; Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width.
Step:2 Lift the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly in front of the bar.
Step:3 Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez Barbell Incline Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập ez barbell incline triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle; Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip; Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your head; Lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary; Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:4 Lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Standing Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the band with both hands and bring it up to your chest, keeping your elbows bent and close to your body.
Step:4 Engage your abs and slowly crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the crunch, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Flexion Leg Sit Up (Straight Arm)
exercises.description: Bài tập flexion leg sit up (straight arm). Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and arms straight above your head; Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground while simultaneously lifting your legs towards your chest; Reach your hands towards your toes as you lift your upper body and legs; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and arms straight above your head.
Step:2 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground while simultaneously lifting your legs towards your chest.
Step:3 Reach your hands towards your toes as you lift your upper body and legs.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Push-Up Close-Grip Off Dumbbell
exercises.description: Bài tập push-up close-grip off dumbbell. Cách thực hiện: Start in a push-up position with your hands placed close together, directly under your shoulders; Hold a dumbbell in each hand, resting them on the ground; Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides; Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands placed close together, directly under your shoulders.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, resting them on the ground.
Step:3 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:4 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Extension (Across Face)
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying extension (across face). Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench; Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing each other; Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell in an arc behind your head until your forearms are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment, then contract your triceps to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell in an arc behind your head until your forearms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then contract your triceps to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Figure 8
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell figure 8. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight; Pass the kettlebell between your legs, switching hands as it reaches the back of your legs; As the kettlebell comes forward, pass it to the other hand between your legs; Continue passing the kettlebell between your legs in a figure 8 motion
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Pass the kettlebell between your legs, switching hands as it reaches the back of your legs.
Step:4 As the kettlebell comes forward, pass it to the other hand between your legs.
Step:5 Continue passing the kettlebell between your legs in a figure 8 motion.
Step:6 Maintain a steady pace and engage your core throughout the exercise.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Seated Twist Pure
exercises.description: Bài tập band seated twist pure. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you and your back straight; Wrap the band around your waist and hold the ends with both hands; Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to one side, keeping your back straight and your feet on the ground; Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position; (pure variation) Repeat the twist to the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you and your back straight.
Step:2 Wrap the band around your waist and hold the ends with both hands.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to one side, keeping your back straight and your feet on the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 (pure variation) Repeat the twist to the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing Front Raise Above Head
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Standing Front Raise Above Head
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing front raise above head. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip; Keep your arms straight and lift the dumbbells in front of you, raising them above your head; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and lift the dumbbells in front of you, raising them above your head.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Pull-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended.
Step:2 Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Step:3 Pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbows and bringing your chest towards the bar.
Step:4 Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Prone Leg Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a mat with your legs extended and your toes resting on top of the stability ball.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground, shoulder-width apart, and engage your core muscles.
Step:3 Keeping your legs straight, slowly lift them off the ground, using your lower back and glutes to raise them as high as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Inner Biceps Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline inner biceps curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other; Rest your upper arms on the bench, allowing your elbows to hang down and your palms to face forward; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on the bench, allowing your elbows to hang down and your palms to face forward.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing Alternate Hammer Curl And Press
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Standing Alternate Hammer Curl And Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing alternate hammer curl and press. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body; Keep your elbows close to your torso and your back straight; Exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary; Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level; Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your back straight.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the curl with your left hand.
Step:7 After completing the curl with your left hand, exhale and press the dumbbell in your right hand overhead.
Step:8 Extend your arm fully and hold for a moment at the top.
Step:9 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:10 Repeat the press with your left hand.
Step:11 Continue alternating between curls and presses for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Push-Up (Wall)
exercises.description: Bài tập push-up (wall). Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away; Place your hands on the wall at shoulder height, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Step back a few feet, keeping your body straight and your feet hip-width apart; Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the wall, keeping your body in a straight line; Push back up to the starting position, straightening your arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away.
Step:2 Place your hands on the wall at shoulder height, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Step back a few feet, keeping your body straight and your feet hip-width apart.
Step:4 Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the wall, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:5 Push back up to the starting position, straightening your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Lat Pulldown Full Range Of Motion
exercises.name_vi: Cable Lat Pulldown Full Range Of Motion
exercises.description: Bài tập cable lat pulldown full range of motion. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the lat pulldown machine with your knees positioned under the pads; Grasp the cable bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back; Pull the bar down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together; Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the lat pulldown machine with your knees positioned under the pads.
Step:2 Grasp the cable bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Pull the bar down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Firm Style Hanging Oblique Knee Raise
exercises.name_vi: Firm Style Hanging Oblique Knee Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập firm style hanging oblique knee raise. Cách thực hiện: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you; Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, twisting your torso to the side as you do so; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat on the other side, twisting your torso in the opposite direction; Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions. Emphasize firm control
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, twisting your torso to the side as you do so.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat on the other side, twisting your torso in the opposite direction.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions. Emphasize firm control.

exercises.name: Smith Front Squat (Clean Grip)
exercises.description: Bài tập smith front squat (clean grip). Cách thực hiện: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at shoulder height; Stand facing the barbell with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Step back and position the barbell on your front shoulders, resting it on your collarbone and deltoids; Keep your chest up, back straight, and core engaged
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at shoulder height.
Step:2 Stand facing the barbell with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Step back and position the barbell on your front shoulders, resting it on your collarbone and deltoids.
Step:5 Keep your chest up, back straight, and core engaged.
Step:6 Lower your body by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:7 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:8 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Sharp Style Dumbbell Sumo Pull Through
exercises.name_vi: Sharp Style Dumbbell Sumo Pull Through
exercises.description: Bài tập sharp style dumbbell sumo pull through. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointed outwards; Hold a dumbbell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended; Bend your knees and lower your hips down into a squat position, keeping your back straight. Focus on sharp movement; Lower the dumbbell down between your legs, keeping your arms straight; Drive through your heels and extend your hips forward, pulling the dumbbell up and in front of your body
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointed outwards.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lower your hips down into a squat position, keeping your back straight. Focus on sharp movement.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell down between your legs, keeping your arms straight.
Step:5 Drive through your heels and extend your hips forward, pulling the dumbbell up and in front of your body.
Step:6 Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement, then lower the dumbbell back down between your legs.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Straight Back Stiff Leg Deadlift
exercises.name_vi: Band Straight Back Stiff Leg Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập band straight back stiff leg deadlift. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your upper legs; Hold the band with both hands in front of your thighs, palms facing your body; Keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent, hinge at the hips and lower the band towards the ground; Feel the stretch in your hamstrings as you lower the band; Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your body back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your upper legs.
Step:2 Hold the band with both hands in front of your thighs, palms facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent, hinge at the hips and lower the band towards the ground.
Step:4 Feel the stretch in your hamstrings as you lower the band.
Step:5 Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your body back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Hang Clean
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell hang clean. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your thighs; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight; Lower the kettlebell towards the ground, allowing it to swing between your legs; Quickly extend your hips and knees, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height; As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebell in the rack position, with your elbow tucked in and the kettlebell resting on your forearm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your thighs.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Lower the kettlebell towards the ground, allowing it to swing between your legs.
Step:4 Quickly extend your hips and knees, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height.
Step:5 As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebell in the rack position, with your elbow tucked in and the kettlebell resting on your forearm.
Step:6 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position between your legs, and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Pullover Hip Extension On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Pullover Hip Extension On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell pullover hip extension on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and the dumbbell resting on your thighs; Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball down your back until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball; Hold the dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows; Lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your arms straight and maintaining control; Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and the dumbbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball down your back until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your arms straight and maintaining control.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 While keeping your arms extended, lift your hips off the ground, squeezing your glutes and engaging your core.
Step:7 Lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Prone Hammer Curl
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Prone Hammer Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm prone hammer curl. Cách thực hiện: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing your body and arm fully extended; Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing your body and arm fully extended.
Step:2 Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Jump Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập jump squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back; Jump explosively off the ground, extending your hips, knees, and ankles; While in mid-air, quickly bring your arms forward for balance; Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately go into the next repetition
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 Jump explosively off the ground, extending your hips, knees, and ankles.
Step:4 While in mid-air, quickly bring your arms forward for balance.
Step:5 Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately go into the next repetition.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Lying Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập cable lying fly. Cách thực hiện: Attach the handles to the cables and lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground; Hold the handles with your palms facing each other and your arms extended straight above your chest; Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest; Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring your arms back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the handles to the cables and lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the handles with your palms facing each other and your arms extended straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Elbow Dips
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge next to your hips.
Step:2 Slide your hips forward off the bench and straighten your legs, keeping your heels on the ground.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to straighten your arms and lift your body back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Hammer Press
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Hammer Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline one arm hammer press. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your thigh; Lean back on the bench and use your thigh to help raise the dumbbell to shoulder height; Rotate your wrist so that your palm is facing inward, towards your body; Press the dumbbell up and away from your body, extending your arm fully; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your thigh.
Step:2 Lean back on the bench and use your thigh to help raise the dumbbell to shoulder height.
Step:3 Rotate your wrist so that your palm is facing inward, towards your body.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell up and away from your body, extending your arm fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Fly On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Fly On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline one arm fly on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand; Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball; Hold the dumbbell with your arm extended straight up over your chest, palm facing inwards; Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow; Pause for a moment when your arm is parallel to the ground
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell with your arm extended straight up over your chest, palm facing inwards.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Engage your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Assisted Standing Chin-Up With Focused
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted standing chin-up with focused. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the machine to your desired assistance level; (focused variation) Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Keep your chest up and shoulders back, engage your core, and slightly bend your knees; Pull your body up by flexing your elbows and driving your elbows down towards your sides; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to your desired assistance level.
Step:2 (focused variation) Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your chest up and shoulders back, engage your core, and slightly bend your knees.
Step:4 Pull your body up by flexing your elbows and driving your elbows down towards your sides.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Donkey Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted donkey calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand on a raised platform with your toes on the edge and your heels hanging off; Hold onto a stable object for support; Raise your heels as high as possible by extending your ankles; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand on a raised platform with your toes on the edge and your heels hanging off.
Step:2 Hold onto a stable object for support.
Step:3 Raise your heels as high as possible by extending your ankles.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Decline Close Grip To Skull Press
exercises.name_vi: Barbell Decline Close Grip To Skull Press
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell decline close grip to skull press. Cách thực hiện: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and hold a barbell with a close grip; Lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary; Pause for a moment, then extend your arms to press the barbell back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and hold a barbell with a close grip.
Step:2 Lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms to press the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Rear Delt Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell rear delt raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight; Raise the barbell out to the sides, keeping your arms straight, until they are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Raise the barbell out to the sides, keeping your arms straight, until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Single Leg Platform Slide
exercises.description: Bài tập single leg platform slide. Cách thực hiện: Start by standing with one foot on a platform or slide board; Bend your knee slightly and slide the foot on the platform backward, extending your leg; Keep your core engaged and maintain a straight posture throughout the movement; Slowly return to the starting position by sliding your foot back to the initial position; Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with one foot on a platform or slide board.
Step:2 Bend your knee slightly and slide the foot on the platform backward, extending your leg.
Step:3 Keep your core engaged and maintain a straight posture throughout the movement.
Step:4 Slowly return to the starting position by sliding your foot back to the initial position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.name: Chest Dip On Straight Bar
exercises.description: Bài tập chest dip on straight bar. Cách thực hiện: Grab the parallel bars with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended; Bend your knees and cross your ankles; Lower your body by bending your arms until your shoulders are below your elbows; Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Grab the parallel bars with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended.
Step:2 Bend your knees and cross your ankles.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your arms until your shoulders are below your elbows.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Fast Band Straight Leg Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập fast band straight leg deadlift. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your feet; Hold the band with both hands, palms facing your body, and keep your arms straight; Engage your core and maintain a slight bend in your knees; Slowly hinge forward at your hips, keeping your back straight and chest lifted; Lower the band towards the ground while keeping your legs straight
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your feet.
Step:2 Hold the band with both hands, palms facing your body, and keep your arms straight.
Step:3 Engage your core and maintain a slight bend in your knees.
Step:4 Slowly hinge forward at your hips, keeping your back straight and chest lifted.
Step:5 Lower the band towards the ground while keeping your legs straight.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Perform with fast intensity.

exercises.name: Cable Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable wrist curl. Cách thực hiện: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine; Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart; Rest your forearms on a bench or pad, with your wrists hanging off the edge; Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Rest your forearms on a bench or pad, with your wrists hanging off the edge.
Step:5 Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Reverse Calf Raises
exercises.description: Bài tập smith reverse calf raises. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the smith machine bar to a height just below your shoulders; Stand facing the bar with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointing forward; Place the balls of your feet on the edge of a step or platform, with your heels hanging off; Hold onto the bar for support; Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body up onto your toes
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine bar to a height just below your shoulders.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Place the balls of your feet on the edge of a step or platform, with your heels hanging off.
Step:4 Hold onto the bar for support.
Step:5 Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Zercher Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell zercher squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out; Hold the barbell in the crooks of your elbows, with your hands gripping the bar for stability; Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you lower your hips back and down into a squat position; Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels; Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell in the crooks of your elbows, with your hands gripping the bar for stability.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you lower your hips back and down into a squat position.
Step:4 Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Reverse Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Fly On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell fly on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball and hold a dumbbell in each hand; Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported by the ball; Extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing each other; Bend your elbows slightly and lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest; Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and squeeze your chest muscles as you bring the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported by the ball.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Bend your elbows slightly and lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and squeeze your chest muscles as you bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Bent-Over Row With V-Bar
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Pull the v-bar towards your abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the weight back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Standing Reverse Grip Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell standing reverse grip curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up; Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary; Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the barbell as close to your shoulders as possible; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps; Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the barbell as close to your shoulders as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lean Planche
exercises.description: Bài tập lean planche. Cách thực hiện: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body straight; Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, bringing your shoulders past your hands; Keep your elbows slightly bent and your body straight as you lean forward; Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body straight.
Step:2 Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, bringing your shoulders past your hands.
Step:3 Keep your elbows slightly bent and your body straight as you lean forward.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Revers Grip Concentration Curl
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Seated Revers Grip Concentration Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated revers grip concentration curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up; Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee; Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder; Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps; Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Step:2 Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: All Fours Squad Stretch - Elevated Variation
exercises.name_vi: All Fours Squad Stretch - Elevated Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập all fours squad stretch - elevated variation. Cách thực hiện: Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips; Extend one leg straight back, keeping your knee bent and your foot flexed. Maintain elevated form throughout; Slowly lower your hips towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your quads; Hold this position for 20-30 seconds; Switch legs and repeat the stretch on the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips.
Step:2 Extend one leg straight back, keeping your knee bent and your foot flexed. Maintain elevated form throughout.
Step:3 Slowly lower your hips towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your quads.
Step:4 Hold this position for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Switch legs and repeat the stretch on the other side.

exercises.name: Calf Stretch With Hands Against Wall
exercises.name_vi: Calf Stretch With Hands Against Wall
exercises.description: Bài tập calf stretch with hands against wall. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart; Place your hands against the wall at shoulder height; Step your right foot back, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight; Bend your left knee and lean forward, keeping your back leg straight and your heel on the ground; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands against the wall at shoulder height.
Step:3 Step your right foot back, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight.
Step:4 Bend your left knee and lean forward, keeping your back leg straight and your heel on the ground.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Switch legs and repeat the stretch.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Supination
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying supination. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders by contracting your forearms; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders by contracting your forearms.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Standing Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted standing curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward; Keep your elbows close to your torso and exhale as you curl the weights up to shoulder level; Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the weights back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and exhale as you curl the weights up to shoulder level.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the weights back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball One Leg Prone Lower Body Rotation
exercises.name_vi: Exercise Ball One Leg Prone Lower Body Rotation
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball one leg prone lower body rotation. Cách thực hiện: Lie face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you; Place your hands on the ground in front of you for support; Engage your glutes and core muscles to stabilize your body; Slowly lift one leg off the ground, keeping it straight and parallel to the floor; Rotate your leg outward, away from your body, while keeping your hips and upper body stable
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground in front of you for support.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles to stabilize your body.
Step:4 Slowly lift one leg off the ground, keeping it straight and parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Rotate your leg outward, away from your body, while keeping your hips and upper body stable.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return your leg to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the rotation with the other leg.
Step:8 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Double Snatch
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell double snatch. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at arm's length in front of your thighs; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back flat and chest up; In one explosive motion, extend your hips, knees, and ankles, and simultaneously pull the kettlebells up towards your shoulders; As the kettlebells reach shoulder level, rotate your wrists and punch the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms; Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at arm's length in front of your thighs.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back flat and chest up.
Step:3 In one explosive motion, extend your hips, knees, and ankles, and simultaneously pull the kettlebells up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 As the kettlebells reach shoulder level, rotate your wrists and punch the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez Barbell Close Grip Preacher Curl - Precision Variation
exercises.name_vi: Ez Barbell Close Grip Preacher Curl - Precision Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập ez barbell close grip preacher curl - precision variation. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the ez barbell with an underhand grip; Rest your triceps on the pad and fully extend your arms, keeping your back straight; Slowly curl the barbell towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps; Lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the ez barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Rest your triceps on the pad and fully extend your arms, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Slowly curl the barbell towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Emphasize precision control.

exercises.name: Lever Assisted Chin-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập lever assisted chin-up. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the leverage machine to your desired resistance level; Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang with your arms fully extended, keeping your body straight; Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the handles, leading with your chest; Continue pulling until your chin is above the handles
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the leverage machine to your desired resistance level.
Step:2 Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang with your arms fully extended, keeping your body straight.
Step:4 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the handles, leading with your chest.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the handles.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Stretched Full Planche Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập stretched full planche push-up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a push-up position with your hands placed slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Engage your core and lower your body down towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides; As you lower yourself, lean your body forward and lift your feet off the ground, balancing on your hands. Perform with stretched intensity; Continue to lower your body until your chest is just above the ground; Push through your hands and extend your arms to lift your body back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands placed slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body down towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 As you lower yourself, lean your body forward and lift your feet off the ground, balancing on your hands. Perform with stretched intensity.
Step:4 Continue to lower your body until your chest is just above the ground.
Step:5 Push through your hands and extend your arms to lift your body back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Maintain a straight line from your head to your heels throughout the movement.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Jackknife Sit-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập jackknife sit-up.
