Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms overhead; Engage your core and lift your legs and upper body simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms overhead.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs and upper body simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Muscle Up (On Bar)
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and pull your chest towards the bar, keeping your body straight.
Step:4 Once your chest reaches the bar, push down with your hands and drive your elbows back, lifting your body above the bar.
Step:5 Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Crunch (On Stability Ball)
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie back on the ball until your lower back is supported and your upper body is parallel to the floor.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Step:4 Engage your abs and lift your upper body towards your knees, curling your torso forward.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Quads Complex
exercises.description: Bài tập quads complex. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back as if sitting on a chair; Keep your chest up and your back straight; Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground; Push through your heels to return to the starting position. Emphasize complex control
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back as if sitting on a chair.
Step:3 Keep your chest up and your back straight.
Step:4 Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Push through your heels to return to the starting position. Emphasize complex control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Bench Pull-Ups
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Position yourself under a bar or a sturdy horizontal surface that is at chest height.
Step:2 Grab the bar or surface with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:4 Pull your chest towards the bar or surface by squeezing your shoulder blades together and bending your elbows.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar or surface.
Step:6 Lower yourself back down to the starting position with control.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Prisoner Half Sit-Up (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập prisoner half sit-up (male). Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards; Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Rope Extension Incline Bench Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle and attach a cable machine to the low pulley.
Step:2 Attach a rope handle to the cable machine and sit on the incline bench facing the machine.
Step:3 Grab the rope handle with an overhand grip and lean forward, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, pulling the rope towards your upper chest while keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement.
Step:6 Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Cable One Arm Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập cable one arm press on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a cable handle in one hand and position your arm at chest height, elbow bent; Place your other hand on your hip for stability; Press the cable handle forward, extending your arm fully; Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle in one hand and position your arm at chest height, elbow bent.
Step:3 Place your other hand on your hip for stability.
Step:4 Press the cable handle forward, extending your arm fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Lever Gripper Hands
exercises.description: Bài tập lever gripper hands. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and grip the handles of the leverage machine; Keep your back straight and your feet flat on the ground; Exhale and squeeze the handles, contracting your forearms; Hold the contraction for a second, then slowly release and return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and grip the handles of the leverage machine.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Exhale and squeeze the handles, contracting your forearms.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a second, then slowly release and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell bench squat. Cách thực hiện: Place a dumbbell on the ground in front of a bench; Stand facing away from the bench with your feet shoulder-width apart; Bend at the knees and hips to lower yourself down towards the bench, keeping your chest up and back straight; Once your glutes touch the bench, push through your heels to stand back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place a dumbbell on the ground in front of a bench.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the bench with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend at the knees and hips to lower yourself down towards the bench, keeping your chest up and back straight.
Step:4 Once your glutes touch the bench, push through your heels to stand back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other; Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body; Lower the dumbbells down towards your forehead, bending your elbows; Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells down towards your forehead, bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lying Leg-Hip Raise - Contracted Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập lying leg-hip raise - contracted variation. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides; Place your hands under your glutes for support; Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, raising them towards the ceiling; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Emphasize contracted control; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, raising them towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Emphasize contracted control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Straight Leg Outer Hip Abductor
exercises.description: Bài tập straight leg outer hip abductor. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your side with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other; Place your bottom arm under your head for support; Engage your core and lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips or leaning backward; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Place your bottom arm under your head for support.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips or leaning backward.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Controlled Wrist Rollerer
exercises.description: Bài tập controlled wrist rollerer. Cách thực hiện: Attach a weight to one end of a rope or bar; Hold the other end of the rope or bar with both hands, palms facing down; Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms fully extended in front of you; Slowly roll the weight up towards your hands by flexing your wrists; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the weight back down to the starting position. Perform with controlled intensity
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a weight to one end of a rope or bar.
Step:2 Hold the other end of the rope or bar with both hands, palms facing down.
Step:3 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms fully extended in front of you.
Step:4 Slowly roll the weight up towards your hands by flexing your wrists.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the weight back down to the starting position. Perform with controlled intensity.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Jack Burpee
exercises.description: Bài tập jack burpee. Cách thực hiện: Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart; Lower your body into a squat position, placing your hands on the ground in front of you; Kick your feet back, landing in a push-up position; Perform a push-up, lowering your chest to the ground and then pushing back up; Jump your feet forward, landing in a squat position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position, placing your hands on the ground in front of you.
Step:3 Kick your feet back, landing in a push-up position.
Step:4 Perform a push-up, lowering your chest to the ground and then pushing back up.
Step:5 Jump your feet forward, landing in a squat position.
Step:6 Jump up explosively, reaching your arms overhead.
Step:7 Land softly and immediately lower back into the squat position to begin the next repetition.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Arnold Press - Beginner Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell arnold press - beginner variation. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing towards you; Engage your core and press the kettlebells overhead, rotating your palms to face forward as you extend your arms. Emphasize beginner control; Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing towards you.
Step:2 Engage your core and press the kettlebells overhead, rotating your palms to face forward as you extend your arms. Emphasize beginner control.
Step:3 Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Inverted Style Smith Seated Shoulder Press
exercises.name_vi: Inverted Style Smith Seated Shoulder Press
exercises.description: Bài tập inverted style smith seated shoulder press. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height so that the handles are at shoulder level; Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and lift them off the supports, extending your arms fully; Lower the handles down to shoulder level, keeping your elbows slightly bent; Press the handles up overhead until your arms are fully extended
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that the handles are at shoulder level.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and lift them off the supports, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Lower the handles down to shoulder level, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Press the handles up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to shoulder level. Maintain inverted form throughout.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Rotary Calf
exercises.description: Bài tập lever rotary calf. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height so that your knees are slightly bent and your feet are flat on the footplate; Place your toes on the footplate, with your heels hanging off the edge; Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability; Push through the balls of your feet, raising your heels as high as possible; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your knees are slightly bent and your feet are flat on the footplate.
Step:2 Place your toes on the footplate, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Push through the balls of your feet, raising your heels as high as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Inverse Leg Curl (Bench Support)
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a bench with your hips at the edge and your legs extended straight behind you.
Step:2 Hold onto the bench for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper body still, bend your knees and curl your legs towards your glutes.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly extend your legs back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Skin The Cat
exercises.description: Bài tập skin the cat. Cách thực hiện: Start by hanging from a bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed; Engage your core and lift your legs up, bringing your knees towards your chest; Continue to lift your legs up and over your head, allowing your body to pass through the arms; Once your legs are fully extended over your head, begin to lower them back down towards the starting position; As you lower your legs, allow your body to pass back through the arms until you are hanging with your arms fully extended again
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:3 Continue to lift your legs up and over your head, allowing your body to pass through the arms.
Step:4 Once your legs are fully extended over your head, begin to lower them back down towards the starting position.
Step:5 As you lower your legs, allow your body to pass back through the arms until you are hanging with your arms fully extended again.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Front Shoulder Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập cable front shoulder raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip; Keep your back straight and your core engaged; Raise the cable handle in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down; Continue lifting until your arms are parallel to the floor; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Raise the cable handle in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Finger Curls
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell finger curls. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your forearm on your thigh, palm facing up; Allow the dumbbell to roll down to your fingertips, then curl it back up by flexing your fingers; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your forearm on your thigh, palm facing up.
Step:3 Allow the dumbbell to roll down to your fingertips, then curl it back up by flexing your fingers.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Rear Delt Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell rear delt raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight; Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Bench Dip
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted bench dip. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward; Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands; Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor; Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Single Arm Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập single arm push-up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and one hand placed slightly wider than the other; Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight; As you lower yourself, shift your weight to one side and lift the opposite arm off the ground, extending it straight out to the side; Push through your chest and triceps to raise your body back up to the starting position, while simultaneously lowering your extended arm back to the ground; Repeat the movement, alternating the arm you extend with each repetition
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and one hand placed slightly wider than the other.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 As you lower yourself, shift your weight to one side and lift the opposite arm off the ground, extending it straight out to the side.
Step:4 Push through your chest and triceps to raise your body back up to the starting position, while simultaneously lowering your extended arm back to the ground.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, alternating the arm you extend with each repetition.

exercises.name: Cable Judo Flip
exercises.description: Bài tập cable judo flip. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Hold the cable handle with both hands at chest level, palms facing down; Engage your core and rotate your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body; As you rotate, pivot your back foot and allow your hips to rotate naturally; Extend your arms fully and finish the movement by flipping the cable handle over your shoulder
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands at chest level, palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your core and rotate your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body.
Step:4 As you rotate, pivot your back foot and allow your hips to rotate naturally.
Step:5 Extend your arms fully and finish the movement by flipping the cable handle over your shoulder.
Step:6 Return to the starting position by reversing the movement, rotating your torso back to the center.
Step:7 Repeat the movement on the opposite side.
Step:8 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Single Arm Overhead Carry
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell single arm overhead carry. Cách thực hiện: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand; Raise the dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm; Engage your core and keep your back straight as you walk forward, maintaining the dumbbell overhead; Continue walking for the desired distance or time; Switch hands and repeat the exercise
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your back straight as you walk forward, maintaining the dumbbell overhead.
Step:4 Continue walking for the desired distance or time.
Step:5 Switch hands and repeat the exercise.

exercises.name: Quick Feet V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập quick feet v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides; Begin by rapidly moving your feet up and down, as if you were running in place; Keep your movements quick and light, focusing on staying on the balls of your feet; Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Begin by rapidly moving your feet up and down, as if you were running in place.
Step:3 Keep your movements quick and light, focusing on staying on the balls of your feet.
Step:4 Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Groin Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Prone Incline Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell prone incline curl. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline; Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Inverted Row On Bench
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up a bench at a height that allows your body to hang freely underneath it.
Step:2 Lie face up on the ground with your head towards the bench.
Step:3 Reach up and grab the bench with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Position your body so that your heels are on the ground and your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull your chest up towards the bench.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Leg Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the machine to fit your body.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footpad.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or sidebars for stability.
Step:4 Extend your legs forward by straightening your knees, lifting the weight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the weight back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Decline Reverse-Grip Press
exercises.description: Bài tập smith decline reverse-grip press. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the smith machine to a decline position; Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads; Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Unrack the barbell and lower it towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Seated Reverse Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập lever seated reverse fly. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms slightly bent; Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body; Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms slightly bent.
Step:3 Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Tough Cable One Arm Lateral Raise
exercises.name_vi: Tough Cable One Arm Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập tough cable one arm lateral raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine; Hold the cable handle with one hand, palm facing down, and stand far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable; Keep your arm straight and slowly raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position. Focus on tough movement; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with one hand, palm facing down, and stand far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable.
Step:3 Keep your arm straight and slowly raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position. Focus on tough movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Pronation
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying pronation. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your chest facing down and your arms extended straight down, holding a dumbbell in each hand; Rotate your palms so they are facing up; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells as you rotate your palms to face down; Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your chest facing down and your arms extended straight down, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Rotate your palms so they are facing up.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells as you rotate your palms to face down.
Step:4 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lunge With Bicep Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lunge with bicep curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward; Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. Your right knee should be bent at a 90-degree angle and your left knee should be hovering just above the ground; As you lunge forward, simultaneously curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body; Pause for a moment at the bottom of the lunge, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position, lowering the dumbbells back down to your sides; Repeat the lunge and bicep curl on the opposite side, stepping forward with your left foot
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward.

Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. Your right knee should be bent at a 90-degree angle and your left knee should be hovering just above the ground.
Step:3 As you lunge forward, simultaneously curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the lunge, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position, lowering the dumbbells back down to your sides.
Step:5 Repeat the lunge and bicep curl on the opposite side, stepping forward with your left foot.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Back Shrug
exercises.description: Bài tập smith back shrug. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Keep your arms straight and allow the barbell to hang in front of your thighs; Lift your shoulders straight up towards your ears, squeezing your traps at the top; Hold for a moment, then lower your shoulders back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your arms straight and allow the barbell to hang in front of your thighs.
Step:4 Lift your shoulders straight up towards your ears, squeezing your traps at the top.
Step:5 Hold for a moment, then lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Assisted Chin-Up With Twisted
exercises.description: Bài tập lever assisted chin-up with twisted. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the leverage machine to your desired resistance level; Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang with your arms fully extended, keeping your body straight; (twisted variation) Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the handles, leading with your chest; Continue pulling until your chin is above the handles
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the leverage machine to your desired resistance level.
Step:2 Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang with your arms fully extended, keeping your body straight.
Step:4 (twisted variation) Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the handles, leading with your chest.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the handles.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm lateral raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing your body; Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise; Raise the dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down; Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Side Cable High Row (Kneeling)
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Kneel down in front of the cable machine and grab the bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit back on your heels, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the bar towards your upper abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Maintain side form throughout.

exercises.name: Wheel Rollerout
exercises.description: Bài tập wheel rollerout. Cách thực hiện: Kneel on the floor and place the wheel roller in front of you; Place your hands on the handles of the wheel roller and extend your arms straight out in front of you; Engage your core muscles and slowly roll the wheel forward, keeping your back straight and your abs tight; Continue rolling forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead; Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your knees, maintaining control and keeping your abs engaged
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Kneel on the floor and place the wheel roller in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the handles of the wheel roller and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Engage your core muscles and slowly roll the wheel forward, keeping your back straight and your abs tight.
Step:4 Continue rolling forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your knees, maintaining control and keeping your abs engaged.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Arms Overhead Full Sit-Up (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập arms overhead full sit-up (male). Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Extend your arms overhead, keeping them straight; Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is upright; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Extend your arms overhead, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is upright.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Triceps Extension (On Bench)
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Triceps Extension (On Bench)
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm triceps extension (on bench). Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your other hand on the bench for support; Raise the dumbbell overhead, keeping your upper arm close to your head and your elbow pointing forward; Lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow, keeping your upper arm stationary; Extend your arm back up to the starting position, fully straightening your elbow
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your other hand on the bench for support.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbell overhead, keeping your upper arm close to your head and your elbow pointing forward.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:5 Extend your arm back up to the starting position, fully straightening your elbow.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Biceps Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell biceps curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps; Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Push-Up (Wall) V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập push-up (wall) v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away; Place your hands on the wall at shoulder height, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Step back with your feet, keeping them hip-width apart; Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to heels; Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the wall, keeping your body straight
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away.
Step:2 Place your hands on the wall at shoulder height, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Step back with your feet, keeping them hip-width apart.
Step:4 Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Step:5 Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the wall, keeping your body straight.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Reverse Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your arms extended along your sides.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lift your feet off the ground, bringing your thighs perpendicular to the floor.
Step:3 Contract your abs and curl your hips off the floor, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Standing Wide-Grip Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell standing wide-grip curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart; Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palms facing away from your body; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell upward by contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palms facing away from your body.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell upward by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez Bar Lying Bent Arms Pullover
exercises.name_vi: Ez Bar Lying Bent Arms Pullover
exercises.description: Bài tập ez bar lying bent arms pullover. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor; Hold the EZ barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and your hands shoulder-width apart; Extend your arms straight above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows; Lower the barbell in an arc motion behind your head, maintaining the slight bend in your elbows; Pause for a moment, then return the barbell to the starting position by reversing the arc motion
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Step:2 Hold the EZ barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the barbell in an arc motion behind your head, maintaining the slight bend in your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return the barbell to the starting position by reversing the arc motion.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Floor Fly (With Barbell)
exercises.description: Bài tập floor fly (with barbell). Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, arms extended straight up over your chest; Slowly lower the barbell out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows; Lower the barbell until your arms are parallel to the floor, feeling a stretch in your chest; Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the barbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, arms extended straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Slowly lower the barbell out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the barbell until your arms are parallel to the floor, feeling a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Biceps Curl Reverse
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell biceps curl reverse. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down and arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps; Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Pulldown (With Rope Attachment) Core
exercises.name_vi: Cable Lateral Pulldown (With Rope Attachment) Core
exercises.description: Bài tập cable lateral pulldown (with rope attachment) core. Cách thực hiện: Attach a rope attachment to the cable machine at a high position; Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing each other; Keep your back straight and lean slightly back; Pull the rope down towards your sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Emphasize core control
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope attachment to the cable machine at a high position.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and lean slightly back.
Step:5 Pull the rope down towards your sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Emphasize core control.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the tension and allow the rope to return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Alternate Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying alternate extension. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other; Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows; Lower one dumbbell down towards your head, bending at the elbow, while keeping the other arm extended; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position; Repeat with the other arm, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Lower one dumbbell down towards your head, bending at the elbow, while keeping the other arm extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Rear Delt Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your core engaged as you pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Seated Behind Head Military Press
exercises.name_vi: Barbell Seated Behind Head Military Press
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell seated behind head military press. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it down to shoulder level, behind your head; Press the barbell upward until your arms are fully extended; Lower the barbell back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it down to shoulder level, behind your head.
Step:4 Press the barbell upward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Reverse Grip Row (Female)
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing your body.
Step:3 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Let your arms hang straight down, fully extended, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:5 Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Twisted Side-To-Side Chin
exercises.description: Bài tập twisted side-to-side chin. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed; Pull yourself up by bending your elbows and bringing your chin towards the bar, while keeping your body straight; Once your chin is above the bar, lower yourself back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed.
Step:4 Pull yourself up by bending your elbows and bringing your chin towards the bar, while keeping your body straight.
Step:5 Once your chin is above the bar, lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Perform with twisted intensity.

exercises.name: Cable Seated Chest Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and cable handles to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back straight and feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip at shoulder height.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body, extending your arms fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Biceps Curl Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell biceps curl squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward; Keeping your back straight and your elbows close to your sides, exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders; Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps; Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your elbows close to your sides, exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:4 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shrug
exercises.description: Bài tập vai với tạ đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and let the dumbbells hang by your sides.
Step:3 Raise your shoulders as high as possible, as if you are trying to touch your ears with your shoulders.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a second, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Pelvic Tilt
exercises.description: Bài tập pelvic tilt. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place your hands by your sides; Engage your abs and tilt your pelvis upward, pressing your lower back into the ground; Hold this position for a few seconds, focusing on contracting your abs; Release the tilt and return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands by your sides.
Step:3 Engage your abs and tilt your pelvis upward, pressing your lower back into the ground.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, focusing on contracting your abs.
Step:5 Release the tilt and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Decline One Arm Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell decline one arm fly. Cách thực hiện: Lie down on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh; Using your thigh to help raise the dumbbell, lift it up to shoulder width with your palm facing your torso; Rotate your wrist so that the palm of your hand is facing forward; As you breathe in, lower the dumbbell slowly to the side until you feel a stretch in your chest; Exhale and use your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Step:2 Using your thigh to help raise the dumbbell, lift it up to shoulder width with your palm facing your torso.
Step:3 Rotate your wrist so that the palm of your hand is facing forward.
Step:4 As you breathe in, lower the dumbbell slowly to the side until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Exhale and use your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Alternate Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell alternate preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up; Rest your upper arms on the pad of the preacher bench, allowing your arms to fully extend; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand as you contract your biceps; Continue to curl the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level; Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on the pad of the preacher bench, allowing your arms to fully extend.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand as you contract your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to curl the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement with your left arm.
Step:7 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Biceps Curl (With Arm Blaster)
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell biceps curl (with arm blaster). Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward; Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary; Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Rope High Pulley Overhead Tricep Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập vai với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a high pulley and adjust the weight accordingly.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the pulley machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing down, and bring your hands above your head.
Step:4 Keep your upper arms close to your head and perpendicular to the floor.
Step:5 Slowly lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Kneeling Leg Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and select the desired weight.
Step:2 Kneel on the machine facing downwards, with your knees resting on the pad and your feet secured under the footpads.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up towards your glutes by flexing your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your hamstrings.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower your legs back to the starting position, fully extending your knees.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Full Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập smith full squat. Cách thực hiện: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at shoulder height; Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out; Step under the bar and position it across your upper back, resting on your traps; Grip the bar with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Unrack the bar and take a step back, maintaining a stable stance
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at shoulder height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:3 Step under the bar and position it across your upper back, resting on your traps.
Step:4 Grip the bar with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Unrack the bar and take a step back, maintaining a stable stance.
Step:6 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, initiate the squat by pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:7 Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as your flexibility allows.
Step:8 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then drive through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Single Leg Squat (Pistol) Male
exercises.description: Bài tập single leg squat (pistol) male. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and arms extended in front of you; Lift your right foot off the ground and extend it forward; Slowly lower your body down by bending your left knee and pushing your hips back; Keep your chest up and your back straight as you lower yourself down; Lower until your left thigh is parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and arms extended in front of you.
Step:2 Lift your right foot off the ground and extend it forward.
Step:3 Slowly lower your body down by bending your left knee and pushing your hips back.
Step:4 Keep your chest up and your back straight as you lower yourself down.
Step:5 Lower until your left thigh is parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đơn, ghế nghiêng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed firmly against the bench.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and lift them to shoulder height.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:5 Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Sitted Alternate Leg Raise (Female) With Intermediate
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a barbell across your thighs.
Step:2 (intermediate variation) Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support.
Step:3 Keeping your legs straight, lift one leg up as high as possible while keeping it parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Lower the leg back down and repeat with the other leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Seated Straight Back Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the floor with your legs extended and loop the resistance band around your feet.
Step:2 Hold the ends of the resistance band with your hands, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly back, engaging your core.
Step:4 Pull the resistance band towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Hanging Pike
exercises.description: Bài tập hanging pike. Cách thực hiện: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you; Engage your core and lift your legs up towards the bar, keeping them straight; Continue lifting until your body forms a 'V' shape, with your legs parallel to the ground; Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up towards the bar, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your body forms a 'V' shape, with your legs parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Light Lever Standing Chest Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands at chest level. Maintain light form throughout.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the handles back towards your chest, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell deadlift. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward; Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body, arms extended downwards; Bend at your hips and knees, lowering the dumbbells towards the ground while keeping your back straight; Push through your heels and extend your hips and knees, lifting the dumbbells back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body, arms extended downwards.
Step:3 Bend at your hips and knees, lowering the dumbbells towards the ground while keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Push through your heels and extend your hips and knees, lifting the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Concentration Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip and rest your elbow against the inside of your thigh.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the cable handle towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline raise. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs; Lean back on the bench and raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward; Keeping your back against the bench, exhale and raise the dumbbells above your head, fully extending your arms; Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Lean back on the bench and raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Keeping your back against the bench, exhale and raise the dumbbells above your head, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Reverse Dip
exercises.description: Bài tập reverse dip. Cách thực hiện: Position yourself between two parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight; Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Position yourself between two parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever High Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and foot platform to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the foot platform.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Incline Chest Press V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest angle on the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended, but without locking your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly bend your elbows and lower the handles back towards your chest.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Back Extension With Hands Behind Head
exercises.name_vi: Exercise Ball Back Extension With Hands Behind Head
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball back extension with hands behind head. Cách thực hiện: Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it with your hips resting on the ball; Position your feet against a wall or other stable surface for support; Cross your arms behind your head, with your hands touching the back of your head; Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your hips; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it with your hips resting on the ball.
Step:2 Position your feet against a wall or other stable surface for support.
Step:3 Cross your arms behind your head, with your hands touching the back of your head.
Step:4 Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your hips.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Olympic Barbell Hammer Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập olympic barbell hammer curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold an Olympic barbell with an overhand grip; Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palms facing your body; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold an Olympic barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palms facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Wide-Grip Chest Dip On High Parallel Bars
exercises.name_vi: Wide-Grip Chest Dip On High Parallel Bars
exercises.description: Bài tập wide-grip chest dip on high parallel bars. Cách thực hiện: Position yourself on the parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body suspended in the air; Lean forward slightly and lower your body by bending your elbows until your chest is just above the bars; Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Position yourself on the parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body suspended in the air.
Step:2 Lean forward slightly and lower your body by bending your elbows until your chest is just above the bars.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Improved Sphinx
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the ground with your forearms flat on the floor, elbows directly under your shoulders.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your chest off the ground, keeping your forearms and toes on the floor.
Step:3 Hold this position for a few seconds, making sure to keep your neck in a neutral position.
Step:4 Slowly lower your chest back down to the starting position. Emphasize improved control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Standing One Arm Row (With Towel)
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a towel with one hand.
