Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Pull the towel towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the towel back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Bench Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm bench fly. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on top of your thigh; Lie back on the bench, keeping the dumbbell pressed against your thigh; Using your free hand, help lift the dumbbell up to the starting position; Hold the dumbbell directly above your shoulder with your arm extended and palm facing inward; Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on top of your thigh.
Step:2 Lie back on the bench, keeping the dumbbell pressed against your thigh.
Step:3 Using your free hand, help lift the dumbbell up to the starting position.
Step:4 Hold the dumbbell directly above your shoulder with your arm extended and palm facing inward.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:6 Pause when your arm is parallel to the ground, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.

exercises.name: Traditional Barbell Romanian Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tạ đòn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend at the hips, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body.
Step:5 Feel the stretch in your hamstrings as you lower the barbell.
Step:6 Once you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, push your hips forward and stand up straight.
Step:7 Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement.
Step:8 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Focus on traditional movement.

exercises.name: Intensified Style Kettlebell Extended Range One Arm Press On Floor
exercises.name_vi: Intensified Style Kettlebell Extended Range One Arm Press On Floor
exercises.description: Bài tập intensified style kettlebell extended range one arm press on floor. Cách thực hiện: Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Hold a kettlebell in one hand, with your palm facing towards your feet; Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow locked and your wrist straight; Slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm. Perform with intensified intensity
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in one hand, with your palm facing towards your feet.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow locked and your wrist straight.
Step:4 Slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm. Perform with intensified intensity.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Incline Tricep Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập smith machine incline tricep extension. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder height; Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground; Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Extend your arms fully, lifting the bar off the rack and holding it directly above your chest; Lower the bar slowly towards your forehead, keeping your elbows close to your head
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder height.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, lifting the bar off the rack and holding it directly above your chest.
Step:5 Lower the bar slowly towards your forehead, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Reverse Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell reverse preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a preacher bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an underhand grip, palms facing up; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells as you contract your biceps; Continue to curl the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells as you contract your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to curl the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell press on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and dumbbells in each hand, resting on your thighs; Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball until your lower back is supported on the ball and your knees are at a 90-degree angle; Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward; Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and dumbbells in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball until your lower back is supported on the ball and your knees are at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Monster Walk
exercises.description: Bài tập monster walk. Cách thực hiện: Place a resistance band around your ankles; Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees; Take a step to the side with your right foot, maintaining tension on the resistance band; Follow with your left foot, stepping to the side to return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place a resistance band around your ankles.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees.
Step:3 Take a step to the side with your right foot, maintaining tension on the resistance band.
Step:4 Follow with your left foot, stepping to the side to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Double Windmill
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell double windmill. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand; Extend your right arm overhead, keeping your eyes on the kettlebell; Rotate your left foot 45 degrees to the left and your right foot 90 degrees to the right; Bend at the waist to the left, keeping your right arm extended overhead; Lower the kettlebell towards the ground, reaching towards your left foot
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand.
Step:2 Extend your right arm overhead, keeping your eyes on the kettlebell.
Step:3 Rotate your left foot 45 degrees to the left and your right foot 90 degrees to the right.
Step:4 Bend at the waist to the left, keeping your right arm extended overhead.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell towards the ground, reaching towards your left foot.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then engage your core and push through your right foot to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Lever Hammer Grip Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập lever hammer grip preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine; Place your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your chest is pressed against it; Grasp the handles with a hammer grip (palms facing each other); Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders; Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Place your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your chest is pressed against it.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with a hammer grip (palms facing each other).
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Side Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập band side triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with both hands, palms facing down; Extend your arms straight out to the sides, keeping them parallel to the ground; Slowly bend your elbows and bring your hands towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms still; Pause for a moment, then slowly extend your arms back out to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with both hands, palms facing down.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out to the sides, keeping them parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Slowly bend your elbows and bring your hands towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms still.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly extend your arms back out to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing One Arm Palm In Press
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Standing One Arm Palm In Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing one arm palm in press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder height with your palm facing inwards; Engage your core and keep your back straight; Press the dumbbell upwards until your arm is fully extended; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder height with your palm facing inwards.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Press the dumbbell upwards until your arm is fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Biceps Curl To Shoulder Press
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Seated Biceps Curl To Shoulder Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated biceps curl to shoulder press. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and arms fully extended; Keeping your elbows close to your sides, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders; Once your forearms are vertical, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward; Press the dumbbells overhead until your arms are fully extended
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your elbows close to your sides, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Once your forearms are vertical, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Step:5 Press the dumbbells overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position by reversing the movement.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Medicine Ball Overhead Slam
exercises.description: Bài tập medicine ball overhead slam. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball with both hands above your head; Engage your core and keep your back straight; Bend your knees slightly and forcefully slam the medicine ball down to the ground in front of you; As you slam the ball down, use your entire body to generate power, including your shoulders and core; Catch the ball on the bounce and repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball with both hands above your head.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and forcefully slam the medicine ball down to the ground in front of you.
Step:4 As you slam the ball down, use your entire body to generate power, including your shoulders and core.
Step:5 Catch the ball on the bounce and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Seated Hip Adduction
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Place your feet on the footrests and grasp the handles for stability.
Step:3 Engage your adductor muscles and slowly bring your legs together, squeezing your inner thighs.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever One Arm Lateral High Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with one hand and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Pull the handle towards your body, keeping your elbow close to your side.
Step:4 Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dynamic Style Barbell Lying Back Of The Head Tricep Extension
exercises.name_vi: Dynamic Style Barbell Lying Back Of The Head Tricep Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập dynamic style barbell lying back of the head tricep extension. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench; Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest; Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Maintain dynamic form throughout; Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Maintain dynamic form throughout.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Run
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing upright with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your upper body relaxed.
Step:3 Begin jogging in place, lifting your knees up towards your chest and landing softly on the balls of your feet.
Step:4 Maintain a steady pace and continue jogging for the desired duration or distance.
Step:5 Remember to breathe deeply and maintain good posture throughout the exercise.

exercises.name: Cable Pull Through (With Rope)
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing away from the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grab the rope attachment with both hands and step forward, creating tension in the cable.
Step:3 Bend at the hips and lower your upper body until it is parallel to the ground, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and hamstrings to pull your body back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Palm Rotational Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a handle to a cable machine at waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:4 Step back to create tension on the cable, keeping your back straight and knees slightly bent.
Step:5 Pull the handle towards your body, rotating your palms to face upwards as you do so.
Step:6 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dynamic Style Band Side Triceps Extension
exercises.name_vi: Dynamic Style Band Side Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập dynamic style band side triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with both hands, palms facing down; Extend your arms straight out to the sides, keeping them parallel to the ground; Slowly bend your elbows and bring your hands towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms still; Pause for a moment, then slowly extend your arms back out to the starting position; (dynamic variation) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with both hands, palms facing down.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out to the sides, keeping them parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Slowly bend your elbows and bring your hands towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms still.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly extend your arms back out to the starting position.
Step:5 (dynamic variation) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Intense Barbell Straight Leg Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập intense barbell straight leg deadlift. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward; Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Bend at your hips and lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent; Lower the barbell until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings. Maintain intense form throughout; Engage your hamstrings and glutes to lift the barbell back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend at your hips and lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Lower the barbell until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings. Maintain intense form throughout.
Step:5 Engage your hamstrings and glutes to lift the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Roller Hip Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập roller hip stretch. Cách thực hiện: Start by sitting on the ground with your legs extended in front of you; Place the roller under your glutes, just above your knees; Lean back and place your hands on the ground behind you for support; Engage your glutes and slowly roll the roller forward, bending your knees and bringing them towards your chest; Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, feeling a stretch in your glutes
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by sitting on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Place the roller under your glutes, just above your knees.
Step:3 Lean back and place your hands on the ground behind you for support.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and slowly roll the roller forward, bending your knees and bringing them towards your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, feeling a stretch in your glutes.
Step:6 Slowly roll the roller back to the starting position, extending your legs.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Wall Style Dumbbell Pullover Hip Extension On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Wall Style Dumbbell Pullover Hip Extension On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập wall style dumbbell pullover hip extension on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and the dumbbell resting on your thighs; Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball down your back until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball; Hold the dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows; Lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your arms straight and maintaining control; Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and the dumbbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball down your back until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your arms straight and maintaining control.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 While keeping your arms extended, lift your hips off the ground, squeezing your glutes and engaging your core.
Step:7 (wall variation) Lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Straight Leg Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell straight leg deadlift. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip; Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing your torso to lean forward; Continue lowering the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, keeping your knees slightly bent; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your torso back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing your torso to lean forward.
Step:3 Continue lowering the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your torso back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Hip Extension V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập lever hip extension v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest; Place your feet on the footrests and grip the handles for stability; Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then push against the footrests to extend your hips and raise your legs backward; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Place your feet on the footrests and grip the handles for stability.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then push against the footrests to extend your hips and raise your legs backward.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Cross-Over Lateral Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to each side of a cable machine at shoulder height.
Step:2 Stand in the middle of the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and step back to create tension in the cables.
Step:4 Lean forward slightly from the hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
Step:5 Pull the handles down and across your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Side Push Neck Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập side push neck stretch. Cách thực hiện: Stand or sit up straight with your shoulders relaxed; Tilt your head to the right, bringing your right ear towards your right shoulder; Place your right hand on the left side of your head and gently apply pressure to increase the stretch; Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds; Repeat on the other side, tilting your head to the left and applying pressure with your left hand
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand or sit up straight with your shoulders relaxed.
Step:2 Tilt your head to the right, bringing your right ear towards your right shoulder.
Step:3 Place your right hand on the left side of your head and gently apply pressure to increase the stretch.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, tilting your head to the left and applying pressure with your left hand.
Step:6 Repeat the stretch 2-3 times on each side.

exercises.name: Barbell Squat (On Knees)
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell squat (on knees). Cách thực hiện: Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your toes pointing forward; Place a barbell across your shoulders, gripping it with an overhand grip and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you slowly lower your body down by bending your knees, keeping your back straight; Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Place a barbell across your shoulders, gripping it with an overhand grip and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you slowly lower your body down by bending your knees, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Reverse Hyper On Flat Bench
exercises.description: Bài tập reverse hyper on flat bench. Cách thực hiện: Lie face down on a flat bench with your hips at the edge and your legs hanging off the bench; Hold onto the bench for stability; Keeping your legs straight, raise them up towards the ceiling as high as you can; Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement; Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with your hips at the edge and your legs hanging off the bench.
Step:2 Hold onto the bench for stability.
Step:3 Keeping your legs straight, raise them up towards the ceiling as high as you can.
Step:4 Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Unilateral Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell One Arm Push Press
exercises.description: Bài tập vai với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder level.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Press the kettlebell overhead by extending your arm and fully extending your legs.
Step:4 Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by bending your knees and bringing the kettlebell back to your shoulder.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Decline Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell decline triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other; Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your head; Lower the dumbbells slowly behind your head, bending your elbows; Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbells back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells slowly behind your head, bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Lying Bicep Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable lying bicep curl. Cách thực hiện: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine; Lie face up on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground; Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart; Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your sides; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Lie face up on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:5 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Shrug
exercises.description: Bài tập smith shrug. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Keep your arms straight and your shoulders relaxed; Lift your shoulders up towards your ears, squeezing your traps at the top; Hold for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your arms straight and your shoulders relaxed.
Step:4 Lift your shoulders up towards your ears, squeezing your traps at the top.
Step:5 Hold for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards; Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your head; Lower the dumbbells behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary; Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbells back to the starting position by extending your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbells back to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Palm-In Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline palm-in press. Cách thực hiện: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle; Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other; Plant your feet firmly on the ground and keep your back straight against the bench; Start with the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and palms facing each other; Press the dumbbells up and away from your body, extending your arms fully
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Plant your feet firmly on the ground and keep your back straight against the bench.
Step:4 Start with the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and palms facing each other.
Step:5 Press the dumbbells up and away from your body, extending your arms fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez-Barbell Standing Wide Grip Biceps Curl
exercises.name_vi: Ez-Barbell Standing Wide Grip Biceps Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập ez-barbell standing wide grip biceps curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart; Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement; Curl the barbell up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Step:3 Curl the barbell up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Triceps Pushdown (V-Bar) (With Arm Blaster)
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a v-bar attachment to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Engage your triceps and exhale as you push the v-bar down until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your triceps.
Step:7 Inhale as you slowly return the v-bar to the starting position, maintaining control.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Wide Grip Rear Pull-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập wide grip rear pull-up. Cách thực hiện: Grab the pull-up bar with a wide overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight; Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with a wide overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Leg Pull In Flat Bench
exercises.description: Bài tập leg pull in flat bench. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a flat bench with your legs extended straight out in front of you; Place your hands on the bench beside your hips for support; Engage your abs and lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with your legs extended straight out in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the bench beside your hips for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Tire Flip
exercises.description: Bài tập tire flip. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the tire; Bend your knees and hinge at the hips, lowering into a squat position; Reach down and grab the bottom edge of the tire with both hands, fingers facing towards you; Engage your glutes and leg muscles, and explosively drive through your legs to lift the tire off the ground; As the tire flips over, use your upper body strength to guide it and maintain control
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the tire.
Step:2 Bend your knees and hinge at the hips, lowering into a squat position.
Step:3 Reach down and grab the bottom edge of the tire with both hands, fingers facing towards you.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and leg muscles, and explosively drive through your legs to lift the tire off the ground.
Step:5 As the tire flips over, use your upper body strength to guide it and maintain control.
Step:6 Once the tire is fully flipped, quickly step back and reset your stance.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Sled 45В° Leg Wide Press - Blunt Variation
exercises.name_vi: Sled 45В° Leg Wide Press - Blunt Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập sled 45в° leg wide press - blunt variation. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle; Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the foot platform; Position your feet wider than shoulder-width apart; Push against the foot platform to extend your legs and straighten your knees; Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bend your knees to return to the starting position. Maintain blunt form throughout
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the foot platform.
Step:3 Position your feet wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push against the foot platform to extend your legs and straighten your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bend your knees to return to the starting position. Maintain blunt form throughout.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Incline Fly On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Cable One Arm Incline Fly On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập cable one arm incline fly on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back against an incline bench; Hold a cable handle in one hand with your arm extended and palm facing inward; Keeping a slight bend in your elbow, slowly lower your arm out to the side until your hand is in line with your shoulder; Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring your arm back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back against an incline bench.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle in one hand with your arm extended and palm facing inward.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbow, slowly lower your arm out to the side until your hand is in line with your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring your arm back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Two Toe Touch (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập two toe touch (male). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended out to the sides; Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent; Reach down towards your toes with both hands, keeping your legs straight; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended out to the sides.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Reach down towards your toes with both hands, keeping your legs straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height; Sit on the preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the cable attachment with an underhand grip; Keep your back straight and your elbows tucked in at your sides; Slowly curl the cable attachment up towards your shoulders, squeezing your biceps at the top of the movement; Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the cable attachment back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height.
Step:2 Sit on the preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the cable attachment with an underhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your elbows tucked in at your sides.
Step:4 Slowly curl the cable attachment up towards your shoulders, squeezing your biceps at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the cable attachment back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing Zottman Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing zottman preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward; Place your upper arms against the preacher bench and keep your elbows slightly bent; Curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders while keeping your upper arms stationary; At the top of the movement, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing downward; Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as well
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Place your upper arms against the preacher bench and keep your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders while keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing downward.
Step:5 Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as well.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Standing Cross-Over High Reverse Fly
exercises.name_vi: Cable Standing Cross-Over High Reverse Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập cable standing cross-over high reverse fly. Cách thực hiện: Attach a D-handle to each side of a cable machine at shoulder height; Stand in the middle of the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides, palms facing forward; Keep a slight bend in your elbows and maintain a straight back throughout the exercise; Engage your shoulder muscles and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles towards the front of your body
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a D-handle to each side of a cable machine at shoulder height.
Step:2 Stand in the middle of the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides, palms facing forward.
Step:4 Keep a slight bend in your elbows and maintain a straight back throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Engage your shoulder muscles and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles towards the front of your body.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Iron Cross Stretch - Deep Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập iron cross stretch - deep variation. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your arms extended out to the sides; Raise your legs up towards the ceiling, keeping them straight; Slowly lower your legs to one side, aiming to touch the floor with your feet; Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return your legs to the starting position; Repeat the stretch on the other side. Maintain deep form throughout
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your arms extended out to the sides.
Step:2 Raise your legs up towards the ceiling, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Slowly lower your legs to one side, aiming to touch the floor with your feet.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return your legs to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the stretch on the other side. Maintain deep form throughout.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Push Up On Bosu Ball With Improved
exercises.name_vi: Push Up On Bosu Ball With Improved
exercises.description: Bài tập push up on bosu ball with improved. Cách thực hiện: Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side facing up; Position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the outer edges of the bosu ball; Engage your core and lower your body down towards the bosu ball by bending your elbows. Focus on improved movement; Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side facing up.
Step:2 Position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the outer edges of the bosu ball.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower your body down towards the bosu ball by bending your elbows. Focus on improved movement.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Spell Caster
exercises.description: Bài tập spell caster. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the waist, keeping your back straight; Extend your arm with the dumbbell towards the opposite foot, rotating your torso as you do so; Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side; Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the waist, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arm with the dumbbell towards the opposite foot, rotating your torso as you do so.
Step:4 Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Spider Crawl Push Up
exercises.description: Bài tập spider crawl push up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together; Bring your right knee towards your right elbow, keeping it off the ground; As you bring your right knee back, simultaneously lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows; Push back up to the starting position and repeat with your left knee towards your left elbow; Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Bring your right knee towards your right elbow, keeping it off the ground.
Step:3 As you bring your right knee back, simultaneously lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Push back up to the starting position and repeat with your left knee towards your left elbow.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Hyght Dumbbell Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập hyght dumbbell fly. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other; Extend your arms straight up over your chest, with a slight bend in your elbows; Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest; Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbells back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Assisted Chest Dip (Kneeling)
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted chest dip (kneeling). Cách thực hiện: Adjust the machine to your desired height and secure your knees on the pad; Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended; Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor; Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to your desired height and secure your knees on the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Hands Bike
exercises.description: Bài tập hands bike. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and handlebar position to a comfortable level; Sit on the ergometer with your back straight and feet on the pedals; Grasp the handles with your hands and position your arms at a 90-degree angle; Start pedaling with your hands, pushing and pulling the handles in a controlled motion; Continue pedaling for the desired duration or number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and handlebar position to a comfortable level.
Step:2 Sit on the ergometer with your back straight and feet on the pedals.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with your hands and position your arms at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Start pedaling with your hands, pushing and pulling the handles in a controlled motion.
Step:5 Continue pedaling for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Y-Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline y-raise. Cách thực hiện: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards; Lean forward slightly and let your arms hang straight down, keeping a slight bend in your elbows; Raise your arms out to the sides and up in a Y shape until they are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Lean forward slightly and let your arms hang straight down, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides and up in a Y shape until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Rope Hammer Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable rope hammer preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Attach a rope attachment to a low pulley cable machine; Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other); Position your upper arms against the preacher bench pad, keeping your elbows slightly bent; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the rope towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope attachment to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other).
Step:4 Position your upper arms against the preacher bench pad, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the rope towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the rope back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Pulse Style Walk Elliptical Cross Trainer
exercises.name_vi: Pulse Style Walk Elliptical Cross Trainer
exercises.description: Bài tập pulse style walk elliptical cross trainer. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the resistance level and incline of the elliptical machine to your desired settings; Step onto the pedals of the machine and grip the handles lightly; Begin by pushing down with your feet and pulling the handles towards your body; Continue this motion, alternating between pushing and pulling, to simulate a walking or running motion; Maintain a steady pace and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise. Emphasize pulse control
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the resistance level and incline of the elliptical machine to your desired settings.
Step:2 Step onto the pedals of the machine and grip the handles lightly.
Step:3 Begin by pushing down with your feet and pulling the handles towards your body.
Step:4 Continue this motion, alternating between pushing and pulling, to simulate a walking or running motion.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise. Emphasize pulse control.
Step:6 Continue for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Step:7 Gradually decrease the intensity and speed of the machine before stepping off.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Incline Chest Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the incline bench to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip, resting it on your shoulder.
Step:4 Push the dumbbell up and away from your body, extending your arm fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Controlled Band Straight Back Stiff Leg Deadlift
exercises.name_vi: Controlled Band Straight Back Stiff Leg Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập controlled band straight back stiff leg deadlift. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your upper legs; Hold the band with both hands in front of your thighs, palms facing your body; Keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent, hinge at the hips and lower the band towards the ground. Focus on controlled movement; Feel the stretch in your hamstrings as you lower the band; Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your body back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your upper legs.
Step:2 Hold the band with both hands in front of your thighs, palms facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent, hinge at the hips and lower the band towards the ground. Focus on controlled movement.
Step:4 Feel the stretch in your hamstrings as you lower the band.
Step:5 Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your body back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand; Raise the dumbbell overhead, keeping your arm straight; Bend your elbow and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arm stationary; Extend your arm back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbell overhead, keeping your arm straight.
Step:3 Bend your elbow and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Extend your arm back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Shoulder Press
exercises.description: Bài tập band shoulder press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet; Hold the band with your palms facing forward and raise your hands to shoulder height, elbows bent; Press the band overhead, fully extending your arms; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back to shoulder height; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet.
Step:2 Hold the band with your palms facing forward and raise your hands to shoulder height, elbows bent.
Step:3 Press the band overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Back Extension With Arms Extended
exercises.name_vi: Exercise Ball Back Extension With Arms Extended
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball back extension with arms extended. Cách thực hiện: Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability; Extend your arms straight out in front of you, with your palms facing down; Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, keeping your back straight and your neck in line with your spine; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, with your palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, keeping your back straight and your neck in line with your spine.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Walk Elliptical Cross Trainer - Expanded Variation
exercises.name_vi: Walk Elliptical Cross Trainer - Expanded Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập walk elliptical cross trainer - expanded variation. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the resistance level and incline of the elliptical machine to your desired settings; Step onto the pedals of the machine and grip the handles lightly; Begin by pushing down with your feet and pulling the handles towards your body; Continue this motion, alternating between pushing and pulling, to simulate a walking or running motion. Emphasize expanded control; Maintain a steady pace and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the resistance level and incline of the elliptical machine to your desired settings.
Step:2 Step onto the pedals of the machine and grip the handles lightly.
Step:3 Begin by pushing down with your feet and pulling the handles towards your body.
Step:4 Continue this motion, alternating between pushing and pulling, to simulate a walking or running motion. Emphasize expanded control.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Continue for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Step:7 Gradually decrease the intensity and speed of the machine before stepping off.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Hammer Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline hammer press. Cách thực hiện: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs; Lie back on the bench and position the dumbbells at shoulder level with your palms facing each other; Press the dumbbells up and away from your body until your arms are fully extended; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Lie back on the bench and position the dumbbells at shoulder level with your palms facing each other.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells up and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band One Arm Standing Low Row - Lateral Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a stable anchor point at waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the band with one hand, palm facing inward, and step back to create tension in the band.
Step:4 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Pull the band towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the band back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides. Emphasize lateral control.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Leg Fly On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Leg Fly On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one leg fly on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other; Place one foot on the ground and extend the other leg straight out in front of you; Lean forward slightly and bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows; Slowly lower the dumbbells down and out to the sides, feeling a stretch in your chest; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Place one foot on the ground and extend the other leg straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Lean forward slightly and bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells down and out to the sides, feeling a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

exercises.name: Hanging Straight Leg Hip Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập hanging straight leg hip raise. Cách thực hiện: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you; Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you until they are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Hip Thrusts On Knees (Female)
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your feet flexed.
Step:2 Wrap the resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees.
Step:3 Place your hands on your hips or extend them out in front of you for balance.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Step:5 Push your hips forward and squeeze your glutes as you lift your knees off the ground, extending your hips until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your knees back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Front Lever
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back.
Step:3 Bend your knees and tuck them towards your chest.
Step:4 Simultaneously, lift your legs up and extend them straight out in front of you, keeping your body parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Hold this position for as long as you can, aiming for a full front lever position.
Step:6 To release, slowly lower your legs back down and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Rough Band Push Sit-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập rough band push sit-up. Cách thực hiện: Attach the band securely to a stable anchor point; Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Hold the band with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling. Focus on rough movement; Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the band securely to a stable anchor point.
Step:2 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold the band with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling. Focus on rough movement.
Step:4 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Jefferson Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell jefferson squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out; Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on the front of your body, just below your waist; Step your left foot forward and your right foot back, keeping your feet shoulder-width apart; Bend your knees and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up; Push through your heels to stand back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on the front of your body, just below your waist.
Step:3 Step your left foot forward and your right foot back, keeping your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Bend your knees and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:5 Push through your heels to stand back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement, alternating your forward and back foot with each repetition.

exercises.name: Kipping Muscle Up
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and use a swinging motion to generate momentum.
Step:3 As you swing forward, pull your chest towards the bar, using your lats and biceps to initiate the movement.
Step:4 Continue the upward motion until your chest reaches the bar, then transition into a dip position by pushing down on the bar and extending your arms.
Step:5 Lower yourself back down to the starting position by bending your arms and controlling the descent.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lunge With Jump
exercises.description: Bài tập lunge with jump. Cách thực hiện: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart; Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position; Push off with your right foot and jump into the air, switching the position of your feet mid-air; Land softly with your left foot forward and immediately lower your body into a lunge position; Continue alternating between lunges and jumps for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Push off with your right foot and jump into the air, switching the position of your feet mid-air.
Step:4 Land softly with your left foot forward and immediately lower your body into a lunge position.
Step:5 Continue alternating between lunges and jumps for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Kneeling One Arm Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập band kneeling one arm pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point above your head; Kneel down and hold the band with one hand, palm facing down; Extend your arm fully overhead, keeping your elbow slightly bent; Engage your lat muscles and pull the band down towards your side, bringing your elbow towards your ribcage; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point above your head.
Step:2 Kneel down and hold the band with one hand, palm facing down.
Step:3 Extend your arm fully overhead, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Step:4 Engage your lat muscles and pull the band down towards your side, bringing your elbow towards your ribcage.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Seated Triceps Stretch Wide
exercises.name_vi: Exercise Ball Seated Triceps Stretch Wide
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball seated triceps stretch wide. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in one hand and extend your arm straight up above your head; Bend your elbow and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arm close to your ear. Maintain wide form throughout; Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return to the starting position; Repeat with the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and extend your arm straight up above your head.
Step:3 Bend your elbow and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arm close to your ear. Maintain wide form throughout.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm.

exercises.name: Cable Reverse-Grip Straight Back Seated High Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the seat facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from your hips.
Step:4 Pull the cable towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction, then slowly release the cable back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Assisted Wide-Grip Chest Dip (Kneeling)
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted wide-grip chest dip (kneeling). Cách thực hiện: Adjust the machine to your desired height and secure your knees on the pad; Grasp the handles with a wide grip and keep your elbows slightly bent; Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor; Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to your desired height and secure your knees on the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with a wide grip and keep your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Neutral Grip Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and your arms extended straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Slowly lower the dumbbells down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Flag
exercises.description: Bài tập flag. Cách thực hiện: Start by gripping a vertical pole with both hands, palms facing each other, and arms fully extended; Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight; Using your core and upper body strength, raise your legs until they are parallel to the ground; Hold this position for as long as you can, maintaining a straight body line; Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by gripping a vertical pole with both hands, palms facing each other, and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
