Step:3 Using your core and upper body strength, raise your legs until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Hold this position for as long as you can, maintaining a straight body line.
Step:5 Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Seated Leg Raise Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footrests.
Step:2 Grasp the handles or sidebars for stability.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly raise your legs up towards your chest, curling your torso forward at the same time.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and torso back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Supine Reverse Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập cable supine reverse fly. Cách thực hiện: Attach a D-handle to a low pulley cable machine and lie face down on a flat bench; Grasp the D-handle with each hand, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight out in front of you; Keeping your arms straight, raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a D-handle to a low pulley cable machine and lie face down on a flat bench.
Step:2 Grasp the D-handle with each hand, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Upper Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the bar towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the bar back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Standing Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập cable standing fly. Cách thực hiện: Attach the handles to the cables at chest height; Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing away from the cable machine; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing forward; Step forward slightly to create tension in the cables; Keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the exercise
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the handles to the cables at chest height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing away from the cable machine.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing forward.
Step:4 Step forward slightly to create tension in the cables.
Step:5 Keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:6 With a slight bend in your elbows, slowly bring your arms forward and together in front of your chest.
Step:7 Squeeze your chest muscles at the peak of the movement.
Step:8 Slowly reverse the movement, returning your arms to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Rotation Reverse Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell rotation reverse fly. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up; Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor; Rotate your arms so that your palms are facing downwards; Slowly lower your arms back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Rotate your arms so that your palms are facing downwards.
Step:5 Slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Push To Run
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight.
Step:3 Push through your hands to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:4 Quickly bring one knee towards your chest, then quickly switch and bring the other knee towards your chest.
Step:5 Continue alternating knees as fast as you can while maintaining good form.
Step:6 Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Pushdown (Straight Arm) V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập cable pushdown (straight arm) v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine; Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees; Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down; Engage your core and keep your back straight as you exhale and push the bar down towards your thighs; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position while inhaling
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Step:4 Engage your core and keep your back straight as you exhale and push the bar down towards your thighs.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position while inhaling.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Drop Push Up
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted drop push up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together; Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body; Once your chest is just above the ground, explosively push yourself up, lifting your hands off the ground; As you push up, quickly move your hands out to the sides and slightly forward, allowing your body to drop down towards the ground; Catch yourself with your hands in the wider position and immediately lower your chest towards the ground again
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 Once your chest is just above the ground, explosively push yourself up, lifting your hands off the ground.
Step:4 As you push up, quickly move your hands out to the sides and slightly forward, allowing your body to drop down towards the ground.
Step:5 Catch yourself with your hands in the wider position and immediately lower your chest towards the ground again.
Step:6 Repeat the push-up motion, dropping down and catching yourself with your hands in the narrower position.
Step:7 Continue alternating between the wider and narrower hand positions for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Medicine Ball Catch And Overhead Throw
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball in both hands at chest level.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:4 Explosively extend your hips and legs, while simultaneously throwing the medicine ball overhead.
Step:5 Release the ball at the top of the movement and catch it on the way down.
Step:6 Lower your body back into the squat position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Push-Up Plus
exercises.description: Bài tập push-up plus. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line from head to heels; Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides; Once your chest is just above the ground, push through your hands to extend your arms and lift your upper body up; At the top of the movement, protract your shoulder blades by pushing your upper back towards the ceiling; Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement by retracting your shoulder blades and lowering your body back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 Once your chest is just above the ground, push through your hands to extend your arms and lift your upper body up.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, protract your shoulder blades by pushing your upper back towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement by retracting your shoulder blades and lowering your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Seated High Row (V-Bar)
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip, palms facing each other, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips.
Step:4 Pull the v-bar towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Medicine Ball Chest Push With Run Release
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball at chest level.
Step:2 Step forward with your right foot and simultaneously push the medicine ball forward, extending your arms fully.
Step:3 As you push the ball forward, release it and let it roll forward.
Step:4 Quickly run forward and catch the ball before it hits the ground.
Step:5 Once you catch the ball, bring it back to your chest and repeat the movement with your left foot forward.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs and repeating the exercise for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Arm Slingers Hanging Straight Legs
exercises.description: Bài tập arm slingers hanging straight legs. Cách thực hiện: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your legs straight down; Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you until they are parallel to the ground; Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your legs straight down.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Lateral Lunge
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell lateral lunge. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back; Take a big step to the side with your right foot, keeping your left foot planted; Bend your right knee and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your left leg straight; Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position; Repeat on the other side, stepping with your left foot
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Take a big step to the side with your right foot, keeping your left foot planted.
Step:3 Bend your right knee and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your left leg straight.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, stepping with your left foot.

exercises.name: Calf Push Stretch With Hands Against Wall
exercises.name_vi: Calf Push Stretch With Hands Against Wall
exercises.description: Bài tập calf push stretch with hands against wall. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart; Place your hands against the wall at shoulder height; Step back with one foot, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight; Bend your front knee slightly and lean forward, feeling a stretch in your calf; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands against the wall at shoulder height.
Step:3 Step back with one foot, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight.
Step:4 Bend your front knee slightly and lean forward, feeling a stretch in your calf.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Switch legs and repeat the stretch.

exercises.name: Cable Shoulder Press
exercises.description: Bài tập cable shoulder press. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable machine so that the handles are at shoulder height; Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and bring them up to shoulder level, with your elbows bent and pointing outwards; Press the handles upwards until your arms are fully extended overhead; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to shoulder level
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the handles are at shoulder height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and bring them up to shoulder level, with your elbows bent and pointing outwards.
Step:4 Press the handles upwards until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to shoulder level.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Iron Cross Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập iron cross stretch. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your arms extended out to the sides; Raise your legs up towards the ceiling, keeping them straight; Slowly lower your legs to one side, aiming to touch the floor with your feet; Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return your legs to the starting position; Repeat the stretch on the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your arms extended out to the sides.
Step:2 Raise your legs up towards the ceiling, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Slowly lower your legs to one side, aiming to touch the floor with your feet.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return your legs to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the stretch on the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Side Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and stand sideways to the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with the hand furthest from the machine and place your other hand on your hip.
Step:3 Keep your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 With your abs engaged, bend sideways at the waist, bringing your elbow down towards your hip.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Cable Lying Extension Pullover (With Rope Attachment)
exercises.name_vi: Cable Lying Extension Pullover (With Rope Attachment)
exercises.description: Bài tập cable lying extension pullover (with rope attachment). Cách thực hiện: Attach a rope to a cable machine and set the pulley at the highest position; Lie down on a bench with your head towards the cable machine; Hold the rope with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest; Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the rope behind your head while maintaining control; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise the rope back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine and set the pulley at the highest position.
Step:2 Lie down on a bench with your head towards the cable machine.
Step:3 Hold the rope with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest.
Step:4 Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the rope behind your head while maintaining control.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise the rope back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Drop Push Up
exercises.description: Bài tập drop push up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body; Once your chest is just above the ground, quickly drop your knees to the ground; Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 Once your chest is just above the ground, quickly drop your knees to the ground.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith One Arm Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to waist level.
Step:2 Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with one hand using an overhand grip, with your palm facing down.
Step:5 Keep your elbow close to your body and pull the bar towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the bar back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Hanging Straight Twisting Leg Hip Raise
exercises.name_vi: Hanging Straight Twisting Leg Hip Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập hanging straight twisting leg hip raise. Cách thực hiện: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your legs straight; Engage your core and lift your legs up towards your chest, keeping them straight; Once your legs are parallel to the ground, twist your hips to one side, bringing your legs towards that side; Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position; Repeat the movement, but this time twist your hips to the opposite side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your legs straight.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up towards your chest, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Once your legs are parallel to the ground, twist your hips to one side, bringing your legs towards that side.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, but this time twist your hips to the opposite side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Bicep Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập lever bicep curl. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad; Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and keep your elbows close to your sides; Exhale and curl the handles upward, contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps; Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and keep your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the handles upward, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Alternate Shoulder
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated alternate shoulder. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards, and raise them to shoulder height; Press one dumbbell up overhead while keeping the other dumbbell at shoulder height; Lower the raised dumbbell back to shoulder height while simultaneously pressing the other dumbbell up overhead; Continue alternating between arms for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards, and raise them to shoulder height.
Step:3 Press one dumbbell up overhead while keeping the other dumbbell at shoulder height.
Step:4 Lower the raised dumbbell back to shoulder height while simultaneously pressing the other dumbbell up overhead.
Step:5 Continue alternating between arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm wrist curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your forearm on your thigh; Allow your wrist to extend, letting the dumbbell roll down towards your fingers; Slowly curl your wrist back up, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your forearm on your thigh.
Step:3 Allow your wrist to extend, letting the dumbbell roll down towards your fingers.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrist back up, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.

exercises.name: Sled Hack Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập sled hack squat. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable position for your height; Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart on the platform, toes slightly pointed outwards; Hold onto the handles or bars for stability; Lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight and chest up; Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable position for your height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart on the platform, toes slightly pointed outwards.
Step:3 Hold onto the handles or bars for stability.
Step:4 Lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:5 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to raise your body back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell High Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell high curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward; Keep your upper arms stationary and curl the dumbbells as high as possible while contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your upper arms stationary and curl the dumbbells as high as possible while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Side Bend Crunch (Bosu Ball)
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a cable handle in one hand.
Step:2 Place the other hand on your hip.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly bend sideways towards the hand holding the cable, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Alternate Heel Touchers
exercises.description: Bài tập alternate heel touchers. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Extend your arms straight out to the sides, parallel to the ground; Engaging your abs, lift your shoulders off the ground and reach your right hand towards your right heel; Return to the starting position and repeat on the left side, reaching your left hand towards your left heel; Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out to the sides, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your shoulders off the ground and reach your right hand towards your right heel.
Step:4 Return to the starting position and repeat on the left side, reaching your left hand towards your left heel.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: All Fours Squad Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập all fours squad stretch. Cách thực hiện: Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips; Extend one leg straight back, keeping your knee bent and your foot flexed; Slowly lower your hips towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your quads; Hold this position for 20-30 seconds; Switch legs and repeat the stretch on the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips.
Step:2 Extend one leg straight back, keeping your knee bent and your foot flexed.
Step:3 Slowly lower your hips towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your quads.
Step:4 Hold this position for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Switch legs and repeat the stretch on the other side.

exercises.name: Push-Up (Wall) With Static
exercises.description: Bài tập push-up (wall) with static. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away; Place your hands on the wall at shoulder height, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Step back a few feet, keeping your body straight and your feet hip-width apart; (static variation) Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the wall, keeping your body in a straight line; Push back up to the starting position, straightening your arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away.
Step:2 Place your hands on the wall at shoulder height, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Step back a few feet, keeping your body straight and your feet hip-width apart.
Step:4 (static variation) Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the wall, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:5 Push back up to the starting position, straightening your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Squat To Overhead Reach
exercises.description: Bài tập squat to overhead reach. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out; Lower your body down into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back; As you come up from the squat, extend your arms overhead, reaching towards the ceiling; Return to the starting position by lowering your arms and bending your knees to squat down again; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Lower your body down into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 As you come up from the squat, extend your arms overhead, reaching towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Return to the starting position by lowering your arms and bending your knees to squat down again.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Butt-Ups
exercises.description: Bài tập butt-ups. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place your hands by your sides, palms facing down; Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest; At the top of the movement, squeeze your abs and pause for a moment; Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands by your sides, palms facing down.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, squeeze your abs and pause for a moment.
Step:5 Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Sled 45В° Calf Press
exercises.description: Bài tập sled 45в° calf press. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle; Place your feet on the sled platform with your toes pointing forward; Push the sled platform away from you by extending your ankles and calves; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the sled platform back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your feet on the sled platform with your toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Push the sled platform away from you by extending your ankles and calves.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the sled platform back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Seated Wide-Grip Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with a wide overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips.
Step:4 Pull the handle towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction.
Step:6 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Revers Wrist Curl V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell revers wrist curl v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent; Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart; Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge; Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:4 Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Pulldown (Pro Lat Bar)
exercises.description: Bài tập cable pulldown (pro lat bar). Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height so that your thighs are parallel to the ground and your feet are flat on the floor; Grasp the lat bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Sit down and lean back slightly, keeping your chest up and your back straight; Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together; Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your thighs are parallel to the ground and your feet are flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the lat bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit down and lean back slightly, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
Step:4 Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Shoulder Tap Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập shoulder tap push-up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line from head to heels; Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides; As you push back up, lift your right hand off the ground and tap your left shoulder; Return your right hand to the ground and repeat the push-up, this time lifting your left hand and tapping your right shoulder; Continue alternating shoulder taps with each push-up repetition
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 As you push back up, lift your right hand off the ground and tap your left shoulder.
Step:4 Return your right hand to the ground and repeat the push-up, this time lifting your left hand and tapping your right shoulder.
Step:5 Continue alternating shoulder taps with each push-up repetition.
Step:6 Maintain a stable core and avoid excessive hip rotation throughout the exercise.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Cuban Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell cuban press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing down; Keeping your core engaged and your elbows slightly bent, press the dumbbells up and overhead until your arms are fully extended; Rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward; Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as you do so; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing down.
Step:2 Keeping your core engaged and your elbows slightly bent, press the dumbbells up and overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Micro Style Barbell Speed Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập micro style barbell speed squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out; Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts; Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips back and down, as if sitting into a chair; (micro variation) Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go; Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips back and down, as if sitting into a chair.
Step:4 (micro variation) Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Seated Lower Back Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập seated lower back stretch. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the edge of a chair with your feet flat on the ground; Place your hands on your thighs or on the sides of the chair for support; Slowly lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight; Feel the stretch in your lower back and hold for 20-30 seconds; Slowly return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands on your thighs or on the sides of the chair for support.
Step:3 Slowly lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Feel the stretch in your lower back and hold for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Slowly return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Standing Lift
exercises.description: Bài tập cable standing lift. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Hold the cable handle with both hands and position it at waist height; Engage your core and maintain a straight back throughout the exercise; Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the cable handle up towards your opposite shoulder, rotating your torso; Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands and position it at waist height.
Step:3 Engage your core and maintain a straight back throughout the exercise.
Step:4 Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the cable handle up towards your opposite shoulder, rotating your torso.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Barbell Glute Bridge Two Legs On Bench (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by sitting on the edge of a bench with your upper back resting against it and your feet flat on the ground, hip-width apart.
Step:2 Place a barbell across your hips, holding it securely with both hands.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles, then press through your heels to lift your hips off the bench, creating a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes.
Step:5 Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Clean-Grip Front Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell clean-grip front squat. Cách thực hiện: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper chest, with your elbows pointing forward; Lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back, as if you are sitting back into a chair; Keep your chest up and your back straight as you lower down, making sure your knees do not go past your toes; Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper chest, with your elbows pointing forward.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back, as if you are sitting back into a chair.
Step:3 Keep your chest up and your back straight as you lower down, making sure your knees do not go past your toes.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Fast Style Resistance Band Seated Hip Abduction
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Wrap the resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees.
Step:3 Place your hands on the sides of the chair or bench for support.
Step:4 (fast variation) Engage your abductors (outer thigh muscles) and slowly push your knees apart, against the resistance of the band.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring your knees back together.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Step-Up Split Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell step-up split squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand in front of a bench or step with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body; Place your right foot on the bench or step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface; Step up onto the bench or step with your right foot, pushing through your heel to lift your body up; As you step up, simultaneously lift your left knee towards your chest; Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your left foot back to the ground while keeping your right foot on the bench or step
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a bench or step with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Place your right foot on the bench or step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface.
Step:3 Step up onto the bench or step with your right foot, pushing through your heel to lift your body up.
Step:4 As you step up, simultaneously lift your left knee towards your chest.
Step:5 Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your left foot back to the ground while keeping your right foot on the bench or step.
Step:6 Repeat the movement with your left foot on the bench or step.
Step:7 Continue alternating between your right and left foot for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Glute Bridge
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by lying flat on your back on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Place a barbell across your hips, holding it securely with both hands.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes.
Step:5 Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Forward Lunge (Male) With Bench
exercises.description: Bài tập forward lunge (male) with bench. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips; Take a big step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position; Bend your right knee to about 90 degrees, keeping your knee aligned with your ankle; Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position. Focus on bench movement; Repeat with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips.
Step:2 Take a big step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Bend your right knee to about 90 degrees, keeping your knee aligned with your ankle.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position. Focus on bench movement.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Decline Sit-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập decline sit-up. Cách thực hiện: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your knees bent; Place your hands behind your head or across your chest; Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward towards your knees; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your knees bent.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Back Extension On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập back extension on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall or other stable surface; Position your hands behind your head or crossed over your chest; Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall or other stable surface.
Step:2 Position your hands behind your head or crossed over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Alternate Hammer Curl On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Seated Alternate Hammer Curl On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated alternate hammer curl on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell up towards your shoulder while keeping your palm facing your body; Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell up towards your shoulder while keeping your palm facing your body.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the movement with the opposite arm.
Step:8 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Press On Exercise Ball With Extended
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Press On Exercise Ball With Extended
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline one arm press on exercise ball with extended. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand, feet flat on the ground; Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball. Perform with extended intensity; Hold the dumbbell at shoulder height with your palm facing forward; Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand, feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball. Perform with extended intensity.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell at shoulder height with your palm facing forward.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Wide Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying wide curl. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps; Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Hanging Leg-Hip Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted hanging leg-hip raise. Cách thực hiện: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you; Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight; Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or slightly higher; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or slightly higher.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a preacher bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support; Grasp the barbell with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders; Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps; Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Behind Head Chest Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập behind head chest stretch. Cách thực hiện: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart; Interlace your fingers behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards; Slowly squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your chest forward; Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds; Release the stretch and repeat as desired
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Interlace your fingers behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Slowly squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your chest forward.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds.
Step:5 Release the stretch and repeat as desired.

exercises.name: Standing Calves Calf Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập standing calves calf stretch. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a wall or sturdy object, about an arm's length away; Place your hands on the wall or object at shoulder height; Step back with one foot, keeping your heel flat on the ground; Bend your front knee slightly and lean forward, keeping your back leg straight; You should feel a stretch in your calf muscle
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall or sturdy object, about an arm's length away.
Step:2 Place your hands on the wall or object at shoulder height.
Step:3 Step back with one foot, keeping your heel flat on the ground.
Step:4 Bend your front knee slightly and lean forward, keeping your back leg straight.
Step:5 You should feel a stretch in your calf muscle.
Step:6 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:7 Repeat on the other leg.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Incline Press With Rigid
exercises.name_vi: Cable One Arm Incline Press With Rigid
exercises.description: Bài tập cable one arm incline press with rigid. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position; Sit on an incline bench facing away from the cable machine; Grasp the handle with one hand and bring it up to shoulder height. Emphasize rigid control; Position your feet firmly on the ground and maintain a stable position; Press the handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position.
Step:2 Sit on an incline bench facing away from the cable machine.
Step:3 Grasp the handle with one hand and bring it up to shoulder height. Emphasize rigid control.
Step:4 Position your feet firmly on the ground and maintain a stable position.
Step:5 Press the handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handle back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Wind Sprints
exercises.description: Bài tập wind sprints. Cách thực hiện: Find an open space or a track to perform the exercise; Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart; Begin running as fast as you can, pumping your arms and driving your knees up; Continue sprinting for a specific distance or time period; Rest and repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Find an open space or a track to perform the exercise.
Step:2 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Begin running as fast as you can, pumping your arms and driving your knees up.
Step:4 Continue sprinting for a specific distance or time period.
Step:5 Rest and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Farmers Walk
exercises.description: Bài tập farmers walk. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your sides; Keep your back straight and your shoulders back; Take small, controlled steps forward, maintaining an upright posture; Continue walking for the desired distance or time; To finish, stop walking and carefully lower the dumbbells to your sides
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your sides.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your shoulders back.
Step:3 Take small, controlled steps forward, maintaining an upright posture.
Step:4 Continue walking for the desired distance or time.
Step:5 To finish, stop walking and carefully lower the dumbbells to your sides.

exercises.name: Suspended Split Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập suspended split squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing away from a suspension trainer with your feet shoulder-width apart; Extend one leg forward and place the top of your foot in the foot cradle of the suspension trainer; Bend your standing leg and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your chest up and your knee in line with your toes; Push through your heel to return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing away from a suspension trainer with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one leg forward and place the top of your foot in the foot cradle of the suspension trainer.
Step:3 Bend your standing leg and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your chest up and your knee in line with your toes.
Step:4 Push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.name: Wide Grip Pull-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập wide grip pull-up. Cách thực hiện: Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands wider than shoulder-width apart; Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together; Pull your body up towards the bar until your chin is above the bar; Lower your body back down to the starting position with control; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Step:3 Pull your body up towards the bar until your chin is above the bar.
Step:4 Lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Intermediate Style Dumbbell Preacher Curl Over Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Intermediate Style Dumbbell Preacher Curl Over Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập intermediate style dumbbell preacher curl over exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your elbow on the exercise ball; (intermediate variation) Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder; Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your elbow on the exercise ball.
Step:3 (intermediate variation) Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Tricep Pushdown
exercises.description: Bài tập cable one arm tricep pushdown. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a cable machine with a straight bar attachment at chest height; Grasp the bar with an overhand grip and step back to create tension in the cable; Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees; Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise; Start with your arm fully extended and perpendicular to the floor
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with a straight bar attachment at chest height.
Step:2 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip and step back to create tension in the cable.
Step:3 Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Start with your arm fully extended and perpendicular to the floor.
Step:6 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and push the bar down until your arm is fully extended.
Step:7 Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Band Single Leg Reverse Calf Raise
exercises.name_vi: Band Single Leg Reverse Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập band single leg reverse calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place the band around the ball of your foot; Hold onto a stable object for balance; Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the ball of your foot; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place the band around the ball of your foot.
Step:2 Hold onto a stable object for balance.
Step:3 Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the ball of your foot.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Alternate Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated alternate press. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward; Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward; Press one dumbbell up overhead, fully extending your arm; Lower the dumbbell back down to shoulder height; Repeat with the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press one dumbbell up overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell back down to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Pulldown Bicep Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable pulldown bicep curl. Cách thực hiện: Attach a straight bar to the cable machine at the highest setting; Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart; Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary; Exhale and slowly curl the bar down towards your thighs, keeping your wrists straight
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Exhale and slowly curl the bar down towards your thighs, keeping your wrists straight.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Rough Cable Standing One Arm Triceps Extension
exercises.name_vi: Rough Cable Standing One Arm Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập rough cable standing one arm triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine; Hold the cable handle with your right hand, palm facing down, and position your arm so that it is fully extended and parallel to the ground; Keep your elbow stationary and close to your body; Slowly bend your elbow, lowering the cable handle towards the back of your head; Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position. Focus on rough movement
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your right hand, palm facing down, and position your arm so that it is fully extended and parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Keep your elbow stationary and close to your body.
Step:4 Slowly bend your elbow, lowering the cable handle towards the back of your head.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position. Focus on rough movement.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform the exercise with your left arm.

exercises.name: Oblique Crunches Floor
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với thảm tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your shoulder blades off the floor, rotating your torso to one side.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then lower your shoulder blades back down to the floor.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, alternating sides with each repetition.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Single Leg Split Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell single leg split squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand; Take a step forward with one foot and position your feet so that your front foot is flat on the ground and your back foot is elevated on a bench or step; Lower your body by bending your front knee and hip, keeping your back knee slightly bent and your back heel off the ground; Continue lowering until your front thigh is parallel to the ground, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with one foot and position your feet so that your front foot is flat on the ground and your back foot is elevated on a bench or step.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your front knee and hip, keeping your back knee slightly bent and your back heel off the ground.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your front thigh is parallel to the ground, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

exercises.name: Barbell Full Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tạ đòn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to lower your body down.
Step:4 Bend at the knees and hips, pushing your hips back and down as if sitting into a chair.
Step:5 Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:6 Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels.
Step:7 Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Seated Piriformis Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your right knee and place your right foot on the outside of your left knee.
Step:3 Place your left elbow on the outside of your right knee and gently twist your torso to the right.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Cross Body Hammer Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell cross body hammer curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body; Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary; Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the dumbbells across your body towards your opposite shoulder; Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the dumbbells across your body towards your opposite shoulder.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Reverse Decline Close Grip Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Landmine 180
exercises.description: Bài tập landmine 180. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with both hands in front of your chest; Bend your knees slightly and rotate your torso to the right, swinging the barbell down towards your right hip; As you reach the bottom of the movement, quickly reverse the motion and rotate your torso to the left, swinging the barbell up and across your body towards your left shoulder; Continue this twisting motion, alternating sides, for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with both hands in front of your chest.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and rotate your torso to the right, swinging the barbell down towards your right hip.
Step:3 As you reach the bottom of the movement, quickly reverse the motion and rotate your torso to the left, swinging the barbell up and across your body towards your left shoulder.
Step:4 Continue this twisting motion, alternating sides, for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm press on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle; Hold a dumbbell in one hand and position it at shoulder height, with your elbow bent and palm facing forward; Slowly press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended, while keeping your core engaged and maintaining balance on the exercise ball; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and position it at shoulder height, with your elbow bent and palm facing forward.
Step:3 Slowly press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended, while keeping your core engaged and maintaining balance on the exercise ball.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Barbell Pendlay Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Pull the barbell towards your upper abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Suspended Reverse Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your knees up towards your chest, curling your pelvis towards your ribcage.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your knees back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Assisted Pull-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập band assisted pull-up. Cách thực hiện: Attach the band to a pull-up bar or sturdy anchor point; Step onto the band and grip the bar with your palms facing away from you, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang with your arms fully extended, keeping your core engaged and your shoulders down and back; Pull your body up towards the bar by squeezing your shoulder blades together and driving your elbows down towards your hips; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a pull-up bar or sturdy anchor point.
Step:2 Step onto the band and grip the bar with your palms facing away from you, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang with your arms fully extended, keeping your core engaged and your shoulders down and back.
Step:4 Pull your body up towards the bar by squeezing your shoulder blades together and driving your elbows down towards your hips.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập bắp chân với tạ đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Place the balls of your feet on a raised surface such as a step or block, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Hold onto the dumbbell for stability.
Step:4 Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Fly On Exercise Ball Improved
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Fly On Exercise Ball Improved
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm fly on exercise ball improved. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground; Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your upper back is resting on the exercise ball; Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inwards; Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow; Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your upper back is resting on the exercise ball.
Step:3 Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inwards.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms. Focus on improved movement.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Supported Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell supported squat.
