Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides; Keeping your chest up and core engaged, slowly lower your body down by bending your knees and pushing your hips back; Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, slowly lower your body down by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cambered Bar Lying Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up a barbell on the floor and lie face down on a bench with your chest just off the edge.
Step:2 Reach down and grab the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 With your legs straight and feet on the ground, lift the barbell off the floor by extending your arms.
Step:4 Pull the barbell towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Assisted Motion Russian Twist
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tạ đơn, thảm tập, bóng Thụy Sĩ. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Hold the medicine ball with both hands in front of your chest.
Step:3 Lean back slightly, engaging your abs and keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Slowly twist your torso to the right, bringing the medicine ball towards the right side of your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the medicine ball towards the left side of your body.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Curl V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tạ đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cross Body Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground and twist to bring your right elbow towards your left knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline one arm press. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your thigh; Lie back on the bench and position the dumbbell at shoulder level, palm facing forward; Press the dumbbell upward and slightly inward, extending your arm fully; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your thigh.
Step:2 Lie back on the bench and position the dumbbell at shoulder level, palm facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbell upward and slightly inward, extending your arm fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Decline Twist Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell decline twist fly. Cách thực hiện: Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended straight up over your chest; Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest; As you lower the dumbbells, twist your wrists so that your palms face forward at the bottom of the movement; Reverse the motion and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position, squeezing your chest muscles at the top
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 As you lower the dumbbells, twist your wrists so that your palms face forward at the bottom of the movement.
Step:5 Reverse the motion and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position, squeezing your chest muscles at the top.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Decline Chest Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your chest.
Step:2 Place your feet flat on the ground and keep your back pressed against the bench.
Step:3 Extend your arm and push the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, fully extending your elbow.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Supination On Floor
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying supination on floor. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back on the floor with your legs extended and your arms by your sides, holding a dumbbell in each hand; Rotate your palms to face up, keeping your elbows close to your sides; Slowly curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, squeezing your forearms; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back on the floor with your legs extended and your arms by your sides, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Rotate your palms to face up, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 Slowly curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, squeezing your forearms.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Sledge Hammer
exercises.description: Bài tập sledge hammer. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the sledge hammer with both hands; Engage your core and keep your back straight; Swing the sledge hammer down towards the ground, using your core and upper body strength; As you swing down, pivot your hips and transfer the force to the hammer; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the sledge hammer with both hands.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Swing the sledge hammer down towards the ground, using your core and upper body strength.
Step:4 As you swing down, pivot your hips and transfer the force to the hammer.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell One Arm Floor Press
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell one arm floor press. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Hold the kettlebell in one hand with your palm facing towards your feet and your arm extended straight up towards the ceiling; Slowly lower the kettlebell towards your chest by bending your elbow, keeping your upper arm close to your body; Pause for a moment when the kettlebell is just above your chest, then push it back up to the starting position by extending your elbow; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the kettlebell in one hand with your palm facing towards your feet and your arm extended straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:3 Slowly lower the kettlebell towards your chest by bending your elbow, keeping your upper arm close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment when the kettlebell is just above your chest, then push it back up to the starting position by extending your elbow.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Barbell Wide-Grip Upright Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Low Bar Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập smith low bar squat. Cách thực hiện: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at a height that allows you to comfortably rest it on your upper back; Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned outwards; Step under the bar and position it across your upper back, resting it on your traps; Grip the bar with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Unrack the bar by straightening your legs and stepping back from the rack
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at a height that allows you to comfortably rest it on your upper back.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned outwards.
Step:3 Step under the bar and position it across your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Step:4 Grip the bar with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Unrack the bar by straightening your legs and stepping back from the rack.
Step:6 Take a deep breath and brace your core.
Step:7 Initiate the squat by pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:8 Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:9 Keep your chest up and your back straight throughout the movement.
Step:10 Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Step:11 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Standing Leg Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell standing leg calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a barbell across your upper back; Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Battling Ropes
exercises.description: Bài tập battling ropes. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent; Hold one end of the rope in each hand, with your palms facing each other; Raise your arms to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent; Begin making alternating waves with the ropes by rapidly raising and lowering each arm; Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold one end of the rope in each hand, with your palms facing each other.
Step:3 Raise your arms to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Begin making alternating waves with the ropes by rapidly raising and lowering each arm.
Step:5 Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Mountain Climber
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Engage your core and bring your right knee towards your chest, then quickly switch and bring your left knee towards your chest.
Step:3 Continue alternating legs in a running motion, keeping your hips low and your core engaged.
Step:4 Maintain a steady pace and breathe evenly throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Walking On Incline Treadmill
exercises.description: Bài tập walking on incline treadmill. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the incline level on the treadmill to your desired intensity; Stand on the treadmill with your feet shoulder-width apart; Start walking at a comfortable pace, ensuring that you maintain proper form; Engage your core muscles and keep your back straight throughout the exercise; Continue walking on the incline treadmill for the desired duration of your cardio workout
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the incline level on the treadmill to your desired intensity.
Step:2 Stand on the treadmill with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Start walking at a comfortable pace, ensuring that you maintain proper form.
Step:4 Engage your core muscles and keep your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Continue walking on the incline treadmill for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Step:6 Gradually decrease the incline and speed of the treadmill to cool down before stopping.

exercises.name: Walk Elliptical Cross Trainer
exercises.description: Bài tập walk elliptical cross trainer. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the resistance level and incline of the elliptical machine to your desired settings; Step onto the pedals of the machine and grip the handles lightly; Begin by pushing down with your feet and pulling the handles towards your body; Continue this motion, alternating between pushing and pulling, to simulate a walking or running motion; Maintain a steady pace and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the resistance level and incline of the elliptical machine to your desired settings.
Step:2 Step onto the pedals of the machine and grip the handles lightly.
Step:3 Begin by pushing down with your feet and pulling the handles towards your body.
Step:4 Continue this motion, alternating between pushing and pulling, to simulate a walking or running motion.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Continue for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Step:7 Gradually decrease the intensity and speed of the machine before stepping off.

exercises.name: Twin Handle Parallel Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.name_vi: Twin Handle Parallel Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập twin handle parallel grip lat pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the cable machine; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart; Sit down and position your thighs under the thigh pads, keeping your feet flat on the floor; Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a neutral spine; Pull the handles down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit down and position your thighs under the thigh pads, keeping your feet flat on the floor.
Step:4 Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a neutral spine.
Step:5 Pull the handles down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, feeling the contraction in your lats.
Step:7 Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Side Bridge V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập side bridge v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other; Place your forearm on the ground directly below your shoulder, with your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle; Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet; Hold this position for the desired amount of time; Lower your hips back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Place your forearm on the ground directly below your shoulder, with your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet.
Step:4 Hold this position for the desired amount of time.
Step:5 Lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Single Leg Bridge With Outstretched Leg
exercises.name_vi: Single Leg Bridge With Outstretched Leg
exercises.description: Bài tập single leg bridge with outstretched leg. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Extend one leg straight out in front of you; Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders; Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Extend one leg straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.name: Assisted Seated Pectoralis Major Stretch With Stability Ball
exercises.name_vi: Assisted Seated Pectoralis Major Stretch With Stability Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted seated pectoralis major stretch with stability ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a stability ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you; Slowly lower the stability ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your pectoral muscles; Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a stability ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Slowly lower the stability ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your pectoral muscles.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Frog Planche
exercises.description: Bài tập frog planche. Cách thực hiện: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your feet together; Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back straight; As you lower your body, lift your feet off the ground and bring your knees towards your chest; Hold this position for a few seconds, then extend your legs back out and push yourself back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 As you lower your body, lift your feet off the ground and bring your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, then extend your legs back out and push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Assisted Lying Gluteus And Piriformis Stretch
exercises.name_vi: Assisted Lying Gluteus And Piriformis Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted lying gluteus and piriformis stretch. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your back with your legs extended; Bend your right knee and place your right ankle on your left thigh, just above the knee; Grasp your left thigh with both hands and gently pull it towards your chest; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds; Release the stretch and repeat on the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your legs extended.
Step:2 Bend your right knee and place your right ankle on your left thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 Grasp your left thigh with both hands and gently pull it towards your chest.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Release the stretch and repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Cable Reverse Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a cable to a low pulley and lie down facing up on a mat.
Step:2 Hold the cable with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lift your legs up, bringing your thighs towards your chest.
Step:4 While keeping your upper body stable, curl your pelvis up towards your chest, lifting your hips off the mat.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Handstand Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập vai với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Find a wall and face away from it, standing a few feet away.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground shoulder-width apart and kick your feet up against the wall, coming into a handstand position.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your head towards the ground, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Push through your hands and extend your arms to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tạ đòn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing your knees to bend slightly.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, then push through your heels and engage your glutes to return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Front Raise V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell front raise v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs; Keep your back straight and engage your core; Slowly lift the dumbbells in front of you, with your arms straight, until they are at shoulder level; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Slowly lift the dumbbells in front of you, with your arms straight, until they are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Bench Dip (Knees Bent)
exercises.description: Bài tập bench dip (knees bent). Cách thực hiện: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge next to your hips; Slide your butt off the bench and straighten your legs in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground; Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge next to your hips.
Step:2 Slide your butt off the bench and straighten your legs in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lunge
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tạ đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lower your body.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg.
Step:6 Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Extended Range One Arm Press On Floor
exercises.name_vi: Kettlebell Extended Range One Arm Press On Floor
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell extended range one arm press on floor. Cách thực hiện: Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Hold a kettlebell in one hand, with your palm facing towards your feet; Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow locked and your wrist straight; Slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in one hand, with your palm facing towards your feet.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow locked and your wrist straight.
Step:4 Slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing Around World
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing around world. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand; Extend your arms straight out to the sides at shoulder height, palms facing down; Keeping your arms straight, slowly rotate your arms in a circular motion, bringing the dumbbells in front of your body and then overhead; Continue the circular motion, bringing the dumbbells back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out to the sides at shoulder height, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly rotate your arms in a circular motion, bringing the dumbbells in front of your body and then overhead.
Step:4 Continue the circular motion, bringing the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: One Arm Against Wall Compressed
exercises.description: Bài tập one arm against wall compressed. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart; Extend one arm straight out in front of you and place your palm against the wall; Engage your core and lean your body forward, keeping your arm straight and your back flat. Maintain compressed form throughout; Slowly push against the wall with your palm, activating your lat muscles; Hold the position for a few seconds, then release and repeat with the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one arm straight out in front of you and place your palm against the wall.
Step:3 Engage your core and lean your body forward, keeping your arm straight and your back flat. Maintain compressed form throughout.
Step:4 Slowly push against the wall with your palm, activating your lat muscles.
Step:5 Hold the position for a few seconds, then release and repeat with the other arm.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Lying Side Lat Stretch
exercises.name_vi: Exercise Ball Lying Side Lat Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball lying side lat stretch. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by the stability ball; Place your top arm on the ball for stability; Reach your top arm overhead and allow your torso to rotate slightly; Feel the stretch in your lat muscles on the side of your body; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by the stability ball.
Step:2 Place your top arm on the ball for stability.
Step:3 Reach your top arm overhead and allow your torso to rotate slightly.
Step:4 Feel the stretch in your lat muscles on the side of your body.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.

exercises.name: Arms Apart Circular Toe Touch (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập arms apart circular toe touch (male). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and arms extended to the sides; Keeping your legs straight, bend forward at the waist and reach down towards your toes with your right hand; As you reach down, simultaneously lift your left leg straight up behind you, maintaining balance; Return to the starting position and repeat the movement with your left hand reaching towards your toes and your right leg lifting up behind you; Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and arms extended to the sides.
Step:2 Keeping your legs straight, bend forward at the waist and reach down towards your toes with your right hand.
Step:3 As you reach down, simultaneously lift your left leg straight up behind you, maintaining balance.
Step:4 Return to the starting position and repeat the movement with your left hand reaching towards your toes and your right leg lifting up behind you.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Back Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập lever back extension. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the machine to fit your body size and range of motion; Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet secured; Place your hands on the handles or grip bars; Engage your core and slowly lean forward, allowing your back to round slightly; Pause for a moment at the bottom position, feeling a stretch in your lower back
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body size and range of motion.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet secured.
Step:3 Place your hands on the handles or grip bars.
Step:4 Engage your core and slowly lean forward, allowing your back to round slightly.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom position, feeling a stretch in your lower back.
Step:6 Using your back muscles, slowly raise your torso back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập cable pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable pulldown machine so that the seat is at a comfortable height and the knee pad is secured; Sit on the seat with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground; Grasp the cable bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Lean back slightly and engage your core; Pull the cable bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable pulldown machine so that the seat is at a comfortable height and the knee pad is secured.
Step:2 Sit on the seat with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the cable bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean back slightly and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the cable bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Korean Dips
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Position yourself between two parallel bars with your arms extended and supporting your body weight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Close-Grip Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell close-grip press. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs; Using your thighs to help raise the dumbbells, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width; Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. This will be your starting position; As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells to your side until they are about level with your chest; As you exhale, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Using your thighs to help raise the dumbbells, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width.
Step:3 Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. This will be your starting position.
Step:4 As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells to your side until they are about level with your chest.
Step:5 As you exhale, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Squat Jump Step Rear Lunge
exercises.name_vi: Barbell Squat Jump Step Rear Lunge
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell squat jump step rear lunge. Cách thực hiện: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back; Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back; Explode upwards, jumping off the ground as high as you can; Land softly on your feet and immediately step back with one leg into a reverse lunge; Lower your body down until your front thigh is parallel to the ground, keeping your back straight
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 Explode upwards, jumping off the ground as high as you can.
Step:4 Land softly on your feet and immediately step back with one leg into a reverse lunge.
Step:5 Lower your body down until your front thigh is parallel to the ground, keeping your back straight.
Step:6 Push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the jump and lunge sequence on the other leg.
Step:8 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Seated One Arm Concentration Curl
exercises.name_vi: Cable Seated One Arm Concentration Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable seated one arm concentration curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and your back straight; Hold a cable handle with one hand and place your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee; Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the cable handle towards your shoulder while exhaling; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps; Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position while inhaling
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle with one hand and place your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the cable handle towards your shoulder while exhaling.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position while inhaling.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Kneeling Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập bodyweight kneeling triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Kneel down on the ground with your knees hip-width apart; Place your hands on the ground in front of you, shoulder-width apart, fingers pointing forward; Extend your legs straight behind you, balancing on your toes and hands, forming a straight line from head to heels; Bend your elbows and lower your upper body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to straighten your arms and return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Kneel down on the ground with your knees hip-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground in front of you, shoulder-width apart, fingers pointing forward.
Step:3 Extend your legs straight behind you, balancing on your toes and hands, forming a straight line from head to heels.
Step:4 Bend your elbows and lower your upper body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Seated Twist
exercises.description: Bài tập band seated twist. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you and your back straight; Wrap the band around your waist and hold the ends with both hands; Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to one side, keeping your back straight and your feet on the ground; Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat the twist to the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you and your back straight.
Step:2 Wrap the band around your waist and hold the ends with both hands.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to one side, keeping your back straight and your feet on the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the twist to the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Seated Twist (On Stability Ball)
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted seated twist (on stability ball). Cách thực hiện: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle; Hold a weight plate or dumbbell with both hands close to your chest; Engage your core and slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips stable; Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat the rotation to the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a weight plate or dumbbell with both hands close to your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips stable.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the rotation to the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell One Arm Jerk
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell one arm jerk. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder height; Bend your knees slightly and engage your core; Press the kettlebell overhead in a straight line, fully extending your arm; As you press the kettlebell overhead, simultaneously dip your knees and quickly straighten them to generate momentum; As the kettlebell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it by bending your knees and hips
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Press the kettlebell overhead in a straight line, fully extending your arm.
Step:4 As you press the kettlebell overhead, simultaneously dip your knees and quickly straighten them to generate momentum.
Step:5 As the kettlebell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it by bending your knees and hips.
Step:6 Catch the kettlebell with a slight bend in your knees and hips, and your arm fully extended overhead.
Step:7 Stand up straight, fully extending your knees and hips, and stabilize the kettlebell overhead.
Step:8 Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by bending your knees and hips, and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Plyo Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell plyo squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides; Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back; As you reach the bottom of the squat, explode upward, jumping off the ground; While in the air, quickly switch the position of your feet, landing with your opposite foot forward; Immediately lower your body back into a squat position and repeat the jump, switching your feet again
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 As you reach the bottom of the squat, explode upward, jumping off the ground.
Step:4 While in the air, quickly switch the position of your feet, landing with your opposite foot forward.
Step:5 Immediately lower your body back into a squat position and repeat the jump, switching your feet again.
Step:6 Continue alternating the position of your feet with each jump for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Tate Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell tate press. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other; Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, then rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing away from you; Press the dumbbells up until your arms are fully extended, then lower them back down to shoulder height; Rotate your wrists back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, then rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing away from you.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells up until your arms are fully extended, then lower them back down to shoulder height.
Step:4 Rotate your wrists back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Wide Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell wide squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward; Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts; Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat, pushing your hips back and bending your knees; Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat, pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:4 Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Standing Front Raise Over Head
exercises.name_vi: Barbell Standing Front Raise Over Head
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell standing front raise over head. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip; Keep your back straight and engage your core; Slowly raise the barbell in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down; Continue lifting until the barbell is slightly above shoulder level; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Slowly raise the barbell in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until the barbell is slightly above shoulder level.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a weight plate or dumbbell on your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your shoulder blades are off the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Seated Shoulder Press
exercises.description: Bài tập resistance band seated shoulder press. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold the resistance band with both hands, palms facing forward, and bring it up to shoulder level; Press the band overhead, extending your arms fully; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back down to shoulder level; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the resistance band with both hands, palms facing forward, and bring it up to shoulder level.
Step:3 Press the band overhead, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back down to shoulder level.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Seated Bicep Curl On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Seated Bicep Curl On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm seated bicep curl on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm fully extended; Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Barbell Rear Delt Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:4 Pull the barbell towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Hanging Pike Weak
exercises.description: Bài tập hanging pike weak. Cách thực hiện: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you; Engage your core and lift your legs up towards the bar, keeping them straight; Continue lifting until your body forms a 'V' shape, with your legs parallel to the ground. Emphasize weak control; Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up towards the bar, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your body forms a 'V' shape, with your legs parallel to the ground. Emphasize weak control.
Step:4 Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Backward Jump
exercises.description: Bài tập backward jump. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Bend your knees slightly and jump backwards, pushing off with both feet; Land softly on the balls of your feet, bending your knees to absorb the impact; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and jump backwards, pushing off with both feet.
Step:3 Land softly on the balls of your feet, bending your knees to absorb the impact.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập lever triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and fully extend your arms in front of you; Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the handles towards your forehead by bending your elbows; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handles back up to the starting position by extending your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and fully extend your arms in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the handles towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handles back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Clean And Press
exercises.description: Bài tập vai với tạ đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the floor in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Drive through your heels and extend your hips and knees to lift the barbell off the floor, keeping it close to your body.
Step:4 As the barbell reaches your thighs, explosively extend your hips, shrug your shoulders, and pull the barbell up towards your chest.
Step:5 As the barbell reaches chest height, quickly drop under it and catch it at shoulder level, with your elbows pointing forward and your palms facing up.
Step:6 From the catch position, press the barbell overhead by extending your arms and pushing the barbell straight up.
Step:7 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Decline One Arm Hammer Press
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Decline One Arm Hammer Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell decline one arm hammer press. Cách thực hiện: Lie on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your chest; Extend your arm straight up, keeping your elbow slightly bent; Lower the dumbbell down towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow close to your body; Press the dumbbell back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your chest.
Step:2 Extend your arm straight up, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbell down towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Power Clean
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start with the barbell on the ground in front of you, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and chest up as you lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees.
Step:4 As the barbell reaches your mid-thigh, explosively pull it upwards, shrugging your shoulders and pulling your elbows high and to the sides.
Step:5 As the barbell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it, rotating your elbows around and catching the barbell on your shoulders in a front squat position.
Step:6 Stand up with the barbell, fully extending your hips and knees.
Step:7 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position, keeping control of the weight throughout the movement.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Palms Up Wrist Curl Over A Bench
exercises.name_vi: Barbell Palms Up Wrist Curl Over A Bench
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell palms up wrist curl over a bench. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up; Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge; Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upwards as far as possible; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upwards as far as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Press On Exercise Ball Modified
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Press On Exercise Ball Modified
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline one arm press on exercise ball modified. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand, feet flat on the ground; Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball; Hold the dumbbell at shoulder height with your palm facing forward; Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Emphasize modified control
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand, feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell at shoulder height with your palm facing forward.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Emphasize modified control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Biceps Leg Concentration Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập biceps leg concentration curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your legs spread apart and your feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee; With your palm facing up, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary; Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your legs spread apart and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 With your palm facing up, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Cable Rope Seated Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the rowing machine with your feet flat on the footrests and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the cable ropes with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward, maintaining a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pull the cable ropes towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Roller Reverse Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your arms extended straight above your head and your legs straight out in front of you.
Step:2 Place the roller between your feet and grip it with your toes.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the ground and curl your knees towards your chest, rolling the roller towards your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position, rolling the roller away from your body.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Hammer Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tạ đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cocoons
exercises.description: Bài tập cocoons. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards; Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Lat Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball lat stretch. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in one hand and extend your arm straight up overhead; Slowly lean to the opposite side, feeling a stretch in your lat muscle; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then return to the starting position; Repeat on the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and extend your arm straight up overhead.
Step:3 Slowly lean to the opposite side, feeling a stretch in your lat muscle.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Crunch (On Stability Ball, Arms Straight)
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie back on the ball until your lower back is supported and your upper body is parallel to the floor.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:4 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ball, curling your shoulders towards your hips.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Lying Lifting (On Hip)
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell lying lifting (on hip). Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent; Hold the barbell with an overhand grip and position it on your hips; Engaging your glutes, lift your hips off the bench until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip and position it on your hips.
Step:3 Engaging your glutes, lift your hips off the bench until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Plyo Push Up
exercises.description: Bài tập plyo push up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line; Push explosively off the ground, using your chest muscles to propel your upper body off the ground; Land softly with your hands back in the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:3 Push explosively off the ground, using your chest muscles to propel your upper body off the ground.
Step:4 Land softly with your hands back in the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Diamond Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập diamond push-up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands close together, forming a diamond shape with your thumbs and index fingers; Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe, engaging your core and glutes; Lower your chest towards the diamond shape formed by your hands, keeping your elbows close to your body; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands close together, forming a diamond shape with your thumbs and index fingers.
Step:2 Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe, engaging your core and glutes.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the diamond shape formed by your hands, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Swimmer Kicks V. 2 (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập swimmer kicks v. 2 (male). Cách thực hiện: Lie face down on a mat with your arms extended overhead; Engage your core and lift your chest and legs off the ground simultaneously; Kick your legs up and down in a fluttering motion, as if you were swimming; Continue kicking for the desired number of repetitions; Lower your chest and legs back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a mat with your arms extended overhead.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your chest and legs off the ground simultaneously.
Step:3 Kick your legs up and down in a fluttering motion, as if you were swimming.
Step:4 Continue kicking for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:5 Lower your chest and legs back down to the starting position.

exercises.name: Cable Rear Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập cable rear pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable machine so that the pulley is at the highest position; Sit facing the machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent; Grasp the cable attachment with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your chest up; Pull the cable attachment down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the pulley is at the highest position.
Step:2 Sit facing the machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the cable attachment with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
Step:5 Pull the cable attachment down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the cable back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your palms facing forward and your arms extended above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Rear Lunge
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell rear lunge. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand; Take a step backward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position; Bend your left knee and lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment, then push through your left heel to return to the starting position; Repeat on the other side, stepping back with your left foot
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step backward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Bend your left knee and lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, stepping back with your left foot.

exercises.name: Band Reverse Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập band reverse fly. Cách thực hiện: Attach the band to a stationary object at chest height; Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with both hands in front of you; Keep your arms straight and lift them out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground; Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement; Slowly lower your arms back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a stationary object at chest height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with both hands in front of you.
Step:3 Keep your arms straight and lift them out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Front Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập band front lateral raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing down; Keep your arms straight and lift the band up in front of you until your arms are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing down.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and lift the band up in front of you until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Leg Up Hamstring Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập leg up hamstring stretch. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended; Bend one knee and bring it towards your chest, holding onto your thigh or shin; Straighten your leg as much as possible while keeping it elevated; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds; Repeat with the other leg
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended.
Step:2 Bend one knee and bring it towards your chest, holding onto your thigh or shin.
Step:3 Straighten your leg as much as possible while keeping it elevated.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Repeat with the other leg.

exercises.name: March Sit (Wall)
exercises.description: Bài tập march sit (wall). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your back against a wall and your feet hip-width apart; Slowly slide your back down the wall until your knees are bent at a 90-degree angle; Lift your right foot off the ground and bring your knee towards your chest; Lower your right foot back down and lift your left foot off the ground, bringing your knee towards your chest; Continue alternating between lifting your right and left foot for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your back against a wall and your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Slowly slide your back down the wall until your knees are bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Lift your right foot off the ground and bring your knee towards your chest.
Step:4 Lower your right foot back down and lift your left foot off the ground, bringing your knee towards your chest.
Step:5 Continue alternating between lifting your right and left foot for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Pike Push Up
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball pike push up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a push-up position with your hands on the floor and your shins resting on the stability ball; Engage your core and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, rolling the ball towards your hands; Keep your legs straight and your body in a pike position, forming an inverted V shape; Bend your elbows and lower your upper body towards the floor, keeping your head in line with your hands; Push through your hands and extend your arms to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands on the floor and your shins resting on the stability ball.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, rolling the ball towards your hands.
Step:3 Keep your legs straight and your body in a pike position, forming an inverted V shape.
Step:4 Bend your elbows and lower your upper body towards the floor, keeping your head in line with your hands.
Step:5 Push through your hands and extend your arms to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing Alternate Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing alternate raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body; Keep your back straight and your core engaged; Raise one dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down; Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Raise one dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:7 Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Zottman Preacher Curl
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Zottman Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm zottman preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a preacher curl bench and hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip; Rest your upper arm on the preacher bench pad, allowing your arm to fully extend; Curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary; At the top of the curl, rotate your wrist so that your palm faces up; Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position, rotating your wrist back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench and hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Rest your upper arm on the preacher bench pad, allowing your arm to fully extend.
Step:3 Curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 At the top of the curl, rotate your wrist so that your palm faces up.
Step:5 Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position, rotating your wrist back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Cable Standing One Arm Triceps Extension
exercises.name_vi: Cable Standing One Arm Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập cable standing one arm triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine; Hold the cable handle with your right hand, palm facing down, and position your arm so that it is fully extended and parallel to the ground; Keep your elbow stationary and close to your body; Slowly bend your elbow, lowering the cable handle towards the back of your head; Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
