Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your right hand, palm facing down, and position your arm so that it is fully extended and parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Keep your elbow stationary and close to your body.
Step:4 Slowly bend your elbow, lowering the cable handle towards the back of your head.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform the exercise with your left arm.

exercises.name: Barbell Lying Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell lying preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arms extended over the edge, holding a barbell with an underhand grip; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the bar until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps; Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arms extended over the edge, holding a barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the bar until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Rotated Dumbbell Pronate-Grip Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập rotated dumbbell pronate-grip triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench or chair with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell with both hands, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight up overhead; Keeping your upper arms close to your head and elbows pointing forward, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbows; Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Focus on rotated movement
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight up overhead.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms close to your head and elbows pointing forward, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Focus on rotated movement.

exercises.name: Negative Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Kneeling Twist
exercises.description: Bài tập lever kneeling twist. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees resting on the pads and your upper body facing forward; Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability; Keeping your core engaged, twist your torso to one side as far as comfortably possible; Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat the twist to the opposite side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees resting on the pads and your upper body facing forward.
Step:2 Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged, twist your torso to one side as far as comfortably possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the twist to the opposite side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Reverse Grip Bent Over Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up, until your torso is almost parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pull the barbell towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Chest Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement.
Step:4 Pause briefly at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Squat On Bosu Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập squat on bosu ball. Cách thực hiện: Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side up; Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and position yourself on top of the bosu ball; Lower your body down by bending your knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair; Keep your chest up and your weight on your heels; Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side up.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and position yourself on top of the bosu ball.
Step:3 Lower your body down by bending your knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:4 Keep your chest up and your weight on your heels.
Step:5 Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Chin-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:3 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Lunge
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tạ đòn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and a barbell resting on your upper back.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your torso upright.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your right knee until your thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg, alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Mixed Grip Chin-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập mixed grip chin-up. Cách thực hiện: Grab the pull-up bar with an underhand grip (palms facing towards you) and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground; Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position with control
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an underhand grip (palms facing towards you) and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez Barbell Decline Close Grip Face Press - Mini Variation
exercises.name_vi: Ez Barbell Decline Close Grip Face Press - Mini Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập ez barbell decline close grip face press - mini variation. Cách thực hiện: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet; Grasp the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing each other; Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body; Lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows; Pause for a moment, then press the barbell back up to the starting position. Emphasize mini control
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet.
Step:2 Grasp the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then press the barbell back up to the starting position. Emphasize mini control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Incline Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập cable incline fly. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable machine to a low position and attach the handles; Sit on an incline bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the floor; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight out in front of you; Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion; Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a low position and attach the handles.
Step:2 Sit on an incline bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Standing Rear Delt Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet.
Step:2 Hold the band handles with your palms facing each other and your arms extended in front of you.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Pull the band towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Jump Squat V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập jump squat v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back; Jump explosively, extending your hips and knees fully; Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately lower your body back into a squat position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 Jump explosively, extending your hips and knees fully.
Step:4 Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately lower your body back into a squat position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Front Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập band front raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing down; Keep your arms straight and slowly raise them forward until they are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing down.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and slowly raise them forward until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Intermediate Hip Flexor And Quad Stretch
exercises.name_vi: Intermediate Hip Flexor And Quad Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập intermediate hip flexor and quad stretch. Cách thực hiện: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart; Hold onto a stable object for support; Bend your right knee and bring your right foot towards your glutes, grabbing the rope with your right hand; Slowly pull your right foot towards your glutes, feeling a stretch in your right quad; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold onto a stable object for support.
Step:3 Bend your right knee and bring your right foot towards your glutes, grabbing the rope with your right hand.
Step:4 Slowly pull your right foot towards your glutes, feeling a stretch in your right quad.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Release the stretch and repeat on the left side.

exercises.name: Crunch Floor
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your shoulders off the ground, curling forward towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Reverse Plank With Leg Lift
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you and your hands resting on the ground behind you, fingers pointing towards your feet.
Step:2 Press through your hands and lift your hips off the ground, coming into a reverse plank position.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift one leg off the ground, extending it straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Hold for a moment, then lower your leg back down.
Step:5 Repeat with the other leg.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Push-Up (On Stability Ball)
exercises.description: Bài tập push-up (on stability ball). Cách thực hiện: Place the stability ball on the ground and position yourself facing down with your hands on the ball, shoulder-width apart; Extend your legs straight out behind you, balancing on your toes; Engage your core and lower your chest towards the ball by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and position yourself facing down with your hands on the ball, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs straight out behind you, balancing on your toes.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower your chest towards the ball by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Reverse Grip Triceps Pushdown (Sz-Bar) (With Arm Blaster)
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Engage your triceps and slowly push the bar down until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward; Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso; Exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Standing Close-Grip Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight in front of you, gripping the bar or handles with a close grip.
Step:4 Pull the bar or handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Sled 45В° Leg Wide Press
exercises.description: Bài tập sled 45в° leg wide press. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle; Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the foot platform; Position your feet wider than shoulder-width apart; Push against the foot platform to extend your legs and straighten your knees; Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bend your knees to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the foot platform.
Step:3 Position your feet wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push against the foot platform to extend your legs and straighten your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bend your knees to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez-Bar Biceps Curl (With Arm Blaster)
exercises.description: Bài tập ez-bar biceps curl (with arm blaster). Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up; Place your upper arms against the arm blaster, keeping them stationary throughout the exercise; Keeping your elbows close to your body, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders; Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps; Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Place your upper arms against the arm blaster, keeping them stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Keeping your elbows close to your body, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Swing 360
exercises.description: Bài tập swing 360. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent; Hold your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground; Engage your core and swing your arms in a circular motion, rotating your torso as you do so; Continue the circular motion, swinging your arms and rotating your torso for the desired number of repetitions; Remember to breathe throughout the exercise
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Engage your core and swing your arms in a circular motion, rotating your torso as you do so.
Step:4 Continue the circular motion, swinging your arms and rotating your torso for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:5 Remember to breathe throughout the exercise.

exercises.name: Cable Straight Back Seated Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips.
Step:4 Pull the cable handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Shrug
exercises.description: Bài tập band shrug. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet, holding the ends with your hands; Keep your arms straight and relaxed, and let the band hang in front of your thighs; Engage your traps by shrugging your shoulders upward, lifting the band as high as possible; Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet, holding the ends with your hands.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and relaxed, and let the band hang in front of your thighs.
Step:3 Engage your traps by shrugging your shoulders upward, lifting the band as high as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to chest level.
Step:2 Lie flat on the bench with your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Step:3 Grip the bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the bar and lower it towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the bar touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the bar back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever One Arm Lateral Wide Pulldown
exercises.name_vi: Lever One Arm Lateral Wide Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập lever one arm lateral wide pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor; Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and fully extend your arm, keeping a slight bend in your elbow; Pull the handle down and across your body towards your opposite hip, squeezing your lat muscle at the bottom of the movement; Slowly return the handle to the starting position, fully extending your arm; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and fully extend your arm, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:3 Pull the handle down and across your body towards your opposite hip, squeezing your lat muscle at the bottom of the movement.
Step:4 Slowly return the handle to the starting position, fully extending your arm.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Intermediate Style Kneeling Plank Tap Shoulder (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a kneeling position with your hands on the ground, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on your toes, and lift your body into a plank position.
Step:3 (intermediate variation) Keeping your core engaged and your hips stable, lift one hand off the ground and tap the opposite shoulder.
Step:4 Return the hand to the ground and repeat with the other hand.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập band squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, with the band placed just above your knees; Keeping your chest up and core engaged, push your hips back and bend your knees to lower into a squat position; Make sure your knees are tracking over your toes and your weight is in your heels; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, with the band placed just above your knees.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, push your hips back and bend your knees to lower into a squat position.
Step:3 Make sure your knees are tracking over your toes and your weight is in your heels.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Inchworm V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập inchworm v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Start in a standing position with your feet hip-width apart; Bend forward at the waist and place your hands on the ground in front of you; Walk your hands forward until you are in a high plank position, with your body in a straight line from head to toe; Keeping your legs straight, walk your feet towards your hands, bringing your hips up towards the ceiling; Continue walking your hands forward, repeating the movement for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a standing position with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist and place your hands on the ground in front of you.
Step:3 Walk your hands forward until you are in a high plank position, with your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:4 Keeping your legs straight, walk your feet towards your hands, bringing your hips up towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Continue walking your hands forward, repeating the movement for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Alternate Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline alternate press. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs; Lean back on the bench and use your thighs to help raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward; Once at shoulder height, rotate your wrists so that the palms of your hands are facing forward; Push the dumbbells up with your chest and shoulders, extending your arms fully; Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, keeping your elbows slightly bent
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Lean back on the bench and use your thighs to help raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Once at shoulder height, rotate your wrists so that the palms of your hands are facing forward.
Step:4 Push the dumbbells up with your chest and shoulders, extending your arms fully.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.

exercises.name: Cable Tuck Reverse Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a cable to a low pulley and lie down on a mat facing up.
Step:2 Hold the cable with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lift your legs up, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 At the same time, curl your pelvis up towards your chest, lifting your hips off the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Bicycle Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your hands behind your head and your knees bent.
Step:2 Lift your feet off the ground and bring your right knee towards your chest while simultaneously twisting your torso to bring your left elbow towards your right knee.
Step:3 Straighten your right leg while bringing your left knee towards your chest and twisting your torso to bring your right elbow towards your left knee.
Step:4 Continue alternating the twisting motion, as if you are pedaling a bicycle, while keeping your core engaged throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Double Jerk
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell double jerk. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height; Bend your knees slightly and engage your core; Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms; Bend your knees and quickly drop into a partial squat; Explosively extend your hips and knees, driving the kettlebells overhead
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Bend your knees and quickly drop into a partial squat.
Step:5 Explosively extend your hips and knees, driving the kettlebells overhead.
Step:6 Lock out your arms and catch the kettlebells overhead with your knees slightly bent.
Step:7 Stand up straight and return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Low Glute Bridge On Floor
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your arms by your sides, palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes.
Step:5 Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Sled One Leg Calf Press On Leg Press
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the sled.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the sled, shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the sled, keeping your heels off.
Step:4 Push the sled forward by extending your ankles, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the sled back down by flexing your ankles.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Prone Dumbbell Upright Shoulder External Rotation
exercises.name_vi: Prone Dumbbell Upright Shoulder External Rotation
exercises.description: Bài tập prone dumbbell upright shoulder external rotation. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body; Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Emphasize prone control; Rotate your arms externally, bringing the dumbbells up towards your head while keeping your elbows in the same position; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Emphasize prone control.
Step:3 Rotate your arms externally, bringing the dumbbells up towards your head while keeping your elbows in the same position.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Bench Hip Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập bench hip extension. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your back against the bench and your feet flat on the ground; Place your hands on the bench for support; Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then lift your hips off the bench until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back against the bench and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands on the bench for support.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then lift your hips off the bench until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Front Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập cable front raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip; Keep your back straight and your core engaged; Raise the cable handle in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down; Continue lifting until your arms are parallel to the floor; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Raise the cable handle in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Rope Lying On Floor Tricep Extension
exercises.name_vi: Cable Rope Lying On Floor Tricep Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập cable rope lying on floor tricep extension. Cách thực hiện: Attach a rope to a cable machine and set it to the lowest position; Lie on the floor facing up, with your head towards the cable machine; Hold the rope with both hands, palms facing each other, and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling; Keep your upper arms stationary and slowly lower the rope towards your forehead, bending your elbows; Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine and set it to the lowest position.
Step:2 Lie on the floor facing up, with your head towards the cable machine.
Step:3 Hold the rope with both hands, palms facing each other, and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Keep your upper arms stationary and slowly lower the rope towards your forehead, bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Intense Kettlebell Two Arm Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a kettlebell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Pull the kettlebells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Maintain intense form throughout.

exercises.name: Band Twisting Overhead Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet.
Step:2 Hold the band handles at shoulder height with your palms facing forward.
Step:3 Engage your core and press the band overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 As you press, twist your torso to one side, keeping your hips stable.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the press and twist on the opposite side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Donkey Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập donkey calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your toes on an elevated surface, such as a step or block; Place your hands on a stable support, such as a wall or railing, for balance; Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your toes on an elevated surface, such as a step or block.
Step:2 Place your hands on a stable support, such as a wall or railing, for balance.
Step:3 Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập cable one arm pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Attach a single handle to a high pulley cable machine; Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and extend your arm fully; Keep your back straight and your core engaged; Pull the handle down towards your side while keeping your elbow close to your body
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a single handle to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and extend your arm fully.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the handle down towards your side while keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your lat muscle.
Step:7 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:9 Switch sides and repeat the exercise with the other arm.

exercises.name: Body-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by placing your hands on a raised surface, such as a bench or parallel bars, with your palms facing down and fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Extend your legs out in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground and your body straight.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides, until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and lift your body back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Two Arm Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline two arm extension. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs; Slowly lie back on the bench, keeping the dumbbells close to your chest; Once you are fully lying down, extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbows slightly bent; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Slowly lie back on the bench, keeping the dumbbells close to your chest.
Step:3 Once you are fully lying down, extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Upright Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and core engaged, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Seesaw Press
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell seesaw press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height; Press one kettlebell overhead while keeping the other kettlebell at shoulder height; Lower the pressed kettlebell back to shoulder height while simultaneously pressing the other kettlebell overhead; Continue alternating the pressing motion, creating a seesaw-like movement; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Press one kettlebell overhead while keeping the other kettlebell at shoulder height.
Step:3 Lower the pressed kettlebell back to shoulder height while simultaneously pressing the other kettlebell overhead.
Step:4 Continue alternating the pressing motion, creating a seesaw-like movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Seated Twist
exercises.description: Bài tập cable seated twist. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent; Hold the cable handle with both hands and extend your arms straight in front of you; Keeping your core engaged, slowly rotate your torso to one side, pulling the cable across your body; Pause for a moment at the end of the range of motion, then slowly rotate back to the starting position; Repeat on the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands and extend your arms straight in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged, slowly rotate your torso to one side, pulling the cable across your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the range of motion, then slowly rotate back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Close-Grip Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập band close-grip push-up. Cách thực hiện: Place a band around your upper arms, just above the elbows; Assume a push-up position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to heels; Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides; Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place a band around your upper arms, just above the elbows.
Step:2 Assume a push-up position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:4 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập smith deadlift. Cách thực hiện: Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height; Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward; Bend at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight and chest up, and grip the bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Engage your core and lift the bar by extending your hips and knees, keeping the bar close to your body; Stand up straight, fully extending your hips and knees
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:3 Bend at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight and chest up, and grip the bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Engage your core and lift the bar by extending your hips and knees, keeping the bar close to your body.
Step:5 Stand up straight, fully extending your hips and knees.
Step:6 Lower the bar back down by bending at the hips and knees, maintaining control and keeping your back straight.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Rope Crossover Seated Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the rowing machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the cable ropes with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the cable ropes towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kneeling Jump Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập kneeling jump squat. Cách thực hiện: Start by kneeling on the ground with your feet hip-width apart and your toes pointing forward; Hold a barbell across your upper back, resting it on your shoulders; Engage your core and glutes, then explosively jump up into the air, extending your hips and knees; As you jump, push through your toes and fully extend your ankles, knees, and hips; Land softly back on the ground, bending your knees to absorb the impact
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by kneeling on the ground with your feet hip-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Hold a barbell across your upper back, resting it on your shoulders.
Step:3 Engage your core and glutes, then explosively jump up into the air, extending your hips and knees.
Step:4 As you jump, push through your toes and fully extend your ankles, knees, and hips.
Step:5 Land softly back on the ground, bending your knees to absorb the impact.
Step:6 Immediately go into the next repetition, repeating the jump squat motion.

exercises.name: Assisted Lying Leg Raise With Lateral Throw Down
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
Step:4 While keeping your legs together, lower them to one side until they are a few inches above the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then lift your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement to the other side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tạ ấm. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointed slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold the kettlebell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, pushing your butt back.
Step:4 Swing the kettlebell back between your legs, keeping your arms straight and maintaining a flat back.
Step:5 Drive your hips forward and swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height, using the momentum generated by your hips.
Step:6 Allow the kettlebell to swing back down between your legs and repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Supine Style Band Alternating V-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập supine style band alternating v-up. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band; Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body off the ground simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes; As you lower your legs and upper body back down, switch the position of your legs, crossing one over the other. Focus on supine movement; Repeat the movement, alternating the position of your legs with each repetition; Continue for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band.
Step:2 Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body off the ground simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes.
Step:3 As you lower your legs and upper body back down, switch the position of your legs, crossing one over the other. Focus on supine movement.
Step:4 Repeat the movement, alternating the position of your legs with each repetition.
Step:5 Continue for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Reverse Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing towards your feet.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells towards your chest, allowing your elbows to flare out to the sides.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing Palms In Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing palms in press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing inwards; Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, press the dumbbells upwards until your arms are fully extended overhead; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, press the dumbbells upwards until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Neutral Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated neutral wrist curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other; Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing the dumbbells to hang down; Keeping your wrists in a neutral position, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing the dumbbells to hang down.
Step:3 Keeping your wrists in a neutral position, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Standing Up Straight Crossovers
exercises.description: Bài tập cable standing up straight crossovers. Cách thực hiện: Stand in the middle of a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Hold the handles of the cables with your palms facing down and your arms extended straight out to the sides; Keeping your arms straight, bring your hands together in front of your body, crossing them over each other; Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position, keeping your arms extended; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand in the middle of a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the handles of the cables with your palms facing down and your arms extended straight out to the sides.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, bring your hands together in front of your body, crossing them over each other.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position, keeping your arms extended.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell One Leg Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell one leg squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell across your upper back; Lift one foot off the ground and extend it forward, keeping it parallel to the ground; Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair, keeping your chest up and your back straight; Lower yourself until your thigh is parallel to the ground, then push through your heel to return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Lift one foot off the ground and extend it forward, keeping it parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
Step:4 Lower yourself until your thigh is parallel to the ground, then push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Leg Extension Declined
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the resistance band to a sturdy anchor point and secure it around your ankle.
Step:2 Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged and your upper body stable, extend your leg straight out in front of you.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly return your leg to the starting position. Focus on declined movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.name: Ankle Circles
exercises.description: Bài tập ankle circles. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you; Lift one leg off the ground and rotate your ankle in a circular motion; Perform the desired number of circles in one direction, then switch to the other direction; Repeat with the other leg
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Lift one leg off the ground and rotate your ankle in a circular motion.
Step:3 Perform the desired number of circles in one direction, then switch to the other direction.
Step:4 Repeat with the other leg.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Arnold Press
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell arnold press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing towards you; Engage your core and press the kettlebells overhead, rotating your palms to face forward as you extend your arms; Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing towards you.
Step:2 Engage your core and press the kettlebells overhead, rotating your palms to face forward as you extend your arms.
Step:3 Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Prone Incline Curl With Intensive
exercises.name_vi: Barbell Prone Incline Curl With Intensive
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell prone incline curl with intensive. Cách thực hiện: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle; Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it; Hold a barbell with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart; Extend your arms fully, allowing the barbell to hang down towards the floor; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Step:3 Hold a barbell with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, allowing the barbell to hang down towards the floor.
Step:5 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:7 (intensive variation) Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:8 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing Kickback
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing kickback. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight; Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement; Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band One Arm Overhead Biceps Curl
exercises.name_vi: Band One Arm Overhead Biceps Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập band one arm overhead biceps curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place one end of the band under your foot; Hold the other end of the band with your arm fully extended overhead, palm facing forward; Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl your forearm towards your shoulder, squeezing your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place one end of the band under your foot.
Step:2 Hold the other end of the band with your arm fully extended overhead, palm facing forward.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl your forearm towards your shoulder, squeezing your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Cable Side Bend Smooth
exercises.description: Bài tập cable side bend smooth. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with one hand; Keep your back straight and your core engaged; Slowly bend sideways at the waist, lowering the cable handle towards your knee; Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Focus on smooth movement; Repeat on the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with one hand.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Slowly bend sideways at the waist, lowering the cable handle towards your knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Focus on smooth movement.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.
Step:6 Alternate sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Triceps Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand or sit upright with your back straight.
Step:2 Extend one arm overhead, bending it at the elbow.
Step:3 Place your opposite hand on the bent elbow and gently pull it towards your head.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, feeling a gentle stretch in your triceps.
Step:5 Release the stretch and repeat on the other arm.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated One Leg Calf Raise - Hammer Grip Deep
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Seated One Leg Calf Raise - Hammer Grip Deep
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated one leg calf raise - hammer grip deep. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your thighs; Place one foot on a raised surface, such as a step or block, with your heel hanging off the edge; Hold the dumbbell with a hammer grip, meaning your palms are facing each other and your fingers are wrapped around the handle; Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, slowly raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Place one foot on a raised surface, such as a step or block, with your heel hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell with a hammer grip, meaning your palms are facing each other and your fingers are wrapped around the handle.
Step:4 Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, slowly raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:6 (deep variation) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.

exercises.name: Rear Decline Bridge
exercises.description: Bài tập rear decline bridge. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your back with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent; Place your arms by your sides with your palms facing down; Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders; Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Step:2 Place your arms by your sides with your palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: L-Sit On Floor
exercises.description: Bài tập l-sit on floor. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you; Place your hands on the floor beside your hips, fingers pointing forward; Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight; Try to bring your legs parallel to the floor, forming an 'L' shape with your body; Hold this position for as long as you can
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the floor beside your hips, fingers pointing forward.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
Step:4 Try to bring your legs parallel to the floor, forming an 'L' shape with your body.
Step:5 Hold this position for as long as you can.
Step:6 Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Pull-In (On Stability Ball)
exercises.description: Bài tập pull-in (on stability ball). Cách thực hiện: Start by sitting on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle; Place your hands on the sides of the stability ball for support; Engage your abs and slowly roll your hips forward, bringing your knees towards your chest; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly extend your legs back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by sitting on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your hands on the sides of the stability ball for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly roll your hips forward, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly extend your legs back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl With Stork Stance
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Bicep Curl With Stork Stance
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell bicep curl with stork stance. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward; Extend one leg behind you, balancing on the toes of that foot; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Extend one leg behind you, balancing on the toes of that foot.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

exercises.name: Scapular Pull-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập scapular pull-up. Cách thực hiện: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended; Retract your shoulder blades by pulling them down and back; Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, focusing on squeezing your shoulder blades together; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended.
Step:2 Retract your shoulder blades by pulling them down and back.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, focusing on squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Side Wrist Pull Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập side wrist pull stretch. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended in front of you; Extend your right arm out to the side, parallel to the ground, with your palm facing down; With your left hand, grab your right hand and gently pull it towards your body, feeling a stretch in your right forearm; Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release; Repeat on the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended in front of you.
Step:2 Extend your right arm out to the side, parallel to the ground, with your palm facing down.
Step:3 With your left hand, grab your right hand and gently pull it towards your body, feeling a stretch in your right forearm.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Chest And Front Of Shoulder Stretch
exercises.name_vi: Chest And Front Of Shoulder Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập chest and front of shoulder stretch. Cách thực hiện: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart; Extend your arms straight out in front of you at shoulder height; Cross your arms in front of your body, with your right arm on top of your left arm; Interlace your fingers and press your palms together; Gently squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your hands forward, feeling a stretch in your chest and front of your shoulders
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out in front of you at shoulder height.
Step:3 Cross your arms in front of your body, with your right arm on top of your left arm.
Step:4 Interlace your fingers and press your palms together.
Step:5 Gently squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your hands forward, feeling a stretch in your chest and front of your shoulders.
Step:6 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Standing Row (With Towel)
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a towel in front of you with both hands.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Pull the towel towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Otis Up
exercises.description: Bài tập otis up. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards; Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Flutter Kicks
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your hands by your sides.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground about 6 inches.
Step:3 Keeping your legs straight, alternate lifting one leg slightly higher than the other.
Step:4 Continue this fluttering motion for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Arm Slingers Hanging Bent Knee Legs
exercises.name_vi: Arm Slingers Hanging Bent Knee Legs
exercises.description: Bài tập arm slingers hanging bent knee legs. Cách thực hiện: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle; Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, bringing them as close to your elbows as possible; Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, bringing them as close to your elbows as possible.
Step:3 Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Inverted Row V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up a bar at waist height on a Smith machine or use a suspension trainer.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar or suspension trainer and grab it with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Walk your feet forward, leaning back until your body is at a slight angle.
Step:4 Keep your body straight and pull your chest up towards the bar or handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Lying Triceps Extension V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập cable lying triceps extension v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine; Lie down on a flat bench facing up, with your head towards the cable machine; Grasp the rope handle with both hands, palms facing each other, and extend your arms straight up over your chest; Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the rope handle towards your forehead by bending your elbows; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Lie down on a flat bench facing up, with your head towards the cable machine.
Step:3 Grasp the rope handle with both hands, palms facing each other, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the rope handle towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Lying Two-One Leg Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Place your legs on the lever pad, just above your ankles.
Step:3 Grasp the handles on the sides of the machine for support.
Step:4 Keeping your upper body still, exhale and curl your legs up towards your glutes.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lunge With Firm
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lunge with firm. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand; Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position; Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lower your body. Maintain firm form throughout; Push through your right heel to return to the starting position; Repeat with your left leg
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
