Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lower your body. Maintain firm form throughout.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg.
Step:6 Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Rear Lateral Raise (Support Head)
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell rear lateral raise (support head). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight; Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Forward Jump
exercises.description: Bài tập forward jump. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position; Swing your arms back for momentum; Jump forward explosively, extending your hips, knees, and ankles; Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately go into the next jump
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position.
Step:3 Swing your arms back for momentum.
Step:4 Jump forward explosively, extending your hips, knees, and ankles.
Step:5 Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately go into the next jump.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Alternate Leg Press
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and foot platform of the leverage machine to your desired position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the foot platform.
Step:3 Place your hands on the handles or sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Push one foot against the foot platform, extending your leg until it is almost fully straight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly bend your leg and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat with the other leg.
Step:7 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Rear Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell rear lateral raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and core engaged; Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Standing Close-Grip One Arm Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a dumbbell in one hand with a neutral grip.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Push-Up (On Knees)
exercises.description: Bài tập close-grip push-up (on knees). Cách thực hiện: Start by getting on your hands and knees, with your hands shoulder-width apart and your knees hip-width apart; Lower your upper body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides; Pause for a moment when your chest is just above the ground; Push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by getting on your hands and knees, with your hands shoulder-width apart and your knees hip-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your upper body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 Pause for a moment when your chest is just above the ground.
Step:4 Push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Seated Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập lever seated fly. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad; Grasp the handles with a pronated grip and keep your elbows slightly bent; Exhale and push the handles forward, bringing them together in front of your chest; Pause for a moment, squeezing your chest muscles; Inhale and slowly return to the starting position, allowing your chest muscles to stretch
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with a pronated grip and keep your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Exhale and push the handles forward, bringing them together in front of your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, squeezing your chest muscles.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly return to the starting position, allowing your chest muscles to stretch.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez Barbell Close-Grip Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập ez barbell close-grip curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart; Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement; Curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Step:3 Curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Half Knee Bends (Male) With Blunt
exercises.description: Bài tập half knee bends (male) with blunt. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Bend your knees and lower your body down as if you were sitting back into a chair. Emphasize blunt control; Keep your chest up and your weight in your heels; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body down as if you were sitting back into a chair. Emphasize blunt control.
Step:3 Keep your chest up and your weight in your heels.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kick Out Sit
exercises.description: Bài tập kick out sit. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle; Lean back slightly and place your hands on the edge of the bench or chair for support; Engaging your hamstrings, lift your feet off the ground and extend your legs straight out in front of you; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly bend your knees and bring your feet back towards your body; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Lean back slightly and place your hands on the edge of the bench or chair for support.
Step:3 Engaging your hamstrings, lift your feet off the ground and extend your legs straight out in front of you.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly bend your knees and bring your feet back towards your body.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Military Press With Strength
exercises.description: Bài tập lever military press with strength. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows; (strength variation) Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows.
Step:4 (strength variation) Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Rear Lunge
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell rear lunge. Cách thực hiện: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and a barbell resting on your upper back; Take a step backward with your right foot, landing on the ball of your foot; Bend both knees to lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground; Push through your left heel to return to the starting position; Repeat with the other leg
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and a barbell resting on your upper back.
Step:2 Take a step backward with your right foot, landing on the ball of your foot.
Step:3 Bend both knees to lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other leg.

exercises.name: Cable Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập cable press on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees at a 90-degree angle; Hold the cable handles at chest height with your palms facing down and your elbows bent; Engage your core and press the cable handles forward until your arms are fully extended; Pause for a moment, then slowly release the tension and bring the cable handles back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold the cable handles at chest height with your palms facing down and your elbows bent.
Step:3 Engage your core and press the cable handles forward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly release the tension and bring the cable handles back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Front Plank
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by lying face down on the floor.
Step:2 Place your forearms on the ground, with your elbows directly under your shoulders.
Step:3 Extend your legs straight out behind you, with your toes on the ground.
Step:4 Engage your core and lift your body off the ground, balancing on your forearms and toes.
Step:5 Keep your body in a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:6 Hold this position for the desired amount of time.
Step:7 Lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez Barbell Reverse Grip Preacher Curl
exercises.name_vi: Ez Barbell Reverse Grip Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập ez barbell reverse grip preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor; Grasp the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart; Rest your upper arms on the pad, allowing your forearms to hang down; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders; Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Rest your upper arms on the pad, allowing your forearms to hang down.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Reverse Spider Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với ghế nghiêng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down and arm fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by flexing your elbow.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Hip Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập hanging leg hip raise. Cách thực hiện: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you; Engage your core and lift your legs up by flexing your hips and knees until your thighs are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up by flexing your hips and knees until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Assisted Prone Hamstring
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted prone hamstring. Cách thực hiện: Lie face down on a mat or bench with your legs fully extended; Have a partner or use a resistance band to secure your ankles; Engage your hamstrings and lift your legs towards your glutes, keeping your knees straight; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a mat or bench with your legs fully extended.
Step:2 Have a partner or use a resistance band to secure your ankles.
Step:3 Engage your hamstrings and lift your legs towards your glutes, keeping your knees straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Floor Seated Wide-Grip Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the floor with your legs extended and your back straight.
Step:2 Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and position the cable machine behind you.
Step:3 Grasp the handle with a wide overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:4 Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your chest lifted.
Step:5 Pull the handle towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Incline Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline.
Step:2 Attach the cable handles to the high pulleys.
Step:3 Sit on the bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:4 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and bring them to shoulder height.
Step:5 Push the handles forward and upward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Standing Back Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable standing back wrist curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Hold the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down; Keep your arms straight and your elbows close to your sides; Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the cable handle towards your body; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keep your arms straight and your elbows close to your sides.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the cable handle towards your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Around Pullover
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell around pullover. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet firmly on the ground; Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest; Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc motion; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet firmly on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc motion.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Lying Hip Internal Rotation
exercises.description: Bài tập band lying hip internal rotation. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your back with your legs straight and a resistance band looped around your feet; Bend your knees and bring them towards your chest, keeping your feet together; Slowly rotate your knees outwards, away from each other, while keeping your feet together; Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your legs straight and a resistance band looped around your feet.
Step:2 Bend your knees and bring them towards your chest, keeping your feet together.
Step:3 Slowly rotate your knees outwards, away from each other, while keeping your feet together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Reverse-Grip Pushdown
exercises.description: Bài tập cable reverse-grip pushdown. Cách thực hiện: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine; Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart; Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise; Using your triceps, push the bar down until your arms are fully extended and your triceps are contracted
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Using your triceps, push the bar down until your arms are fully extended and your triceps are contracted.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Standing Inner Biceps Curl V. 2
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Standing Inner Biceps Curl V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell standing inner biceps curl v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso; Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward; While holding your upper arms stationary, curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 While holding your upper arms stationary, curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position as your breathe in.
Step:7 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Round Arm
exercises.description: Bài tập weighted round arm. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight; Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows; Continue lifting your arms until they are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Continue lifting your arms until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Reverse Hyper Extension (On Stability Ball)
exercises.description: Bài tập reverse hyper extension (on stability ball). Cách thực hiện: Lie face down on a stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you; Place your hands on the ground in front of you for stability; Engaging your glutes and hamstrings, lift your legs up towards the ceiling as high as you can; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground in front of you for stability.
Step:3 Engaging your glutes and hamstrings, lift your legs up towards the ceiling as high as you can.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell W-Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell w-press. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward; Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward; Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead; Lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Blunt Cable Standing Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to a high pulley and stand facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Hold the handle with both hands and place it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent.
Step:3 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Keeping your abs engaged, exhale and crunch your torso down towards your knees, bringing your elbows towards your thighs.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Emphasize blunt control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Close Grip Chin-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập close grip chin-up. Cách thực hiện: Grab the pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart; Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground; Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Rope Incline Tricep Extension - Reverse Variation
exercises.name_vi: Cable Rope Incline Tricep Extension - Reverse Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập cable rope incline tricep extension - reverse variation. Cách thực hiện: Attach a rope to a high pulley and adjust the incline bench to a comfortable angle; Stand facing away from the pulley with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the rope with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight overhead; (reverse variation) Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise; Lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows until your forearms touch your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a high pulley and adjust the incline bench to a comfortable angle.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the pulley with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight overhead.
Step:4 (reverse variation) Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows until your forearms touch your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Side Plank Hip Adduction
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Prop yourself up on your forearm, keeping your elbow directly below your shoulder.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet.
Step:4 While maintaining the side plank position, lift your top leg towards the ceiling, keeping it straight.
Step:5 Slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Calf Push Stretch With Hands Against Wall Elite
exercises.name_vi: Calf Push Stretch With Hands Against Wall Elite
exercises.description: Bài tập calf push stretch with hands against wall elite. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart; Place your hands against the wall at shoulder height; Step back with one foot, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight; Bend your front knee slightly and lean forward, feeling a stretch in your calf; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands against the wall at shoulder height.
Step:3 Step back with one foot, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight.
Step:4 Bend your front knee slightly and lean forward, feeling a stretch in your calf.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Switch legs and repeat the stretch. Focus on elite movement.

exercises.name: Gentle Style Dumbbell One Leg Fly On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Gentle Style Dumbbell One Leg Fly On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập gentle style dumbbell one leg fly on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other; Place one foot on the ground and extend the other leg straight out in front of you; Lean forward slightly and bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows; Slowly lower the dumbbells down and out to the sides, feeling a stretch in your chest; (gentle variation) Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Place one foot on the ground and extend the other leg straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Lean forward slightly and bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells down and out to the sides, feeling a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 (gentle variation) Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

exercises.name: Inclined Style Pelvic Tilt Into Bridge
exercises.name_vi: Inclined Style Pelvic Tilt Into Bridge
exercises.description: Bài tập inclined style pelvic tilt into bridge. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Place your arms by your sides with your palms facing down; Engage your glutes and core muscles; Tilt your pelvis upward, lifting your hips off the ground. Emphasize inclined control; Hold the bridge position for a few seconds
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your arms by your sides with your palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Step:4 Tilt your pelvis upward, lifting your hips off the ground. Emphasize inclined control.
Step:5 Hold the bridge position for a few seconds.
Step:6 Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Seated One Arm Alternate Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench facing a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with one hand and keep your arm fully extended in front of you.
Step:3 Pull the handle towards your body, retracting your shoulder blade and keeping your elbow close to your side.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your back muscles.
Step:5 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:7 Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Inverted Row Bent Knees
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up a bar at waist height and lie underneath it.
Step:2 Grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Position your body so that your heels are on the ground and your body is straight.
Step:4 Pull your chest up towards the bar by squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ski Ergometer
exercises.description: Bài tập ski ergometer. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and footrests to a comfortable position; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down; Sit up straight with your feet flat on the footrests; Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping your elbows slightly bent; Engage your triceps and push the handles down towards your thighs
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footrests to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Sit up straight with your feet flat on the footrests.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Engage your triceps and push the handles down towards your thighs.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Deep Push Up
exercises.description: Bài tập deep push up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line; Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body; Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
Step:3 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated One Arm Kickback
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated one arm kickback. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand; Bend your torso forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground; Extend your arm straight back, keeping your elbow close to your body; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Bend your torso forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight back, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Lever Shoulder Press V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập lever shoulder press v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position; Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor; Grasp the handles of the machine with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Push the handles upward and forward until your arms are fully extended, but not locked; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles of the machine with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles upward and forward until your arms are fully extended, but not locked.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Full Zercher Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell full zercher squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out; Hold the barbell in the crooks of your elbows, with your hands gripping the barbell for stability; Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you lower your hips back and down into a squat position; Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels; Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell in the crooks of your elbows, with your hands gripping the barbell for stability.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you lower your hips back and down into a squat position.
Step:4 Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels.
Step:5 Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:6 Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Single Smith Shoulder Press
exercises.description: Bài tập single smith shoulder press. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; (single variation) Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Lift the bar off the rack and position it at shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward; Press the bar upward until your arms are fully extended overhead; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to shoulder level
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 (single variation) Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the bar off the rack and position it at shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the bar upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to shoulder level.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Assisted Parallel Close Grip Pull-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted parallel close grip pull-up. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height; Place your hands on the parallel bars with a close grip, palms facing each other; Hang from the bars with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground; Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bars, keeping your elbows close to your body; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bars
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height.
Step:2 Place your hands on the parallel bars with a close grip, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Hang from the bars with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground.
Step:4 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bars, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bars.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Standing Concentration Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell standing concentration curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in one hand, palm facing up; Rest your opposite hand on your thigh for support; Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight up towards your shoulder; Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps; Inhale and slowly lower the weight back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Step:2 Rest your opposite hand on your thigh for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the weight back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Macro Style Close-Grip Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập macro style close-grip push-up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands placed close together, directly under your shoulders; Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides; Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Maintain macro form throughout; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands placed close together, directly under your shoulders.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Maintain macro form throughout.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Decline Chest Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Slowly lower the handles back towards your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Pull Through
exercises.description: Bài tập band pull through. Cách thực hiện: Attach a resistance band to a sturdy anchor point at ground level; Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart; Step forward to create tension in the band, keeping your knees slightly bent; Hinge at the hips and push your glutes back, maintaining a slight bend in your knees; Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a resistance band to a sturdy anchor point at ground level.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Step forward to create tension in the band, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Hinge at the hips and push your glutes back, maintaining a slight bend in your knees.
Step:5 Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings.
Step:6 Drive your hips forward and squeeze your glutes to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell One Arm Floor Press
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell one arm floor press. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Hold the barbell with one hand, palm facing up, and extend your arm straight up over your chest; Slowly lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with one hand, palm facing up, and extend your arm straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Slowly lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Triceps Dip (Bench Leg)
exercises.description: Bài tập triceps dip (bench leg). Cách thực hiện: Sit on the edge of a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward; Walk your feet forward, sliding your butt off the bench, and straighten your arms; Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench; Push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward, sliding your butt off the bench, and straighten your arms.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Step:4 Push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập band wrist curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground; Hold the band with both hands, palms facing up, and rest your forearms on your thighs; Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the band with both hands, palms facing up, and rest your forearms on your thighs.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Two Arm Tricep Kickback
exercises.description: Bài tập cable two arm tricep kickback. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent; Hold the cable handle in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle; Keeping your upper arms stationary, extend your forearms backwards until your arms are fully extended; Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, extend your forearms backwards until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Glute-Ham Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập glute-ham raise. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the glute-ham raise machine to fit your body; Position yourself face down on the machine with your ankles secured; Place your hands on your chest or cross them over your chest; Engage your hamstrings and glutes to lift your upper body up towards the ceiling; Continue lifting until your body is in a straight line from your head to your heels
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the glute-ham raise machine to fit your body.
Step:2 Position yourself face down on the machine with your ankles secured.
Step:3 Place your hands on your chest or cross them over your chest.
Step:4 Engage your hamstrings and glutes to lift your upper body up towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Continue lifting until your body is in a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated One Leg Calf Raise - Palm Up
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Seated One Leg Calf Raise - Palm Up
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated one leg calf raise - palm up. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench or chair with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place it on top of your thigh, palm facing up; Lift one leg off the ground and extend it in front of you, keeping your knee slightly bent; Raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place it on top of your thigh, palm facing up.
Step:3 Lift one leg off the ground and extend it in front of you, keeping your knee slightly bent.
Step:4 Raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

exercises.name: Assisted Lying Leg Raise With Throw Down
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
Step:4 Raise your legs until they are perpendicular to the ground.
Step:5 Lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Simultaneously, throw your legs down towards the ground, keeping them straight.
Step:7 Raise your legs back up to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Rear Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline rear lateral raise. Cách thực hiện: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle; Sit on the bench with your chest against the backrest and hold a dumbbell in each hand; Extend your arms straight down with your palms facing each other; Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your chest against the backrest and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight down with your palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Hammer Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Hammer Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm hammer press on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing inwards and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle; Place your other hand on your hip for stability; Press the dumbbell upwards, extending your arm fully; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing inwards and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Place your other hand on your hip for stability.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell upwards, extending your arm fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Kettlebell One Arm Clean And Jerk
exercises.name_vi: Kettlebell One Arm Clean And Jerk
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell one arm clean and jerk. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand with an overhand grip; Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell between your legs; Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height; As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrist and punch your hand straight up, locking out your arm overhead; Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell between your legs.
Step:3 Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height.
Step:4 As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrist and punch your hand straight up, locking out your arm overhead.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Squat Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the band handles with your palms facing each other and your arms extended in front of you.
Step:4 Bend your knees and lower into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest lifted.
Step:5 From the squat position, pull the band handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Chest Stretch With Exercise Ball Partial
exercises.name_vi: Chest Stretch With Exercise Ball Partial
exercises.description: Bài tập chest stretch with exercise ball partial. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold the exercise ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you. Focus on partial movement; Slowly bring the exercise ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your chest muscles; Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold the exercise ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you. Focus on partial movement.
Step:3 Slowly bring the exercise ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your chest muscles.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Alternating Narrow Grip Seated Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footplate position to ensure proper alignment.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back straight and feet flat on the footplate.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with a narrow grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your chest up and shoulders back throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Pull one handle towards your torso while keeping the other handle stationary.
Step:6 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly return the handle to the starting position and repeat with the other side.
Step:8 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Side Split Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell side split squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward; Hold a barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps; Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, bending at the knees and hips; As you lower, push your knees out to the sides and keep your weight on your heels; Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, then push through your heels to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold a barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, bending at the knees and hips.
Step:4 As you lower, push your knees out to the sides and keep your weight on your heels.
Step:5 Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith One Arm Row Linear
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to waist level.
Step:2 Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Emphasize linear control.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with one hand using an overhand grip, with your palm facing down.
Step:5 Keep your elbow close to your body and pull the bar towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the bar back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Decline Chest Fly
exercises.name_vi: Cable One Arm Decline Chest Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập cable one arm decline chest fly. Cách thực hiện: Attach a D-handle to a low pulley cable machine and set the bench to a decline angle; Lie down on the bench with your head towards the machine and grab the handle with your right hand; Extend your arm straight up above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbow; With a controlled motion, lower your arm out to the side until your hand is in line with your shoulder; Pause for a moment, then reverse the motion and bring your arm back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a D-handle to a low pulley cable machine and set the bench to a decline angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your head towards the machine and grab the handle with your right hand.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:4 With a controlled motion, lower your arm out to the side until your hand is in line with your shoulder.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then reverse the motion and bring your arm back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to your left arm and repeat the exercise.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Kickback
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell kickback. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight; Bring your upper arms close to your sides, with your elbows bent at a 90-degree angle; Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement; Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Bring your upper arms close to your sides, with your elbows bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Active Style Cable Pushdown
exercises.description: Bài tập active style cable pushdown. Cách thực hiện: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine; Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees; Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart; Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary; Exhale and push the bar down until your elbows are fully extended
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Exhale and push the bar down until your elbows are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position. Maintain active form throughout.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Wall Style Dumbbell One Arm French Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Wall Style Dumbbell One Arm French Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập wall style dumbbell one arm french press on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle. Focus on wall movement; Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow stationary; Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle. Focus on wall movement.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow stationary.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Push-Up Medicine Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập push-up medicine ball. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands on the medicine ball, shoulder-width apart; Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight; Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands on the medicine ball, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell bench squat. Cách thực hiện: Set up a barbell on a squat rack at chest height; Stand facing away from the rack, with your feet shoulder-width apart; Bend your knees and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up; Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Lift the barbell off the rack and step back, ensuring your feet are still shoulder-width apart
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up a barbell on a squat rack at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the rack, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:4 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Lift the barbell off the rack and step back, ensuring your feet are still shoulder-width apart.
Step:6 Lower your body down into a squat, keeping your knees in line with your toes.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Standing Chest Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands at chest level.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the handles back towards your chest, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Elbow Lift - Reverse Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập elbow lift - reverse push-up. Cách thực hiện: Start by lying face down on the ground with your legs extended and your hands placed directly under your shoulders; Engage your core and press through your palms to lift your upper body off the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides; Pause at the top for a moment, squeezing your upper back muscles; Slowly lower your body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by lying face down on the ground with your legs extended and your hands placed directly under your shoulders.
Step:2 Engage your core and press through your palms to lift your upper body off the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 Pause at the top for a moment, squeezing your upper back muscles.
Step:4 Slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Side-To-Side Toe Touch (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập side-to-side toe touch (male). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended to the sides; Bend at the waist to the right, reaching your right hand towards your right foot while keeping your left hand extended to the side; Return to the starting position and then bend at the waist to the left, reaching your left hand towards your left foot while keeping your right hand extended to the side; Repeat the side-to-side bending motion for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended to the sides.
Step:2 Bend at the waist to the right, reaching your right hand towards your right foot while keeping your left hand extended to the side.
Step:3 Return to the starting position and then bend at the waist to the left, reaching your left hand towards your left foot while keeping your right hand extended to the side.
Step:4 Repeat the side-to-side bending motion for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Standing Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp a bar or handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the bar or handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement.
Step:6 Slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Machine Inner Chest Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Standing Close Grip Military Press
exercises.name_vi: Barbell Standing Close Grip Military Press
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell standing close grip military press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly closer than shoulder-width apart; Lift the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows close to your body; Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully; Lower the barbell back to shoulder height; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly closer than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lift the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Lower the barbell back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Overhead Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable overhead curl. Cách thực hiện: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine; Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart; Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary; Exhale and curl the bar down towards your forehead, keeping your upper arms stationary
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Exhale and curl the bar down towards your forehead, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Captains Chair Straight Leg Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the captain's chair with your back against the backrest and your forearms resting on the arm pads.
Step:2 Keep your upper body stable and your back straight.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập cable one arm lateral raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine; Hold the cable handle with one hand, palm facing down, and stand far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable; Keep your arm straight and slowly raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with one hand, palm facing down, and stand far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable.
Step:3 Keep your arm straight and slowly raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Two Arm Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a kettlebell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Pull the kettlebells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Drop Jump Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập bodyweight drop jump squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back; Jump up explosively, extending your hips, knees, and ankles; While in mid-air, quickly bring your feet together; Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately drop back into a squat position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 Jump up explosively, extending your hips, knees, and ankles.
Step:4 While in mid-air, quickly bring your feet together.
Step:5 Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately drop back into a squat position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Hanging Straight Twisting Leg Hip Raise With Compound
exercises.name_vi: Hanging Straight Twisting Leg Hip Raise With Compound
exercises.description: Bài tập hanging straight twisting leg hip raise with compound. Cách thực hiện: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your legs straight; Engage your core and lift your legs up towards your chest, keeping them straight. Perform with compound intensity; Once your legs are parallel to the ground, twist your hips to one side, bringing your legs towards that side; Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position; Repeat the movement, but this time twist your hips to the opposite side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your legs straight.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up towards your chest, keeping them straight. Perform with compound intensity.
Step:3 Once your legs are parallel to the ground, twist your hips to one side, bringing your legs towards that side.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, but this time twist your hips to the opposite side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Seated Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles or place your hands on the side pads for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly lean back, allowing the pad to move with you.
Step:4 Once your upper body is at a 45-degree angle, contract your abs and crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Triceps Dip (Between Benches)
exercises.description: Bài tập triceps dip (between benches).
