Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge of the bench, fingers pointing forward; Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands; Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge of the bench, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Biceps Curl (On Stability Ball)
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Seated Biceps Curl (On Stability Ball)
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated biceps curl (on stability ball). Cách thực hiện: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lying Leg Raise Flat Bench
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a flat bench with your back pressed against it.
Step:2 Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Keep your legs straight and together, and lift them up towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Wide Grip Decline Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the decline bench to the desired angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows pointed outwards.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Clap Push Up
exercises.description: Bài tập clap push up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your core engaged; Push through your palms explosively to propel your body off the ground; While in mid-air, clap your hands together before landing back in the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your core engaged.
Step:3 Push through your palms explosively to propel your body off the ground.
Step:4 While in mid-air, clap your hands together before landing back in the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Hammer Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Incline Hammer Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell incline hammer press on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other; Walk your feet forward and roll your body down the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball; Hold the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and pointing out to the sides; Press the dumbbells up and slightly inward, keeping your palms facing each other; Extend your arms fully, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward and roll your body down the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and pointing out to the sides.
Step:4 Press the dumbbells up and slightly inward, keeping your palms facing each other.
Step:5 Extend your arms fully, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Step:6 Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Lunge Pass Through
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell lunge pass through. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands; Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position; As you lunge forward, pass the kettlebell under your right thigh and transfer it to your left hand; Push off with your right foot to return to the starting position, while simultaneously passing the kettlebell back to your right hand; Repeat the lunge on the opposite side, passing the kettlebell under your left thigh
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 As you lunge forward, pass the kettlebell under your right thigh and transfer it to your left hand.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot to return to the starting position, while simultaneously passing the kettlebell back to your right hand.
Step:5 Repeat the lunge on the opposite side, passing the kettlebell under your left thigh.
Step:6 Continue alternating lunges and passing the kettlebell between hands for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Side Bridge Hip Abduction
exercises.description: Bài tập side bridge hip abduction. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other; Prop yourself up on your forearm, keeping your elbow directly below your shoulder; Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet; While keeping your core engaged, lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips; Pause for a moment at the top, then lower your leg back down
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Prop yourself up on your forearm, keeping your elbow directly below your shoulder.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet.
Step:4 While keeping your core engaged, lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then lower your leg back down.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Barbell Prone Incline Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell prone incline curl. Cách thực hiện: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle; Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it; Hold a barbell with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart; Extend your arms fully, allowing the barbell to hang down towards the floor; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Step:3 Hold a barbell with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, allowing the barbell to hang down towards the floor.
Step:5 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:7 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:8 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Low Seated Row Controlled
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward, maintaining a slight bend in your elbows. Maintain controlled form throughout.
Step:4 Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Back Extension With Knees Off Ground
exercises.name_vi: Exercise Ball Back Extension With Knees Off Ground
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball back extension with knees off ground. Cách thực hiện: Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability; Position your hands behind your head or crossed over your chest; Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability.
Step:2 Position your hands behind your head or crossed over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Press Sit-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell press sit-up. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back on a mat with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on your chest; Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back on a mat with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on your chest.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Tricep Kickback With Stork Stance
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Tricep Kickback With Stork Stance
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell tricep kickback with stork stance. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in your right hand; Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight; Bring your right elbow up to your side, keeping it bent at a 90-degree angle; Extend your right arm straight back, squeezing your triceps; Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in your right hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Bring your right elbow up to your side, keeping it bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Extend your right arm straight back, squeezing your triceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Incline Push-Up (On Box) - Active Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập incline push-up (on box) - active variation. Cách thực hiện: Place your hands on the edge of a box or elevated surface, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels; Lower your chest towards the box by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms; (active variation) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place your hands on the edge of a box or elevated surface, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the box by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 (active variation) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Side Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập side push-up. Cách thực hiện: Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other; Place your bottom hand on the ground directly under your shoulder, fingers pointing forward; Press through your bottom hand to lift your body off the ground, keeping your legs straight and your core engaged; Extend your top arm straight up towards the ceiling, creating a straight line from your head to your heels; Lower your body back down to the starting position with control
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Place your bottom hand on the ground directly under your shoulder, fingers pointing forward.
Step:3 Press through your bottom hand to lift your body off the ground, keeping your legs straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Extend your top arm straight up towards the ceiling, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:5 Lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Cable Side Bend
exercises.description: Bài tập cable side bend. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with one hand; Keep your back straight and your core engaged; Slowly bend sideways at the waist, lowering the cable handle towards your knee; Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position; Repeat on the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with one hand.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Slowly bend sideways at the waist, lowering the cable handle towards your knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.
Step:6 Alternate sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Romanian Deadlift
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tạ đòn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend at the hips, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body.
Step:5 Feel the stretch in your hamstrings as you lower the barbell.
Step:6 Once you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, push your hips forward and stand up straight.
Step:7 Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement.
Step:8 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Rear Delt Row (With Rope)
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope handle with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Keep your elbows slightly bent and pull the rope towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Straight Back High Row (Kneeling)
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a handle to a cable machine at waist height.
Step:2 Kneel down facing the cable machine and grab the handle with one hand.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the handle towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement.
Step:6 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:8 Switch sides and repeat the exercise with the other arm.

exercises.name: Band Bent-Over Hip Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập band bent-over hip extension. Cách thực hiện: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at ankle height; Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart; Step back to create tension in the band, keeping your knees slightly bent; Hinge at the hips and lean forward, maintaining a neutral spine; Extend your right leg straight back, squeezing your glutes at the top
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at ankle height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Step back to create tension in the band, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Hinge at the hips and lean forward, maintaining a neutral spine.
Step:5 Extend your right leg straight back, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:6 Lower your right leg back down and repeat with the left leg.
Step:7 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Palm Rotational Bent Over Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Let your arms hang straight down, palms facing your body.
Step:4 Engage your core and pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 As you pull the dumbbells up, rotate your palms so they face away from your body.
Step:6 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, rotating your palms back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Olympic Barbell Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tạ đòn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and holding the barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Raise the barbell above your head, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Russian Twist (Legs Up)
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tạ đơn, thảm tập, bóng Thụy Sĩ. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet lifted off the ground, keeping your legs together.
Step:2 Hold the weight with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Lean back slightly to engage your core muscles.
Step:4 Twist your torso to the right, bringing the weight towards the ground on your right side.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the weight towards the ground on your left side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Back Extension With Rotation
exercises.name_vi: Exercise Ball Back Extension With Rotation
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball back extension with rotation. Cách thực hiện: Start by lying face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your feet firmly planted on the ground; Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest; Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips and legs stable; Return to the center and repeat the rotation to the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by lying face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips and legs stable.
Step:5 Return to the center and repeat the rotation to the other side.
Step:6 Lower your upper body back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Push Up On Bosu Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập push up on bosu ball. Cách thực hiện: Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side facing up; Position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the outer edges of the bosu ball; Engage your core and lower your body down towards the bosu ball by bending your elbows; Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side facing up.
Step:2 Position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the outer edges of the bosu ball.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower your body down towards the bosu ball by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Kneeling Crunch
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a high pulley and kneel down facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Hold the rope handle with both hands and place it behind your head, keeping your elbows out to the sides.
Step:3 Keeping your hips stationary, flex your waist and crunch your torso down towards your thighs.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Sled 45 Degrees One Leg Press
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the footplate.
Step:3 Place one foot on the footplate and extend your leg, pushing the sled away from you.
Step:4 Slowly bend your knee and lower the sled back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other leg.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Single Leg Split Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập smith single leg split squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand in front of the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Place one foot behind you on a bench or step, with your toes pointing forward; Hold onto the smith machine bar for stability; Bend your front knee and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your back straight; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand in front of the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place one foot behind you on a bench or step, with your toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Hold onto the smith machine bar for stability.
Step:4 Bend your front knee and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.name: Push And Pull Bodyweight
exercises.description: Bài tập push and pull bodyweight. Cách thực hiện: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line; Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight; Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position; From the push-up position, pull your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight; Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight.
Step:3 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:4 From the push-up position, pull your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight.
Step:5 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying One Arm Pronated Triceps Extension
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Lying One Arm Pronated Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying one arm pronated triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing down, and extend your arm straight up above your shoulder; Keeping your upper arm stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing down, and extend your arm straight up above your shoulder.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Bent Over Alternate Kickback
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Seated Bent Over Alternate Kickback
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated bent over alternate kickback. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards; Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground; Extend one arm straight back, keeping it close to your body, until your arm is fully extended; Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat with the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Extend one arm straight back, keeping it close to your body, until your arm is fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Neck Side Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập neck side stretch. Cách thực hiện: Stand or sit up straight with your shoulders relaxed; Tilt your head to one side, bringing your ear towards your shoulder; Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds; Repeat on the other side; Perform 2-4 sets on each side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand or sit up straight with your shoulders relaxed.
Step:2 Tilt your head to one side, bringing your ear towards your shoulder.
Step:3 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds.
Step:4 Repeat on the other side.
Step:5 Perform 2-4 sets on each side.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Upright Shoulder External Rotation
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell upright shoulder external rotation. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body; Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping your elbows slightly bent; Rotate your arms externally, bringing the dumbbells up towards your head while keeping your elbows in the same position; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Rotate your arms externally, bringing the dumbbells up towards your head while keeping your elbows in the same position.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Bent Over Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:4 Pull the barbell towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Suspended Abdominal Fallout
exercises.description: Bài tập suspended abdominal fallout. Cách thực hiện: Attach a suspension trainer to a high anchor point and adjust the straps to waist height; Stand facing away from the anchor point and hold the handles with your arms extended in front of you; Lean forward at the waist, keeping your body straight and your core engaged; Lower your body as far as you can while maintaining control and tension in your abs; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise your body back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a suspension trainer to a high anchor point and adjust the straps to waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the anchor point and hold the handles with your arms extended in front of you.
Step:3 Lean forward at the waist, keeping your body straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Lower your body as far as you can while maintaining control and tension in your abs.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise your body back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Straight Arm Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập cable straight arm pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Attach a straight bar to the high pulley of a cable machine; Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down; Engage your lats and pull the bar down towards your thighs, keeping your arms straight throughout the movement; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to the high pulley of a cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Step:4 Engage your lats and pull the bar down towards your thighs, keeping your arms straight throughout the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Triceps Dip
exercises.description: Bài tập triceps dip. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward; Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands; Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập close-grip push-up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands placed close together, directly under your shoulders; Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides; Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands placed close together, directly under your shoulders.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Side Plank With Rear Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Place your forearm on the ground directly below your shoulder, keeping your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in your top hand, with your arm extended straight down towards the ground.
Step:4 Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:5 While maintaining the side plank position, lift the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Circles Knee Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập circles knee stretch. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands on your hips; Bend your knees slightly and lift your heels off the ground, balancing on the balls of your feet; Keeping your knees bent, rotate your knees in a circular motion, first clockwise and then counterclockwise; Perform the movement for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands on your hips.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and lift your heels off the ground, balancing on the balls of your feet.
Step:3 Keeping your knees bent, rotate your knees in a circular motion, first clockwise and then counterclockwise.
Step:4 Perform the movement for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Seated Rear Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập cable seated rear lateral raise. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground; Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight in front of you; Keeping your arms straight, slowly raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Incline Reverse Grip Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập incline reverse grip push-up. Cách thực hiện: Place your hands on the edge of a bench or elevated surface, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels; Lower your chest towards the bench by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place your hands on the edge of a bench or elevated surface, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the bench by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Forward Lunge Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell forward lunge triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand; Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position; Keep your back straight and your chest up; Extend your arms straight overhead, keeping your elbows close to your ears; Lower the dumbbells behind your head by bending your elbows
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight overhead, keeping your elbows close to your ears.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then straighten your arms to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

exercises.name: Balance Board
exercises.description: Bài tập balance board. Cách thực hiện: Place the balance board on a flat surface; Step onto the balance board with one foot, ensuring it is centered; Slowly shift your weight onto the foot on the balance board, keeping your core engaged; Maintain your balance and stability as you hold the position for a desired amount of time; Repeat the exercise with the other foot
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place the balance board on a flat surface.
Step:2 Step onto the balance board with one foot, ensuring it is centered.
Step:3 Slowly shift your weight onto the foot on the balance board, keeping your core engaged.
Step:4 Maintain your balance and stability as you hold the position for a desired amount of time.
Step:5 Repeat the exercise with the other foot.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Standing One Arm Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Let the dumbbell hang straight down in front of you, with your arm fully extended.
Step:4 Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:5 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement.
Step:6 Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Cable Underhand Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập cable underhand pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable machine so that the pulldown bar is at a height above your head; Sit down on the seat and grab the pulldown bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Keep your back straight and lean back slightly; Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together; Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the pulldown bar is at a height above your head.
Step:2 Sit down on the seat and grab the pulldown bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean back slightly.
Step:4 Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slow Leg Pull In Flat Bench
exercises.name_vi: Slow Leg Pull In Flat Bench
exercises.description: Bài tập slow leg pull in flat bench. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a flat bench with your legs extended straight out in front of you; Place your hands on the bench beside your hips for support; Engage your abs and lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Maintain slow form throughout
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with your legs extended straight out in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the bench beside your hips for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Maintain slow form throughout.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Around Pullover - Intensive Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell around pullover - intensive variation. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet firmly on the ground; Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest. Perform with intensive intensity; Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc motion; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet firmly on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest. Perform with intensive intensity.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc motion.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Standing Behind Neck Press
exercises.description: Bài tập standing behind neck press. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell behind your neck with an overhand grip; Keep your back straight and core engaged; Press the barbell overhead by extending your arms, fully extending your elbows; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell behind your neck with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Press the barbell overhead by extending your arms, fully extending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Sled Forward Angled Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập sled forward angled calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight and position yourself on the machine with your toes on the platform and your heels hanging off; Place your hands on the handles or the sides of the machine for support; Engage your calves and slowly raise your heels as high as possible, pushing against the resistance of the sled; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight and position yourself on the machine with your toes on the platform and your heels hanging off.
Step:2 Place your hands on the handles or the sides of the machine for support.
Step:3 Engage your calves and slowly raise your heels as high as possible, pushing against the resistance of the sled.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Sissy Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập sissy squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing slightly outward; Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed; Slowly lower your body by bending your knees and leaning back, keeping your torso upright; Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or as far as you can comfortably go; Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed.
Step:3 Slowly lower your body by bending your knees and leaning back, keeping your torso upright.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or as far as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Step Up Single Leg Balance With Bicep Curl - Chair Variation
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Step Up Single Leg Balance With Bicep Curl - Chair Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell step up single leg balance with bicep curl - chair variation. Cách thực hiện: Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body; Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface; Engage your core and push through your right heel to lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left knee up towards your chest; At the top of the movement, perform a bicep curl by bending your elbows and bringing the dumbbells towards your shoulders; Lower the dumbbells back down and simultaneously lower your left foot back to the ground
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface.
Step:3 Engage your core and push through your right heel to lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left knee up towards your chest.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, perform a bicep curl by bending your elbows and bringing the dumbbells towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells back down and simultaneously lower your left foot back to the ground.
Step:6 (chair variation) Repeat the movement on the opposite side, stepping up with your left foot and curling the dumbbells.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Roller Body Saw
exercises.description: Bài tập roller body saw. Cách thực hiện: Start in a plank position with your forearms on the roller and your body in a straight line; Engage your core and slowly roll the roller forward, extending your body as far as you can while maintaining control; Pause for a moment at the furthest point, then slowly roll the roller back towards your starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a plank position with your forearms on the roller and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Engage your core and slowly roll the roller forward, extending your body as far as you can while maintaining control.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the furthest point, then slowly roll the roller back towards your starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Seated Biceps Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập resistance band seated biceps curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold the resistance band with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms extended down by your sides; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the resistance band up towards your shoulders; Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps; Inhale and slowly lower the resistance band back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the resistance band with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms extended down by your sides.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the resistance band up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the resistance band back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Chair Leg Extended Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập chair leg extended stretch. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the edge of a chair with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Extend one leg straight out in front of you, keeping your heel on the ground; Lean forward slightly, feeling a stretch in your quadriceps; Hold this position for 20-30 seconds; Switch legs and repeat the stretch
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a chair with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Extend one leg straight out in front of you, keeping your heel on the ground.
Step:3 Lean forward slightly, feeling a stretch in your quadriceps.
Step:4 Hold this position for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Switch legs and repeat the stretch.

exercises.name: Crab Twist Toe Touch
exercises.description: Bài tập crab twist toe touch. Cách thực hiện: Start by sitting on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor; Place your hands behind you, fingers pointing towards your feet, and lift your hips off the ground; Extend one leg straight out in front of you while simultaneously reaching your opposite hand towards your toes; Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side; Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by sitting on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Place your hands behind you, fingers pointing towards your feet, and lift your hips off the ground.
Step:3 Extend one leg straight out in front of you while simultaneously reaching your opposite hand towards your toes.
Step:4 Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Chest Dip (On Dip-Pull-Up Cage)
exercises.description: Bài tập chest dip (on dip-pull-up cage). Cách thực hiện: Adjust the dip bars to a height that allows you to comfortably grip them; Stand between the bars and place your hands on each bar, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Jump up and straighten your arms, supporting your body weight on the bars; Bend your knees and cross your ankles behind you; Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your chest up and your shoulders down
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the dip bars to a height that allows you to comfortably grip them.
Step:2 Stand between the bars and place your hands on each bar, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Jump up and straighten your arms, supporting your body weight on the bars.
Step:4 Bend your knees and cross your ankles behind you.
Step:5 Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your chest up and your shoulders down.
Step:6 Continue lowering until your shoulders are below your elbows or until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:7 Push through your palms and extend your elbows to raise your body back up to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Peroneals Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập peroneals stretch. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you; Loop the rope around the ball of your foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands; Gently pull the rope towards you, flexing your foot and stretching your calf muscles; Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds; Release the tension on the rope and repeat the stretch on the other leg
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Loop the rope around the ball of your foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands.
Step:3 Gently pull the rope towards you, flexing your foot and stretching your calf muscles.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds.
Step:5 Release the tension on the rope and repeat the stretch on the other leg.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell One Arm Snatch
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell one arm snatch. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards; Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up; Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, driving the barbell upwards; As the barbell reaches chest level, pull it upwards with your arm, keeping it close to your body
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:4 Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, driving the barbell upwards.
Step:5 As the barbell reaches chest level, pull it upwards with your arm, keeping it close to your body.
Step:6 Rotate your elbow under the barbell and extend your arm fully overhead, locking out your elbow.
Step:7 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Barbell Incline Shoulder Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell incline shoulder raise. Cách thực hiện: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle; Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground; Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Lift the barbell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent; Slowly raise the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lift the barbell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Slowly raise the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to shoulder height.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Bicep Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated bicep curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up; Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso; Exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Rear Deltoid Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập rear deltoid stretch. Cách thực hiện: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart; Extend your right arm across your chest, placing your left hand on your right elbow; Gently pull your right arm towards your left shoulder, feeling a stretch in your right shoulder; Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release; Repeat on the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your right arm across your chest, placing your left hand on your right elbow.
Step:3 Gently pull your right arm towards your left shoulder, feeling a stretch in your right shoulder.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Standing Calves
exercises.description: Bài tập standing calves. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward; Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, standing on your toes; Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, standing on your toes.
Step:3 Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Seated Reverse Fly (Parallel Grip)
exercises.description: Bài tập lever seated reverse fly (parallel grip). Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor; Grasp the handles with a parallel grip, palms facing each other, and keep your arms slightly bent; Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body; Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with a parallel grip, palms facing each other, and keep your arms slightly bent.
Step:3 Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Middle Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập cable middle fly. Cách thực hiện: Attach cables to both sides of a cable machine at chest height; Stand in the center of the machine with one foot slightly in front of the other; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides; Keep a slight bend in your elbows and maintain a slight forward lean; Engage your chest muscles and bring your arms forward in a sweeping motion
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach cables to both sides of a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Stand in the center of the machine with one foot slightly in front of the other.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides.
Step:4 Keep a slight bend in your elbows and maintain a slight forward lean.
Step:5 Engage your chest muscles and bring your arms forward in a sweeping motion.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the center, then slowly return your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Good Morning
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell good morning. Cách thực hiện: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper back; Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge forward at the hips, pushing your buttocks back as if you were trying to touch the wall behind you with your glutes; Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings; Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position by squeezing your glutes and pushing your hips forward; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper back.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge forward at the hips, pushing your buttocks back as if you were trying to touch the wall behind you with your glutes.
Step:3 Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position by squeezing your glutes and pushing your hips forward.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral To Front Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lateral to front raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body; Keep your back straight and engage your core; Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping a slight bend in your elbows; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position; Next, raise your arms in front of you until they are parallel to the ground, again keeping a slight bend in your elbows
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Next, raise your arms in front of you until they are parallel to the ground, again keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Overhead Crunch (On Stability Ball)
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a weight plate or dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms overhead.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly curl your torso forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your torso back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Hold Style Dumbbell Alternating Seated Bicep Curl On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Hold Style Dumbbell Alternating Seated Bicep Curl On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập hold style dumbbell alternating seated bicep curl on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell while rotating your forearm until your palm is facing your shoulder; (hold variation) Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat the curl with the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell while rotating your forearm until your palm is facing your shoulder.
Step:4 (hold variation) Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the curl with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating curls for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Standing Ab Rollerout
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell standing ab rollerout. Cách thực hiện: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with both hands in front of your thighs; Engage your core and slowly roll the barbell down towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your arms extended; Continue rolling the barbell forward until your body is fully extended and your hands are directly above your head; Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your thighs, maintaining control and keeping your core engaged; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with both hands in front of your thighs.
Step:2 Engage your core and slowly roll the barbell down towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your arms extended.
Step:3 Continue rolling the barbell forward until your body is fully extended and your hands are directly above your head.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your thighs, maintaining control and keeping your core engaged.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Reverse Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tạ đòn, tạ đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:2 Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the barbell upward, contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball On The Wall Calf Raise
exercises.name_vi: Exercise Ball On The Wall Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball on the wall calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your back against a wall and place an exercise ball between your lower back and the wall; Position your feet shoulder-width apart, with your toes pointing forward; Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides; Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your back against a wall and place an exercise ball between your lower back and the wall.
Step:2 Position your feet shoulder-width apart, with your toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides.
Step:4 Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Handstand
exercises.description: Bài tập vai với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Find an open space with enough room to perform a handstand.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground shoulder-width apart, fingers pointing forward.
Step:3 Kick your legs up towards the wall, using your core and shoulders to maintain balance.
Step:4 Once in a handstand position, engage your triceps to support your body weight.
Step:5 Hold the handstand for as long as you can maintain balance.
Step:6 To come down, slowly lower your legs back to the ground.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Clock Push-Up Extreme
exercises.description: Bài tập clock push-up extreme. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line; Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides; As you lower, rotate your body to the left, extending your left arm straight out to the side. Focus on extreme movement; Push back up to the starting position, while rotating your body to the center; Repeat the push-up, this time rotating your body to the right and extending your right arm out to the side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 As you lower, rotate your body to the left, extending your left arm straight out to the side. Focus on extreme movement.
Step:4 Push back up to the starting position, while rotating your body to the center.
Step:5 Repeat the push-up, this time rotating your body to the right and extending your right arm out to the side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides with each repetition.

exercises.name: Pike-To-Cobra Push-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập pike-to-cobra push-up. Cách thực hiện: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together; Engage your core and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, forming an inverted V shape with your body; Lower your upper body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body; As you lower down, shift your weight forward and transition into a cobra pose by straightening your arms and lifting your chest up; Reverse the movement by bending your elbows and lowering your chest back down towards the ground
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, forming an inverted V shape with your body.
Step:3 Lower your upper body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
Step:4 As you lower down, shift your weight forward and transition into a cobra pose by straightening your arms and lifting your chest up.
Step:5 Reverse the movement by bending your elbows and lowering your chest back down towards the ground.
Step:6 Push through your hands to return to the inverted V position.
Step:7 Continue the movement by lowering your hips back down towards the ground, returning to the starting push-up position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Prone Hammer Curl - Macro Variation
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Prone Hammer Curl - Macro Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm prone hammer curl - macro variation. Cách thực hiện: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing your body and arm fully extended; Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms. Focus on macro movement
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing your body and arm fully extended.
Step:2 Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms. Focus on macro movement.

exercises.name: Lever Seated Good Morning
exercises.description: Bài tập lever seated good morning. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height so that your hips are slightly higher than your knees; Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the footrests; Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability; Keeping your back straight, slowly lean forward from your hips until your upper body is parallel to the ground; Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position by pushing through your glutes and hamstrings
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your hips are slightly higher than your knees.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the footrests.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Keeping your back straight, slowly lean forward from your hips until your upper body is parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position by pushing through your glutes and hamstrings.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cycle Cross Trainer
exercises.description: Bài tập cycle cross trainer. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the cycle cross trainer; Place your feet on the pedals and grip the handlebars; Start pedaling in a smooth and controlled motion; Maintain a steady pace and increase the resistance if desired; Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your cardio workout
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the cycle cross trainer.
Step:2 Place your feet on the pedals and grip the handlebars.
Step:3 Start pedaling in a smooth and controlled motion.
Step:4 Maintain a steady pace and increase the resistance if desired.
Step:5 Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your cardio workout.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring And Calf Stretch With Strap
exercises.name_vi: Standing Hamstring And Calf Stretch With Strap
exercises.description: Bài tập standing hamstring and calf stretch with strap. Cách thực hiện: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart; Hold the strap with both hands and place it around the ball of your foot; Keep your leg straight and slowly lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight; Feel the stretch in your hamstring and calf muscles; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the strap with both hands and place it around the ball of your foot.
Step:3 Keep your leg straight and slowly lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Feel the stretch in your hamstring and calf muscles.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Release the stretch and repeat with the other leg.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Standing Crunch (With Rope Attachment)
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the rope with both hands and bring it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent.
Step:4 Engage your abs and slowly crunch your torso forward, bringing your elbows towards your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the crunch, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Rear Delt Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
