Step:3 Engaging your back muscles, lift the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Seated Shoulder Press
exercises.description: Bài tập smith seated shoulder press. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height so that the handles are at shoulder level; Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and lift them off the supports, extending your arms fully; Lower the handles down to shoulder level, keeping your elbows slightly bent; Press the handles up overhead until your arms are fully extended
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that the handles are at shoulder level.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and lift them off the supports, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Lower the handles down to shoulder level, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Press the handles up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to shoulder level.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Russian Twist
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tạ đơn, thảm tập, bóng Thụy Sĩ. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Lean back slightly while keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Hold your hands together in front of your chest or hold a weight if desired.
Step:4 Lift your feet off the ground, balancing on your sit bones.
Step:5 Twist your torso to the right, bringing your hands or weight towards the right side of your body.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing your hands or weight towards the left side of your body.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Supine Biceps Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying supine biceps curl. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended; Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Decline Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell decline fly. Cách thực hiện: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips; Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest; Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest; Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Arnold Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell arnold press. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent; Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward; Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms are facing forward at the top of the movement; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent.
Step:2 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms are facing forward at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Leg Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the resistance band to a sturdy anchor point and secure it around your ankle.
Step:2 Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged and your upper body stable, extend your leg straight out in front of you.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly return your leg to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.name: Push-Up (On Stability Ball)
exercises.description: Bài tập push-up (on stability ball). Cách thực hiện: Place the stability ball on the ground and position yourself facing down with your hands on the ball, shoulder-width apart; Extend your legs straight out behind you, balancing on your toes; Engage your core and lower your chest towards the ball by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and position yourself facing down with your hands on the ball, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs straight out behind you, balancing on your toes.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower your chest towards the ball by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Toe Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập smith toe raise. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the smith machine bar to a height that allows you to comfortably stand with your feet flat on the ground; Position yourself under the bar with your shoulders directly below it and your feet shoulder-width apart; Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform or weight plates, with your heels hanging off the edge; Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Engage your core and keep your back straight throughout the exercise
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine bar to a height that allows you to comfortably stand with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Position yourself under the bar with your shoulders directly below it and your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform or weight plates, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Engage your core and keep your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Slowly raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Run (Equipment)
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing upright with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your upper body relaxed.
Step:3 Begin jogging in place, lifting your knees up towards your chest and landing softly on the balls of your feet.
Step:4 Maintain a steady pace and continue jogging for the desired duration or distance.
Step:5 Remember to breathe deeply and maintain good posture throughout the exercise.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Zottman Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell zottman preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and elbows resting on the pad; Curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms stationary and your palms facing up; At the top of the curl, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing down; Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as you do so; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and elbows resting on the pad.
Step:2 Curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms stationary and your palms facing up.
Step:3 At the top of the curl, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing down.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Ez Barbell Reverse Grip Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập ez barbell reverse grip curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip; Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise; Curl the barbell upwards by contracting your biceps, while exhaling; Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Curl the barbell upwards by contracting your biceps, while exhaling.
Step:4 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Slowly begin to bring the barbell back to the starting position as you inhale.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Front Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell bench front squat. Cách thực hiện: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper chest, just below your collarbone; Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, keeping your elbows up and your upper arms parallel to the ground; Lower your body down into a squat position by bending at the knees and hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up; Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper chest, just below your collarbone.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, keeping your elbows up and your upper arms parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Lower your body down into a squat position by bending at the knees and hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Single Leg Split Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập band single leg split squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place a resistance band around your ankles; Take a big step forward with your right foot and a smaller step back with your left foot; Bend your knees and lower your body until your right thigh is parallel to the ground, keeping your left knee slightly above the ground; Push through your right heel to return to the starting position; Repeat on the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place a resistance band around your ankles.
Step:2 Take a big step forward with your right foot and a smaller step back with your left foot.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lower your body until your right thigh is parallel to the ground, keeping your left knee slightly above the ground.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Cable Squat Row (With Rope Attachment) Heavy
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine at waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 (heavy variation) Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:4 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, with your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Engage your core and pull the rope towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Keep your elbows close to your body and continue pulling until your hands reach your chest.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the rope and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Seated Side Crunch (Wall)
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the floor with your back against a wall and your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the floor, hip-width apart.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:4 Engage your abs and lean to one side, bringing your elbow towards your hip.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat on the other side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Reverse Wrist Curl - Prone Variation
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your body. Emphasize prone control.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Rope Climb
exercises.description: Bài tập rope climb. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing the rope with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grab the rope with both hands, palms facing towards you; Bend your knees slightly and engage your core; Begin pulling yourself up the rope by alternating hand-over-hand movements; Use your legs to assist in the upward movement
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing the rope with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grab the rope with both hands, palms facing towards you.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:4 Begin pulling yourself up the rope by alternating hand-over-hand movements.
Step:5 Use your legs to assist in the upward movement.
Step:6 Continue climbing until you reach the desired height or the top of the rope.
Step:7 To descend, reverse the hand-over-hand movement while controlling your descent.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Reverse Grip Pull-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập reverse grip pull-up. Cách thực hiện: Grab the pull-up bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart; Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight; Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest; Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Incline Bench Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle and attach a cable handle to the low pulley.
Step:2 Sit on the bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip and extend your arms fully in front of you.
Step:4 Lean forward from your hips while keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the cable handle towards your chest by retracting your shoulder blades and bending your elbows.
Step:6 Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement, then slowly extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Decline Close Grip Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench on the smith machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell One Arm Military Press To The Side
exercises.name_vi: Kettlebell One Arm Military Press To The Side
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell one arm military press to the side. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder height; Engage your core and keep your back straight; Press the kettlebell overhead, extending your arm fully; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Press the kettlebell overhead, extending your arm fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Ez Barbell Spider Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cánh tay với ghế nghiêng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on a preacher bench or stability ball, allowing your elbows to hang down.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Preacher Curl V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập lever preacher curl v. 2. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support; Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the handles towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps; Inhale as you slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the handles towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale as you slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Lateral Raise With Support
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Lateral Raise With Support
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm lateral raise with support. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, with your palm facing your body; Place your other hand on a stable surface, such as a bench or wall, for support; Keep your back straight and engage your core; Raise the dumbbell out to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down; Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, with your palm facing your body.
Step:2 Place your other hand on a stable surface, such as a bench or wall, for support.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:4 Raise the dumbbell out to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down.
Step:5 Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Barbell Lying Back Of The Head Tricep Extension
exercises.name_vi: Barbell Lying Back Of The Head Tricep Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell lying back of the head tricep extension. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench; Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest; Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows; Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Weighted Russian Twist V. 2
exercises.description: Bài tập bụng với tạ đơn, thảm tập, bóng Thụy Sĩ. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Hold the weight with both hands in front of your chest.
Step:3 Lean back slightly to engage your core muscles.
Step:4 Twist your torso to the right, bringing the weight towards the right side of your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the weight towards the left side of your body.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Muscle Up
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:3 As you reach the top of the movement, transition your grip so that your palms are facing towards you.
Step:4 Continue pulling yourself up until your chest is above the bar and your arms are fully flexed.
Step:5 Reverse the movement by slowly lowering yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Chest Stretch With Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập chest stretch with exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold the exercise ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you; Slowly bring the exercise ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your chest muscles; Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold the exercise ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Slowly bring the exercise ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your chest muscles.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Sled Calf Press On Leg Press
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the sled.
Step:2 Place your feet shoulder-width apart on the sled, with your toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Release the safety handles and push the sled away from you by extending your knees and ankles.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the sled back down by bending your knees and ankles.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Standing Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập lever standing calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the machine to your height and stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Place your shoulders under the pads and hold onto the handles for stability; Raise your heels as high as possible by extending your ankles; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to your height and stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place your shoulders under the pads and hold onto the handles for stability.
Step:3 Raise your heels as high as possible by extending your ankles.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Standing Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập cable standing calf raise. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Hold onto the cable machine handles or attach a cable ankle strap to your ankles; Raise your heels off the ground by extending your ankles as high as possible; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold onto the cable machine handles or attach a cable ankle strap to your ankles.
Step:3 Raise your heels off the ground by extending your ankles as high as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Assisted Lying Glutes Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted lying glutes stretch. Cách thực hiện: Lie on your back with your legs extended; Bend your right knee and place your right ankle on your left thigh, just above the knee; Grasp your left thigh with both hands and gently pull it towards your chest; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds; Release and repeat on the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your legs extended.
Step:2 Bend your right knee and place your right ankle on your left thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 Grasp your left thigh with both hands and gently pull it towards your chest.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Release and repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Sled 45В° Leg Press (Back Pov)
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the sled machine so that your knees are at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Push the footplate away from your body by extending your legs, keeping your heels on the footplate.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position.
Step:6 Slowly bend your knees and lower the footplate back towards your body, controlling the movement.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Goblet Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tạ đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell vertically against your chest with both hands.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down into a squat position by pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Seated Shoulder Internal Rotation
exercises.description: Bài tập cable seated shoulder internal rotation. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench or chair facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground; Hold the cable handle with your arm extended straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground; Keep your elbow slightly bent and your shoulder blades pulled back and down; Slowly rotate your arm inward, bringing the cable handle towards the center of your body; Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your arm extended straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Keep your elbow slightly bent and your shoulder blades pulled back and down.
Step:4 Slowly rotate your arm inward, bringing the cable handle towards the center of your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Hands Reversed Clasped Circular Toe Touch (Male)
exercises.name_vi: Hands Reversed Clasped Circular Toe Touch (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập hands reversed clasped circular toe touch (male). Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended to the sides; Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent; Reach down with your hands and clasp them together behind your legs; Slowly raise your hands up and over your head in a circular motion, keeping your legs straight; Continue the circular motion until your hands touch your toes
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended to the sides.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Reach down with your hands and clasp them together behind your legs.
Step:4 Slowly raise your hands up and over your head in a circular motion, keeping your legs straight.
Step:5 Continue the circular motion until your hands touch your toes.
Step:6 Reverse the motion and bring your hands back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Standing Twist
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell standing twist. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your chest with both hands, palms facing down; Engage your core and keep your back straight throughout the exercise; Slowly twist your torso to the right, pivoting on your feet and hips, while keeping your lower body stable; Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat the twist to the left side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your chest with both hands, palms facing down.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Slowly twist your torso to the right, pivoting on your feet and hips, while keeping your lower body stable.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the twist to the left side.
Step:6 Continue alternating twists for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Reverse Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Slowly lower the barbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Full Maltese
exercises.description: Bài tập full maltese. Cách thực hiện: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended straight out to the sides; Slowly lean forward, keeping your arms straight, until your upper body is parallel to the ground; Engage your core and hold this position for a few seconds; Return to the starting position by pushing through your feet and standing back up; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended straight out to the sides.
Step:2 Slowly lean forward, keeping your arms straight, until your upper body is parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Engage your core and hold this position for a few seconds.
Step:4 Return to the starting position by pushing through your feet and standing back up.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Reverse Grip Skullcrusher
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell reverse grip skullcrusher. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench; Hold the barbell with a reverse grip, palms facing towards your face, and your hands shoulder-width apart; Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping your elbows in and your wrists straight; Slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with a reverse grip, palms facing towards your face, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping your elbows in and your wrists straight.
Step:4 Slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Shoulder Tap
exercises.description: Bài tập shoulder tap. Cách thực hiện: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line; Engage your core and lift your right hand off the ground, reaching across to tap your left shoulder; Place your right hand back on the ground and repeat with your left hand tapping your right shoulder; Continue alternating shoulder taps while keeping your hips and torso stable; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your right hand off the ground, reaching across to tap your left shoulder.
Step:3 Place your right hand back on the ground and repeat with your left hand tapping your right shoulder.
Step:4 Continue alternating shoulder taps while keeping your hips and torso stable.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Seated Hamstring Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball seated hamstring stretch. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle; Slowly roll the ball forward, walking your feet out until your upper back is resting on the ball and your legs are extended straight in front of you; Place your hands on your hips for support; Engage your core and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your chest lifted; Stop when you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, and hold the position for 20-30 seconds
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Slowly roll the ball forward, walking your feet out until your upper back is resting on the ball and your legs are extended straight in front of you.
Step:3 Place your hands on your hips for support.
Step:4 Engage your core and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your chest lifted.
Step:5 Stop when you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, and hold the position for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Slowly return to the starting position by pushing through your heels and using your hamstrings to pull yourself back up.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Front Raise
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated front raise. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs; Keep your back straight and core engaged; Raise the dumbbells in front of you, with your palms facing down, until they are at shoulder level; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbells in front of you, with your palms facing down, until they are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Twisted Leg Raise (Female)
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lift your legs off the ground, bringing them towards your chest.
Step:3 As you lift your legs, twist your hips to one side, bringing your knees towards your opposite shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, this time twisting your hips to the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Seated Neutral Wrist Curl
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Seated Neutral Wrist Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm seated neutral wrist curl. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up; Rest your forearm on your thigh, allowing your wrist to hang off the edge; Keeping your forearm stationary, curl your wrist upward as far as possible; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrist back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Step:2 Rest your forearm on your thigh, allowing your wrist to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Keeping your forearm stationary, curl your wrist upward as far as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrist back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.

exercises.name: Shoulder Grip Pull-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập shoulder grip pull-up. Cách thực hiện: Grab the pull-up bar with a shoulder-width grip, palms facing away from you; Hang freely with your arms fully extended; Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar until your chin is above the bar; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with a shoulder-width grip, palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Hang freely with your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar until your chin is above the bar.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable one arm curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing up; Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing up.
Step:3 Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Lower Back Stretch (Pyramid)
exercises.description: Bài tập exercise ball lower back stretch (pyramid). Cách thực hiện: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle; Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball down your back until your lower back is resting on the ball; Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest; Engage your core and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground, allowing your lower back to stretch over the ball; Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball down your back until your lower back is resting on the ball.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:4 Engage your core and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground, allowing your lower back to stretch over the ball.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Rear Delt Row (Stirrups)
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a stirrup handle to a low cable pulley and stand facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with your left hand and take a step back with your right foot, positioning your body at a slight angle.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 With your left arm extended and your palm facing down, pull the handle towards your chest by retracting your shoulder blade.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your shoulder blade.
Step:6 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:7 Switch sides and repeat the exercise with your right arm.

exercises.name: Assisted Prone Lying Quads Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập assisted prone lying quads stretch. Cách thực hiện: Lie face down on the ground with your legs extended; Bend your left knee and reach back with your left hand to grab your left foot or ankle; Gently pull your left foot towards your glutes, feeling a stretch in your left quad; Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release; Repeat with your right leg
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the ground with your legs extended.
Step:2 Bend your left knee and reach back with your left hand to grab your left foot or ankle.
Step:3 Gently pull your left foot towards your glutes, feeling a stretch in your left quad.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release.
Step:5 Repeat with your right leg.

exercises.name: Smith Reverse Calf Raises
exercises.description: Bài tập smith reverse calf raises. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the smith machine bar to a height just below your shoulders; Stand facing the bar with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointing forward; Place the balls of your feet on the edge of a step or platform, with your heels hanging off; Hold onto the bar for support, keeping your back straight and core engaged; Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine bar to a height just below your shoulders.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Place the balls of your feet on the edge of a step or platform, with your heels hanging off.
Step:4 Hold onto the bar for support, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:5 Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Standing Inner Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable standing inner curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up; Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary; Exhale and curl the cable handle towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps; Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Exhale and curl the cable handle towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Thruster
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell thruster. Cách thực hiện: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands, palms facing each other; Lower into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back, keeping your chest up and your back straight; As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your heels to stand up, simultaneously pressing the kettlebell overhead; Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, fully extending your elbows; Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by reversing the movement, bending your elbows and lowering the weight back to your chest
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Lower into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
Step:3 As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your heels to stand up, simultaneously pressing the kettlebell overhead.
Step:4 Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, fully extending your elbows.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by reversing the movement, bending your elbows and lowering the weight back to your chest.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Full Planche
exercises.description: Bài tập full planche. Cách thực hiện: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your fingers pointing forward; Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, lifting your feet off the ground; Continue shifting your weight forward until your body is parallel to the ground, balancing on your hands; Hold this position for as long as you can, maintaining a straight body line; Slowly lower your feet back to the ground and return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, lifting your feet off the ground.
Step:3 Continue shifting your weight forward until your body is parallel to the ground, balancing on your hands.
Step:4 Hold this position for as long as you can, maintaining a straight body line.
Step:5 Slowly lower your feet back to the ground and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Fly
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đơn, ghế nghiêng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Alternate Biceps Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell alternate biceps curl. Cách thực hiện: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in each hand, palms facing forward; Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps; Continue to raise the barbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbells are at shoulder level; Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps; Inhale as you slowly begin to lower the barbells back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the barbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale as you slowly begin to lower the barbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.

exercises.name: Barbell Palms Down Wrist Curl Over A Bench
exercises.name_vi: Barbell Palms Down Wrist Curl Over A Bench
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell palms down wrist curl over a bench. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your forearms resting on your thighs, palms facing down; Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart; Lower the barbell towards the ground by flexing your wrists, keeping your forearms stationary; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise the barbell back up by extending your wrists; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your forearms resting on your thighs, palms facing down.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell towards the ground by flexing your wrists, keeping your forearms stationary.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise the barbell back up by extending your wrists.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Overhead Triceps Stretch
exercises.description: Bài tập overhead triceps stretch. Cách thực hiện: Stand or sit upright with your feet shoulder-width apart; Extend one arm overhead, bending at the elbow so that your hand reaches towards the opposite shoulder blade; With your other hand, gently pull the elbow of the extended arm towards the opposite side of your head, feeling a stretch in your triceps; Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release; Repeat on the other side
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand or sit upright with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one arm overhead, bending at the elbow so that your hand reaches towards the opposite shoulder blade.
Step:3 With your other hand, gently pull the elbow of the extended arm towards the opposite side of your head, feeling a stretch in your triceps.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Twisting Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing away from you.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 As you lower the dumbbells, twist your wrists so that your palms face towards you at the bottom of the movement.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then reverse the movement by pressing the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:7 As you press the dumbbells up, twist your wrists back to the starting position with palms facing away from you.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Goblet Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell goblet squat. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell close to your chest with both hands; Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down into a squat position by bending at the knees and hips; Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell close to your chest with both hands.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down into a squat position by bending at the knees and hips.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Rack Pull
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell rack pull. Cách thực hiện: Set up a barbell on a rack at knee height; Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards; Bend at the hips and knees to lower yourself down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart; Engage your core and lift the barbell by extending your hips and knees, pulling your shoulders back and squeezing your glutes at the top; Lower the barbell back down to the starting position by bending at the hips and knees
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up a barbell on a rack at knee height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards.
Step:3 Bend at the hips and knees to lower yourself down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Engage your core and lift the barbell by extending your hips and knees, pulling your shoulders back and squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position by bending at the hips and knees.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Twisting Pull
exercises.description: Bài tập cable twisting pull. Cách thực hiện: Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and stand facing the machine; Grasp the handle with your left hand and step away from the machine, extending your arm fully; Position your feet shoulder-width apart, with your knees slightly bent; Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise; Pull the handle towards your body, rotating your torso to the right as you do so
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and stand facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with your left hand and step away from the machine, extending your arm fully.
Step:3 Position your feet shoulder-width apart, with your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Pull the handle towards your body, rotating your torso to the right as you do so.
Step:6 Squeeze your back muscles at the end of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly return to the starting position, keeping tension on the cable.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform with your right hand.

exercises.name: Stalder Press
exercises.description: Bài tập stalder press. Cách thực hiện: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended overhead; Bend your knees slightly and engage your core; Lower your body down into a squat position while keeping your arms extended overhead; As you squat down, press your arms down towards the ground, engaging your triceps; Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to stand back up while simultaneously raising your arms back overhead
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended overhead.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Lower your body down into a squat position while keeping your arms extended overhead.
Step:4 As you squat down, press your arms down towards the ground, engaging your triceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to stand back up while simultaneously raising your arms back overhead.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm Reverse Grip Press
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm Reverse Grip Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm reverse grip press. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing towards your body; Place your feet flat on the ground and keep your back straight; Raise the dumbbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body; Press the dumbbell upwards until your arm is fully extended; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing towards your body.
Step:2 Place your feet flat on the ground and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell upwards until your arm is fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Seated Two Arm Military Press
exercises.name_vi: Kettlebell Seated Two Arm Military Press
exercises.description: Bài tập kettlebell seated two arm military press. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground; Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward; Press the kettlebells overhead by extending your arms fully; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to shoulder level; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the kettlebells overhead by extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to shoulder level.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Skater Hops
exercises.description: Bài tập skater hops. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart; Bend your knees slightly and jump to the right, landing on your right foot; As you land, swing your left leg behind your right leg and tap the ground with your left toes; Immediately jump to the left, landing on your left foot; As you land, swing your right leg behind your left leg and tap the ground with your right toes
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and jump to the right, landing on your right foot.
Step:3 As you land, swing your left leg behind your right leg and tap the ground with your left toes.
Step:4 Immediately jump to the left, landing on your left foot.
Step:5 As you land, swing your right leg behind your left leg and tap the ground with your right toes.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides, jumping and tapping the ground with each leg.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Standing Rear Delt Row (With Rope)
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable attachment with both hands, palms facing each other, and step back to create tension in the cable.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the cable towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the cable back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Push Sit-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập band push sit-up. Cách thực hiện: Attach the band securely to a stable anchor point; Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground; Hold the band with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling; Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the band securely to a stable anchor point.
Step:2 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold the band with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Front Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell front squat. Cách thực hiện: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out; Hold the barbell in front of your shoulders, resting it on your collarbone and shoulders; Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees; Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell in front of your shoulders, resting it on your collarbone and shoulders.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:4 Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Seated Leg Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Place your lower legs under the padded lever, just above your ankles.
Step:3 Grasp the handles on the sides of the machine for support.
Step:4 Keeping your upper legs stationary, exhale and curl your legs up as far as possible.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the lever back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying One Arm Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying one arm press. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground; Hold the dumbbell at shoulder level with your palm facing forward; Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the dumbbell at shoulder level with your palm facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.name: Inchworm
exercises.description: Bài tập inchworm. Cách thực hiện: Start in a standing position with your feet hip-width apart; Bend forward at the waist and place your hands on the ground in front of you; Walk your hands forward until you are in a high plank position, with your body in a straight line from head to toe; Pause for a moment, then walk your hands back towards your feet, keeping your legs as straight as possible; Once your hands reach your feet, stand back up to the starting position
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start in a standing position with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist and place your hands on the ground in front of you.
Step:3 Walk your hands forward until you are in a high plank position, with your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then walk your hands back towards your feet, keeping your legs as straight as possible.
Step:5 Once your hands reach your feet, stand back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Thibaudeau Kayak Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and sit facing the machine with your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with your right hand and extend your arm fully, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:3 Lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight and your abs engaged.
Step:4 Pull the handle towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blade and bending your elbow, keeping your arm close to your body.
Step:5 Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform with your left arm.

exercises.name: Band Fixed Back Underhand Pulldown
exercises.description: Bài tập band fixed back underhand pulldown. Cách thực hiện: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point above your head; Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the band with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Step back to create tension in the band, keeping your arms fully extended; Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point above your head.
Step:2 Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the band with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Step back to create tension in the band, keeping your arms fully extended.
Step:5 Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pull the band down towards your chest, leading with your elbows.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, feeling the contraction in your lats.
Step:8 Slowly release the tension in the band and return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Assisted Inverse Leg Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the ankle attachment is at the lowest setting.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your legs straight and the ankle attachment secured to your ankles.
Step:3 Hold onto the handles of the bench for stability.
Step:4 Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up towards your glutes by flexing your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your hamstrings.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Assisted Wheel Rollerout
exercises.description: Bài tập band assisted wheel rollerout. Cách thực hiện: Kneel on the floor and hold the handles of the band with both hands, palms facing down; Place the band on the ground in front of you and position your hands shoulder-width apart; Engage your core and slowly roll the wheel forward, extending your body as far as you can while maintaining control; Pause for a moment at the furthest point, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your knees to return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Kneel on the floor and hold the handles of the band with both hands, palms facing down.
Step:2 Place the band on the ground in front of you and position your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly roll the wheel forward, extending your body as far as you can while maintaining control.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the furthest point, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your knees to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Hyperextension
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the hyperextension bench so that your upper thighs are resting on the pad and your feet are secured.
Step:2 Cross your arms over your chest or place your hands behind your head.
Step:3 Lower your upper body towards the ground while keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise your upper body back up until it is in line with your legs.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell One Arm French Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell One Arm French Press On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell one arm french press on exercise ball. Cách thực hiện: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight; Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle; Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow stationary; Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow stationary.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Bicep Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập smith machine bicep curl. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to be at waist level; Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary; Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to be at waist level.
Step:2 Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Reverse Grip Incline Bench One Arm Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Place a dumbbell on the floor next to the bench.
Step:3 Stand facing the bench with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Bend at the waist and place your left knee and left hand on the bench for support.
Step:5 Pick up the dumbbell with your right hand using a reverse grip (palm facing down).
Step:6 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:7 Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:8 Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement.
Step:9 Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner.
Step:10 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:11 Switch sides and repeat the exercise with your left arm.

exercises.name: Smith Reverse-Grip Press
exercises.description: Bài tập smith reverse-grip press. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to chest level; Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Step back and position yourself with a slight bend in your knees; Keep your chest up and core engaged throughout the exercise
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to chest level.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Step back and position yourself with a slight bend in your knees.
Step:5 Keep your chest up and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Lower the bar towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Hyperextension (On Bench)
exercises.description: Bài tập hyperextension (on bench).
