Cách thực hiện: Adjust the hyperextension bench so that your hips are resting comfortably on the pad and your feet are secured; Cross your arms over your chest or place your hands behind your head; Slowly lower your upper body towards the ground while keeping your back straight; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise your upper body back up until it is in line with your legs; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the hyperextension bench so that your hips are resting comfortably on the pad and your feet are secured.
Step:2 Cross your arms over your chest or place your hands behind your head.
Step:3 Slowly lower your upper body towards the ground while keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise your upper body back up until it is in line with your legs.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kipping Muscle Up With Triple
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and use a swinging motion to generate momentum.
Step:3 As you swing forward, pull your chest towards the bar, using your lats and biceps to initiate the movement. Emphasize triple control.
Step:4 Continue the upward motion until your chest reaches the bar, then transition into a dip position by pushing down on the bar and extending your arms.
Step:5 Lower yourself back down to the starting position by bending your arms and controlling the descent.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Vertical Leg Raise (On Parallel Bars)
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Hang from the parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or slightly higher.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Seated Crunch (Chest Pad)
exercises.description: Bài tập tim mạch với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and chest pad position according to your comfort.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the chest pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or side bars for stability.
Step:4 Engage your abs and slowly lean back, allowing the chest pad to move with you.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the maximum contraction, feeling the tension in your abs.
Step:6 Slowly return to the starting position by contracting your abs and pulling yourself back up.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Pullover To Press
exercises.description: Bài tập barbell pullover to press. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the ground; Hold the barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and extend your arms straight above your chest; Keeping your arms straight, lower the barbell behind your head in an arc-like motion until you feel a stretch in your lats; Pause for a moment, then reverse the motion and press the barbell back to the starting position above your chest; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, lower the barbell behind your head in an arc-like motion until you feel a stretch in your lats.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then reverse the motion and press the barbell back to the starting position above your chest.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Hug Keens To Chest
exercises.description: Bài tập hug keens to chest. Cách thực hiện: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart; Bend your knees and lower your body down into a squat position; As you squat down, bring your knees up towards your chest and hug them with your arms; Hold this position for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body down into a squat position.
Step:3 As you squat down, bring your knees up towards your chest and hug them with your arms.
Step:4 Hold this position for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Seated Shoulder Press
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell seated shoulder press. Cách thực hiện: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs; Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward; Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead; Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Wide Grip Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a comfortable position on the smith machine.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows out to the sides.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Kneeling Push-Up (Male)
exercises.description: Bài tập kneeling push-up (male). Cách thực hiện: Start by kneeling on the ground with your hands shoulder-width apart, fingers pointing forward; Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, so that your body forms a straight line from head to heels; Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides; Continue lowering until your chest is just above the ground, then push back up to the starting position by straightening your arms; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Start by kneeling on the ground with your hands shoulder-width apart, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, so that your body forms a straight line from head to heels.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your chest is just above the ground, then push back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Reverse Grip Vertical Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footplate position to ensure proper alignment.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Barbell Jm Bench Press
exercises.description: Bài tập ngực với tạ đòn, ghế tập. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body.
Step:4 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable High Row (Kneeling)
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Kneel down in front of the cable machine and grab the bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit back on your heels, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the bar towards your upper abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Self Assisted Inverse Leg Curl (On Floor)
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the ground, hip-width apart.
Step:3 Lift your hips off the ground, engaging your glutes and hamstrings.
Step:4 Slowly curl your legs towards your glutes, keeping your hips lifted.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly extend your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Lower your hips back down to the ground.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Band Alternating V-Up
exercises.description: Bài tập band alternating v-up. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band; Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body off the ground simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes; As you lower your legs and upper body back down, switch the position of your legs, crossing one over the other; Repeat the movement, alternating the position of your legs with each repetition; Continue for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band.
Step:2 Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body off the ground simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes.
Step:3 As you lower your legs and upper body back down, switch the position of your legs, crossing one over the other.
Step:4 Repeat the movement, alternating the position of your legs with each repetition.
Step:5 Continue for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Rope Incline Tricep Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập cable rope incline tricep extension. Cách thực hiện: Attach a rope to a high pulley and adjust the incline bench to a comfortable angle; Stand facing away from the pulley with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the rope with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight overhead; Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise; Lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows until your forearms touch your biceps
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a high pulley and adjust the incline bench to a comfortable angle.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the pulley with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight overhead.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows until your forearms touch your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Hack Squat
exercises.description: Bài tập smith hack squat. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the barbell on the smith machine to an appropriate height for your body; Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly pointed outwards; Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper traps and shoulders; Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart; Engage your core and keep your chest up as you unrack the barbell
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the barbell on the smith machine to an appropriate height for your body.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly pointed outwards.
Step:3 Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper traps and shoulders.
Step:4 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you unrack the barbell.
Step:6 Take a step back and position your feet slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:7 Bend your knees and lower your body down, keeping your chest up and back straight.
Step:8 Continue descending until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:9 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:10 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: V-Sit On Floor
exercises.description: Bài tập v-sit on floor. Cách thực hiện: Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you; Lean back slightly and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight; Simultaneously, lift your upper body off the ground and reach your arms towards your legs; Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Lean back slightly and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Simultaneously, lift your upper body off the ground and reach your arms towards your legs.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Alternating Bicep Curl With Leg Raised On Exercise Ball
exercises.description: Bài tập chân với tự trọng. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Place an exercise ball behind you and position one foot on top of it, keeping your balance.
Step:3 With your arms fully extended and elbows close to your sides, curl one dumbbell towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Smith Bent Over Row
exercises.description: Bài tập lưng với tạ đòn, tạ đơn, xà đơn. Thực hiện đúng kỹ thuật, hít thở đều và kiểm soát chuyển động.
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Pull the bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Reverse Preacher Curl
exercises.name_vi: Cable One Arm Reverse Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Bài tập cable one arm reverse preacher curl. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the cable machine so that the pulley is at the lowest position; Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart; Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip and position your upper arm against the preacher bench pad; Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise; Slowly curl your forearm towards your bicep, keeping your upper arm stationary against the pad
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the pulley is at the lowest position.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip and position your upper arm against the preacher bench pad.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Slowly curl your forearm towards your bicep, keeping your upper arm stationary against the pad.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your bicep.
Step:7 Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:9 Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

exercises.name: Elevator
exercises.description: Bài tập elevator. Cách thực hiện: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent; Place your hands on your hips or cross them in front of your chest; Keeping your back straight, slowly bend forward at the waist, lowering your upper body towards the ground; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise your upper body back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Place your hands on your hips or cross them in front of your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, slowly bend forward at the waist, lowering your upper body towards the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise your upper body back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lever Shrug
exercises.description: Bài tập lever shrug. Cách thực hiện: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine with your back against the pad; Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms straight; Keeping your back straight, lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible; Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms straight.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying One Arm Supinated Triceps Extension
exercises.name_vi: Dumbbell Lying One Arm Supinated Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Bài tập dumbbell lying one arm supinated triceps extension. Cách thực hiện: Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground; Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, and extend your arm straight up above your shoulder; Keeping your upper arm stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow; Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back up to the starting position; Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, and extend your arm straight up above your shoulder.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.name: One Arm Against Wall
exercises.description: Bài tập one arm against wall. Cách thực hiện: Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart; Extend one arm straight out in front of you and place your palm against the wall; Engage your core and lean your body forward, keeping your arm straight and your back flat; Slowly push against the wall with your palm, activating your lat muscles; Hold the position for a few seconds, then release and repeat with the other arm
exerciseDbInstructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one arm straight out in front of you and place your palm against the wall.
Step:3 Engage your core and lean your body forward, keeping your arm straight and your back flat.
Step:4 Slowly push against the wall with your palm, activating your lat muscles.
Step:5 Hold the position for a few seconds, then release and repeat with the other arm.
